The ‘folks out east’ who tried to bribe me and who run this country from the shadows with their dark money machine have found a new target. ME.

**First:** The Clinton-Soros machine endorsed my opponent.

**Then:** They funded a lawsuit against me for using my First Amendment right as a citizen and a concerned mom.

**Now:** I’m asking for your help to meet a MIDNIGHT fundraising deadline so we can FIGHT BACK and get to work on the one thing that matters in 2024. SAVING THIS NATION.

You may have heard President Trump say, “They’re not coming for me; they’re coming for you, and I’m in their way.”

Well — I’m right here in the way with him. Far-Left Democrats and Lincoln Project Republicans are teaming up to weaponize the government to financially ruin my FAMILY in the same way they’re trying to take out President Trump.

I need your support now more than ever. I’m asking for your help to raise $10,000 in small-dollar contributions by MIDNIGHT tonight so we can show the NATION we’re going to keep fighting for this country until we take our last breaths.

**I don’t care if I’m homeless or if I lose everything. NOTHING matters if we don’t win the November election.**

****If there’s ANYTHING you can spare — your donation will be MATCHED 10X if you donate towards my midnight deadline. Please DONATE BELOW!** **

name: Austin Davis
subject: No stopping now
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF AUSTIN DAVIS** Emails like this are the most effective way to grow our campaign and reach supporters like you
body:
We’re getting things done for the people of Pennsylvania. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87408834/481054893/-2024970422?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NzIyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2Y3MTcwNS1mNDMwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0go5R1kGFDBYCVMLHqcJPy2coZbI162RgeGKN7ka-Y4=)
---
| Peter — As lieutenant governor and president of the Pennsylvania State Senate, I’ve wasted no time addressing the most pressing issues in our Commonwealth. **In just over a year, I’ve helped:**
* Create economic opportunity with the lowest unemployment rate ever
* Prioritize public safety in our communities by addressing gun violence
* Fight for Pennsylvania’s youth with the largest year-to-year investment in public education, and universal school breakfast for all K-12 students
* More seniors and people with disabilities stay in their homes with the expansion of our Property Tax & Rent Rebate program
* Joined a multi-state abortion alliance with other lieutenant governors to protect women’s reproductive rights

subject: 5 reasons for $5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
I’m running proudly on my record of fighting for abortion rights. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87409755/481071408/1845507167?refcode=em24_240622_ksassp_fndt_gq_act___as_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240622_ksassp_fndt_gq_act___as_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=35beab45-f830-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJlYWI0NS1mODMwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxIuRc9jufLJUnbt7W3l0PTG7q40LRP4alDTEBiUS3M=) Peter, I know I’m probably not the only candidate in this election emailing to ask for your support. (And sorry in advance for adding to your inbox clutter!)

To me, that makes it especially important that I take some time to explain why this race, right here in Oregon, is deserving of your time and investment — because I don’t take your support, or anyone else’s, for granted.

**[If you already know that you’re all in on protecting this seat, I’d be honored if you would pitch in $5 and help me and Dr. Kim Schrier win our races (you can click this link to donate).](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87409756/481071409/1845507167?refcode=em24_240622_ksassp_fndt_gq_act___as_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240622_ksassp_fndt_gq_act___as_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=35beab45-f830-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJlYWI0NS1mODMwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxIuRc9jufLJUnbt7W3l0PTG7q40LRP4alDTEBiUS3M=)** But if you need more convincing, here are five reasons I am humbly asking for your support today:

**1) Despite the extreme GOP majority in control of the House, I’ve worked hard to deliver real progress.** In fact, I’m proud to be one of the only representatives — let alone first-term representatives — to pass a new law in this Congress. My legislation ensures that the Grand Ronde Tribe here in Oregon gets land compensation they are owed by the federal government.

**2) I’m running proudly on my record of fighting for abortion rights.** Here in Oregon, I helped pass one of the nation’s most comprehensive reproductive rights bills. And now that I’m in Congress, I’m fighting to codify Roe v. Wade protections into law — so that no woman, in any state, can be criminalized simply for making a personal health care decision that some politician somewhere doesn’t like.

**3) I know what it’s like when you feel like your family just can’t get ahead.** My dad immigrated to the U.S. from Mexico in 1950 and worked in the fields picking cotton and tomatoes before he was in first grade. He and my mom worked so hard, but when it was time for me to go to college, they didn’t have the money to afford both my education and their groceries. So I put myself through school instead.

**4) Today, I’m working to make our economy fairer for families across our country who feel like they don’t have control over their own circumstances.** That means fighting for affordable health care, putting hardworking families over big corporations, and delivering national paid family and medical leave.

**5) National Republicans are determined to defeat me — and it took everything we had to fight them off last time around.** This district is one of the most competitive in the whole country. Whichever party wins this seat is likely to win control of Congress, and it’s going to come down to just a handful of votes.

**[Peter, unlike so many politicians, I’m not in this campaign because I like to hear myself talk. I’m here to get things done and fight for our values — but I can’t do it alone. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll pitch in $5 to help me and Dr. Kim Schrier win. It may not sound like it, but your support will go a LONG way to put us on a path to victory.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87409757/481071410/1845507167?refcode=em24_240622_ksassp_fndt_gq_act___as_ettx&utm_campaign=em24_240622_ksassp_fndt_gq_act___as_ettx&utm_medium=email&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=&zip=18326&refcode2=35beab45-f830-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWJlYWI0NS1mODMwLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LxIuRc9jufLJUnbt7W3l0PTG7q40LRP4alDTEBiUS3M=)** clean_body: I’m running proudly on my record of fighting for abortion rights. = Peter, I know I’m probably not the only candidate in this election emailing to ask for your support. (And sorry in advance for adding to your inbox clutter!) To me, that makes it especially important that I take some time to explain why this race, right here in Oregon, is deserving of your time and investment — because I don’t take your support, or anyone else’s, for granted. = But if you need more convincing, here are five reasons I am humbly asking for your support today: 1) Despite the extreme GOP majority in control of the House, I’ve worked hard to deliver real progress. In fact, I’m proud to be one of the only representatives — let alone first-term representatives — to pass a new law in this Congress. My legislation ensures that the Grand Ronde Tribe here in Oregon gets land compensation they are owed by the federal government. 2) I’m running proudly on my record of fighting for abortion rights. Here in Oregon, I helped pass one of the nation’s most comprehensive reproductive rights bills. And now that I’m in Congress, I’m fighting to codify Roe v. Wade protections into law — so that no woman, in any state, can be criminalized simply for making a personal health care decision that some politician somewhere doesn’t like. 3) I know what it’s like when you feel like your family just can’t get ahead. My dad immigrated to the U.S. from Mexico in 1950 and worked in the fields picking cotton and tomatoes before he was in first grade. He and my mom worked so hard, but when it was time for me to go to college, they didn’t have the money to afford both my education and their groceries. So I put myself through school instead. 4) Today, I’m working to make our economy fairer for families across our country who feel like they don’t have control over their own circumstances. That means fighting for affordable health care, putting hardworking families over big corporations, and delivering national paid family and medical leave. 5) National Republicans are determined to defeat me — and it took everything we had to fight them off last time around. This district is one of the most competitive in the whole country. Whichever party wins this seat is likely to win control of Congress, and it’s going to come down to just a handful of votes. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks for reading, and for any support you can offer, Andrea Salinas Congresswoman, OR-06 Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat this November and take back the House. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

subject: Josh Hawley wants you to spend $30 to read all his weird thoughts on “Manhood”

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: Will you support my friend, Curtis Hertel?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1563%2E135344%2EC5BAAa)

Friend --
I want you to meet my friend and the next Congressman from Michigan’s 7th District, Curtis Hertel.
I have known Curtis since I first began exploring first running for office in 2017, so take it from me, Curtis is the real deal. I’m confident that with him mid-Michigan will be in good hands. But I would never say that without showing the proof, so let me explain:
Curtis represented Lansing in the Michigan Senate and served as the Senate Minority Whip. Drawn to public service by the example of his grandfather, a World War II combat veteran, and his father, Curtis Hertel Sr., a former legislator who was respected and admired for his tenure as co-Speaker of the Michigan House at a time when the chamber was evenly split between Democrats and Republicans. Curtis' dad taught his kids that there is nothing we can’t accomplish when we work together.
As a state senator, he stood up against Republicans in Lansing trying to ban abortion and played a key role in repealing Michigan’s 1931 abortion ban. In Congress, he will always stand on the side of women and protect the right to choose.
After Curtis’ son, an MSU student, was barricaded on campus during the mass shooting last year, he helped lead the team that passed bipartisan common sense gun safety legislation here in Michigan, including red flag laws, safe storage laws, and extreme risk protection orders.
All this is to say that Curtis is a leader who will work with anyone to deliver for mid-Michigan, and has a proven track record of delivering for Michiganders.
But I know better than anyone that holding onto this seat won’t be easy: with your support, I won three razor-thin races in one of the most hotly contested -- and most expensive -- House districts in the country. This November, keeping MI-07 blue will be key to determining who controls the House, and right now election forecasters are calling it a “toss-up.”
[**I won my three House races because of grassroots support from folks like you, and I hope you’ll extend that same support to Curtis and ensure that the 7th Congressional District stays blue. Will you split a donation to my campaign and Curtis’?**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-hertel-june24.F733V1&refcode=em240622-2-t1&t=2&akid=1563%2E135344%2EC5BAAa)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Elissa Slotkin and Curtis Hertel:_

****

name: Neil Parrott
subject: Halfway Done- Can you help use finish?
body:
We are making fantastic progress, and we are about halfway done - can you help us finish? Tomorrow, Sunday, June 22, we need you, and possibly your | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us2.campaign-archive.com/?e=5a45ee1154&u=fac7efbc0801875f99034b204&id=898940131b)
---
| |
---
| All Hands on Deck! Part II

Peter,

We are making fantastic progress, and we are about halfway done - can you help us finish? Tomorrow, Sunday, June 23, we need you, and possibly your friends, too!

TWO LOCATIONS - Montgomery County and Washington County. If you were here today, it is the same place, Montgomery starting at 1 PM and Washington starting at 12 noon. Consider stopping by after church or after brunch! It might be too hot to be outside, but an air-conditioned spot is a perfect place to help with the campaign!

There will be air conditioning. There will be pizza. There will be good conversations.

If you can fold papers, stuff an envelope, or put a stamp on an envelope, you are qualified. “Folding Parties” are a great chance to talk with people while you work, to get to know other people who care about our country, and to work to help a common-sense, hard-working guy get into Congress to represent YOU!

If you have one hour to help or even seven, please do! Call 240-329-2660 to sign-up to help and to get details. We are out and not checking email, but we have someone answering the phone who would love to help get you to the right place.

We really need your help, so any time would be greatly appreciated. The “All Hands on Deck” call is real. Please invite your friends to join you!!

Hope to see you tomorrow!
The Parrott Campaign Team

name: Team Casey
subject: ALERT: Trump just attacked Bob by name
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
We can't let this go unanswered.
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3331%2E552475%2ENwPlzJ)
Peter, this is serious.
**_Donald Trump just attacked Bob Casey by name at a MAGA rally in Philadelphia saying that Pennsylvania “needs to defeat” Bob Casey._**
Together, they’re rallying their MAGA supporters in Pennsylvania to flip this battleground red.
[**We can’t let this attack go unanswered. Please, rush an emergency contribution right away to power our effort to keep PA, the Senate, and the White House blue.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240622-3?refcode=em20240622-3&refcode2=3331_552475_NwPlzJ&akid=3331%2E552475%2ENwPlzJ)
If Bob Casey loses, Democrats don’t stand a chance. Pennsylvania is the linchpin that will decide both the Senate _and_ the White House this November.
The stakes are higher than ever before. If we’re going to protect women’s rights, workers’ rights, and the fate of our democracy, we have to defend this battleground Senate race. With Wall Street billionaires spending millions in PA already, we urgently need your help to keep PA from flipping to MAGA Republicans.
[**Your contribution right now will go directly into our battleground campaign. With Donald Trump giving his “total support” and “total endorsement” to David McCormick, this couldn’t be a more crucial time to show that we have Bob Casey’s back -- so if you can, contribute before it’s too late.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240622-3?refcode=em20240622-3&refcode2=3331_552475_NwPlzJ&akid=3331%2E552475%2ENwPlzJ)
We appreciate everything you do.
Together,
Team Casey

**WE TOLD YOU** _Citizens United_ is already having a DANGEROUS impact on November’s elections: [ ]() **_WE TOLD YOU_** Bernie Sanders said, “It's time to overturn _Citizens United_.”

**_WE TOLD YOU_** we set a goal to raise $7,500 for our End _Citizens United_ Campaign to overturn the disastrous ruling.

**But, with just 16 hours left until our midnight deadline, we’re still $1,257 short of our goal. _NO!!!_**

[**We need you now more than ever – our very democracy is at stake! Chip in $7 (3X-MATCHED) to help support our work to end _Citizens United_ »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/45408?amount=7&t=7&akid=21598%2E4449941%2EO_fXl3) | [_*EMERGENCY 3X-MATCH ACTIVATED*_ : Chip in $7 before midnight to help us end _Citizens United_ and support our work »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/45408?amount=7&t=8&akid=21598%2E4449941%2EO_fXl3)

body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/Header.png]
I'm thrilled to announce the support of the Michigan Democratic Party's Progressive Caucus and its many volunteers.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
We have just eight days to hit our grassroots fundraising goal. It's the last full quarter before the primary election. Join the MDP's Progressive Caucus and chip in now to propel our people-powered movement to victory on August 6th and November 5th.
https://www.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://www.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
https://www.actblue.com/donate/about-bob [https://www.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
JOIN OUR FIGHT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Friends,
This is big! The Progressive Caucus's endorsement comes with many statewide volunteers, all passionate and eager to help Democrats like me expel MAGA extremism from our rural communities and bring power back to the people.
I'm grateful for their faith in our fight for the economic mobility of everyone, not just a select few.
Up North, we're focused on pragmatic progress — family-sustaining wages, affordable housing, childcare, education, and healthcare for all . Women's rights, LGBTQ+ protections, environmental sustainability and a labor revolution.
Progress is not just a dream; it's an eternal goal we're constantly achieving together.
Thank you for joining our fight. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
Forward, onward, and up!
-Bob
Bob Lorinser
Candidate for US Congress
Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula
Democrat, MI01
RUSH A CONTRIBUTION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/about-bob]
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92793/images/dbsignature.png]
Or, send a check to
Friends of Dr. Bob
PO BOX 936
Marquette, MI 49855
United States

I'm grateful for their faith in our fight for the economic mobility of everyone, not just a select few. Up North, we're focused on pragmatic progress — family-sustaining wages, affordable housing, childcare, education, and healthcare for all . Women's rights, LGBTQ+ protections, environmental sustainability and a labor revolution. Progress is not just a dream; it's an eternal goal we're constantly achieving together. Thank you for joining our fight. [] Forward, onward, and up! -Bob Bob Lorinser Candidate for US Congress Northern Michigan / Upper Peninsula Democrat, MI01 RUSH A CONTRIBUTION [] [] Or, send a check to Friends of Dr. Bob PO BOX 936 Marquette, MI 49855 United States Paid for by Friends of Dr. Bob

name: Diana
subject: re: I just selected you to represent Pennsylvania! –>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please don't delay
Hey team -- It's Diana, the Research Director here at the DSCC.

With the 2024 elections heating up and the battle for Senate control at a fever pitch, we need to stay on top of our strategy. That's why James Carville reached out and requested your input for an exclusive strategy interview.

**But he didn't get an answer from you -- and now he's 22 responses short of what he needed in Pennsylvania!**

[**We NEED enough top Democrats like you to participate in this strategy interview to drive us to victory, but the deadline to respond is midnight tonight. Please, will you take 3 minutes and help us WIN? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15393%2E9716520%2EDP8VGH)

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15393%2E9716520%2EDP8VGH)
---

_**NOTE: Please do not share this link with anyone, as it may corrupt our data**_

Thank you for being a crucial part of our team,

Diana, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: James Carville
Date: June 21, 2024
Subject: I selected you to represent Pennsylvania -
| | | Hey, it's James Carville and I'm real excited to hear from you.

I'm conducting a series of strategy interviews with the very best, most engaged Democrats, and I've selected _you_ to represent Pennsylvania -- **[so please, click here to get started right now:](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15393%2E9716520%2EDP8VGH)**

| | [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15393%2E9716520%2EDP8VGH)
---

I've been in politics a LONG time, and I'll be honest, **I don't think I've ever seen an election with more at stake than this one.** If we win, we'll continue to enact President Biden's agenda and work for ALL Americans. If we lose, **Senate Republicans will grind all progress to a halt -- and that will only be the beginning.**

All across the country, Republicans are taking away a woman's right to choose, trying to cut health care, restricting the right to vote, and burying their heads in the sand on climate change. **And if Democrats don't get fired the hell up, those same crazy Republicans will take control of the Senate this year.**

That's why I want to talk to you. I need to hear from _real voters like you_ \-- not more political types -- so I can help our best and brightest defend the Senate.

**I selected you specifically, so please, will you click here to begin your interview?** **[www.dscc.org/DemocraticInterviewJune/](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15393%2E9716520%2EDP8VGH)**

| [Start your interview](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15393%2E9716520%2EDP8VGH)
---

Thank you

\- James

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/17998?ask=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20240622-Diana-DianaCarvilleBump-Pros-sl1&akid=15393%2E9716520%2EDP8VGH)

subject: CNN issues a massive confession about Joe Biden’s reelection chances that has him scared straight
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | June 23, 2024

CNN issues a massive
confession about Joe Biden's reelection chances that has him
scared straight

Biden's poll numbers are looking abysmal right now. He
could very well be on his way to being just a one-term president.

And CNN issues a massive
confession about Joe Biden's reelection chances that has him
scared straight.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Congressional Democrats
on the verge of collapse after what the GOP just announced

The Left is looking
for momentum heading into the 2024 elections. But any hope of
that has been completely squashed.
➞ Continue Reading

Disturbing video of Joe
Biden unveils terrifying health crisis

At 81-years-old, the
president isn't getting any younger. His age has been a concern
for many voters in recent years.
➞ Continue Reading

President Biden goes
into hiding as part of this insane new scheme

Joe Biden's
reelection chances are looking grim. That's why his campaign has
come up with a plan to help turn the tide.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9m4j2g0bdu1hm9t60deq5fnldcmon5lehn1u90o_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6coj2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcmg59td8enohs6t8h2fpplkhi9tvh1eu7rrggj8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6coj2c9h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. name: Hillsdale College via American Action News
subject: C.S. Lewis's Profound Insights
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr5pjufojocl6tqgneo0hpfla0ektqltfm6nong0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj62p31c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpq27ik09gvurv1cn399u4l19isnrcrlsvd148og_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj62p31c1h2bs)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z76sdrp5cpi8m56ao3uf3pijk0hu3tvf1nohq6kg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj62p31c1h2bs),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs9r7dr3s54l58mk3oot13ukrrtfefridas591eo_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj62p31c1h2bs) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhicd3d1dp9tchtrjckkfgd9js3fpl0gsgfn8m80_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj62p31c1h2bs)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpruhgtgfhskhg4r6s3dtdd2fts74nfe4mlb04jg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj62p31c1h2bs) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

body:

name: Hillsdale College via Your America News
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics

This sponsored message from Your America is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs2b5gadmmhgle7fk5vc18i61pokvk92l4bhe320_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj66o75clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

That's why we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztabr7h5si5rn2tb2fcqccts2iee9du4ndpc3beg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj66o75clh2bs)" which you can now own on DVD.
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0errhl8jd0vr46g2rep5ofb88bs9odiqupbl06g_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj66o75clh2bs)
---
| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

Dr. Ward is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8c8t0de7d6nd2ruiv7vkb72j7c0a3jv4aa96590_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj66o75clh2bs).

Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8e4s5k62c4a3hhlhfsibc10kqskqgervqccrihg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj66o75clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq9ttle9q3bd9ieir38ct3mkrnctt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj4sdg61pj24no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9h7tqbjq11e3co3cfarvu7fu77j888q0q7gbct0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj66o75clh2bs)_

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: Thanking police officers
body:
I am so grateful for our police officers.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z04rdq2g0d5o6f1vmai4pf4bfsqabp2n4jb6pln8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)
---
Friend, **I am so grateful for our police officers. ** As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. **[Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing our ‘Back the Blue Petition’ and letting brave officers know that we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3254cfn2la2q2qls4uqifnn5q7rlvgo3ntq0bi0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvfh1npi1qh9oi4r0pia93u27gn19tott0hvlsro_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)
---
Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to “ _defund the police_.” I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That’s one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT — an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. **Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. ** **[To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please sign the national petition today.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh9pggnm66hejsqqir9drg6t3q4bbhsbt8io3a00_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5lknfik9g94nsof80n0pfn1e8kp4ppfqbb11ifg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6lsvrcgn6p9ftkrk504gk1po3dsngvme1u8e3ag_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)
---
_This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city’s police force._
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3kta6lt1epbckkvmbomin0pmkt4v4dc80fujpno_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)
---
_The first state chapter — BLEXIT North Carolina — paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT’s appreciation._
---
**[If you ‘Back the Blue’ — and believe that we must support local heroes — please sign the national petition right away.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi2aghoj44u8vjjjenj9b9693rl2mhrbi3608lg0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)** While the ‘defund the police’ crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them — polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We’ve been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals — those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. **We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. ** If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. **[Join me in letting our police officers know that you support law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our communities safe.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq54bg2p28ebf0ll4rm67nbb99k8ke92pvdf1gh8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo9ve0nmlck9pmee6p6on6hml7ne193rkhu9tpu0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)
---
Candace OwensChair of BLEXITPowered by Turning Point USA
---

American Action News

clean_body: I am so grateful for our police officers. | | | Friend, I am so grateful for our police officers. As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to “ defund the police.” I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That’s one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT — an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city’s police force. The first state chapter — BLEXIT North Carolina — paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT’s appreciation. While the ‘defund the police’ crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them — polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We’ve been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals — those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: Back the Blue
body:
I am so grateful for our police officers.

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhrivvus5iqtffismr6isrh5lki5qheceumvtpho_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)
---
Friend, **I am so grateful for our police officers. ** As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. **[Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing our ‘Back the Blue Petition’ and letting brave officers know that we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zj9i90mcph3elhpa55uik6f2peerdep9u2dep8u8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)**

---
Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to “ _defund the police_.” I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That’s one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT — an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. **Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. ** **[To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please sign the national petition today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg8c5do8ckrbb6onl24nr6l1e71hjd0dr52mclp8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)**

---
_This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city’s police force._

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2lq7gh1quo7anogvkgi5hpglh13qu30mqerp790_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)
---
_The first state chapter — BLEXIT North Carolina — paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT’s appreciation._
---
**[If you ‘Back the Blue’ — and believe that we must support local heroes — please sign the national petition right away.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfib7fe29a6k8akatl0v6toei1h4tdb9rn12ad60_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)** While the ‘defund the police’ crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them — polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We’ve been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals — those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. **We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. ** If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. **[Join me in letting our police officers know that you support law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our communities safe.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjv0cr9sd4jsk5nc8ljouj3fd0s7pehhl9o7q0po_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shj6epr6c9h2bs)**

name: Andrew Hughes
subject: Are you fed up with cancel culture?
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| |
---
| | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| Fellow Patriot,

Dr. Carson asked me to reach out to Americans who want what's best for our country, to help him take a stand against "cancel culture." It's tearing our country apart and needs to be stopped.

This is something he has experienced firsthand.

As you may have heard, this past November the Detroit School Board voted to change the name of the Benjamin Carson High School of Science and Medicine. Why? Because the School Board was mad that Dr. Carson was part of the Trump Administration!

These educational leaders - who should be acting as role models for our kids - instead decided to create a huge political spectacle by "canceling" Dr. Carson and trying to erase his amazing achievements as a doctor, as a leader, and as a citizen. It's really outrageous.

Dr. Carson is disappointed by this - not because he wants any glory but because it sets a bad example ... for the kids at this school, and for the entire country.

"Cancel culture" tells young people and all Americans that you shouldn't listen to those with whom you disagree and try to find common ground; you should just stigmatize them and erase them.

The Left probably expected Dr. Carson to lash out at the Detroit School Board and his political opponents - hurl some insults, call people names, keep the fight going.

But instead, Dr. Carson said to our team here at the American Cornerstone Institute (ACI):

_" What if we use this as an opportunity to rally people across the country to speak out against cancel culture? To show America that we have a better path forward for our country than hate and division?"_

And that's exactly what we're doing. It's why Dr. Carson launched ACI in the first place - to lead the way for what's best for our country.

And we've created a way for you to stand with Dr. Carson and make your voice heard. Just click the link below; it will take you to our **National Statement Against Cancel Culture** that you can review and then co-sign.

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://trk.freedomfirstproject._diyC2uQ8wZ6Z3bA)

Dr. Carson is getting asked about the Detroit school incident quite a bit, and when he answers he wants to speak for Americans who are heartbroken by what cancel culture is doing to our country - who want this divisiveness and vitriol to end! I think you're just such an American.

And when you and thousands of concerned citizens like you sign this Statement, Dr. Carson will be able to keep speaking from the heart against cancel culture - knowing that he's broadcasting a message that is important to his fellow Americans.

He can say ... "Enough is enough! I'm fed up with cancel culture, and so are folks everywhere who love America and want what's best for the country."

If that's a message you want Dr. Carson to share on your behalf, please take a moment now to be part of ACI's **National Statement Against Cancel Culture**. Here's the link again for you:

[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/cancel-culture-pledge](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)

Amid all the divisiveness and polarization that has been injected into our policy debates, Dr. Carson is proud of the work ACI is doing to encourage Americans to come together despite our differences and find ways to take on the challenges that face our country.

I hope you'll join Dr. Carson in this important work. Thank you!

Sincerely,

Andrew D. Hughes
Executive Director & CEO
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Have your morning cup of coffee with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
People don’t want to admit this, but it’s true.

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* |
---
| | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z7b8jk0gll7s0s7h82msfibavritn3rgu8pcvmag_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shgm0ob2cph2bs)
Friend,

Good morning to you and everyone... except for the enemies of America who wish to destroy our civilization.

People don’t want to admit this, but it’s true.

The greatest threats to our rights come from within our country - yes, I’m talking about our government.
* The Department of Justice and local jurisdictions are using lawfare to go after American Patriots.
* Biden continues to allow the border crisis to threaten our national security.
* D.C. Uniparty politicians are selling out America both financially and culturally.

**Enemies within the government who want to see America fail.**

But don't worry. We are turning this around.

How do we do this?

Turning Point PAC is funding ballot chasers in key swing states to win back the White House in 2024.

[I set an Independence Day fundraising goal of $250,000 with a midnight deadline on July 4th. I am asking ALL patriots to donate any amount they can and help us fund ballot chasers in key swing states to win back the White House. Can I count on your help?](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3lq5cv5b914i681srie5paruvndtk23jlh2i5bg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shgm0ob2cph2bs)

[Donate $20.24](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8n27h0ob8nendou4c32k54a8sdgs65p0gbmro98_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shgm0ob2cph2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zd5pq0qsuid7ukqi5kg0t4mjgqov45c8kgaou1hg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shgm0ob2cph2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z8qmk5kntrbm80902j9k4prfrctdtbki65nrgcfg_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shgm0ob2cph2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z9fnb2uva5817fkg925281c1slu090t1v95ph9q0_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shgm0ob2cph2bs)

[Donate $500](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z18qhu07j0b50e1kfevicesd7n62th7jubp1bs68_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shgm0ob2cph2bs)

[Donate $1,000](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsk43v173uu7m7ahbkkeudgfdukb45v1grrb60ig_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shgm0ob2cph2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbfgqigvkpm93us3ohamg2l0qddgoiaimtp7sci8_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shgm0ob2cph2bs)
**What is ballot chasing?**

Ballot chasing is a new way to contact voters who have already received mail-in ballots to encourage them to mark their ballots and plan to vote. This initiative will fund hundreds of door-knockers who will win the ballot game at the mailboxes.

_The Radical Left is beating us in the ballot game_. They have strategically concentrated their efforts on key states, massively expanding their ballot-chasing operations in critical battlegrounds.

**Turning Point PAC operates with a level of intensity, urgency, and effectiveness that no other PAC (Democrat or Republican) has been able to achieve in a few years!**

We are the driving force behind the red and faith-based wave of our great nation. Now, we are funding America’s ballot-chasing army.

It’s time for us to fight back and win back America. [Take action by donating ANY amount here >>>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zseaa71njpd7ohu9p06f8u7tvk068dg6kcgr40ao_rp22sh2s8i6ep34shgm0ob2cph2bs)
For Freedom,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Who rules whom?
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsoyOpAWNH

What do you think of the Electoral College?

Hillsdale College has selected you to participate in its
National Referendum on the Administrative State.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osoyOpAWNH

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Fellow American,

Hillsdale College has selected you to
participate in its National Referendum on the Administrative
State.

Responding will only take a few
minutes. Your input as an informed patriot is needed right
away…because our country is facing a constitutional
crisis.

It's a crisis that involves a
fundamental political question: who rules whom?

The Constitution established a limited
government in which the people ruled through their elected
officials. Under this form of government, America became the
freest and most prosperous nation in history.

Today, however, our constitutional
system is one that increasingly exists in name only.

The Constitution of "We the People" is
being replaced by an elite, out-of-touch, and unaccountable
administrative state that rules without the consent of American
citizens.

This means we live in an era of growing
bureaucratic despotism, manifested in an administrative state
that bypasses the Constitution, rejects the separation of powers,
and replaces the rule of law with regulations.

But we can't just TALK about the
problem. We also have to TAKE ACTION-to DO SOMETHING about it,
while there's still time to save our country.

That is why I'm writing to you today.

Hillsdale College is committed to
returning to the Constitution of "We the People"-before it's too
late.

To do that, I need your input. What are
your opinions on this topic-knowing that we can propose SOLUTIONS
that will restore liberty?

Please let me know your thoughts today
by answering the National Referendum on the Administrative State
using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63316733:soyOpAWNH:m:3:2532013465:E2AEAB6F841C5D0935573F84D1320909:r

When you send in your survey, I hope
you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a
tax-deductible gift.

The rise of the administrative state is
a grave threat to our country.

To counter this threat, Hillsdale
sponsors several educational outreach efforts-including Imprimis,
free online courses, programs on our Washington, D.C., campus,
and a growing network of classical K-12 schools and
homeschoolers-to teach citizens about the meaning of the
Constitution and the importance of our founding principles of
liberty.

Your gift of at least $15-or even $25,
$35, $50, $100, or more if you're especially motivated to TAKE
ACTION-will help us to expand these educational initiatives that
are reaching and teaching millions.

Your support of these efforts is
essential because Hillsdale refuses to take ONE PENNY of
government funding.

So please complete your National
Referendum on the Administrative State and consider giving your
most generous tax-deductible contribution.

Thank you for being on the side of the
Constitution and liberty!

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty
Since 1844

P.S. I look forward to receiving your
opinions about what's happening in our nation. And I hope that
you can support our work.

So please complete the National
Referendum on the Administrative State using this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63316733:soyOpAWNH:m:3:2532013465:E2AEAB6F841C5D0935573F84D1320909:r

As soon as you respond, we will begin
your FREE lifetime subscription to Imprimis, Hillsdale's digest
of liberty that you will receive via email ten times a year. If
you'd like, you can also sign up to receive the publication
through postal mail.

Educating millions about the
Constitution to counter the threat from the administrative state
is a monumental task. That's why when you complete your survey, I
hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a
tax-deductible gift.

Thank you for your time and
attention-and for your commitment to liberty.

Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI
49242 USA

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system January 18, 2022.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/isoyOpAWNH

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osoyOpAWNH

Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Republicans come to blows with Donald Trump over this running mate decision
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | June 23, 2024

Republicans come to
blows with Donald Trump over this running mate decision

The former president is set to publicly announce his pick
for VP soon. But as of now, only true insiders know who Trump is
leaning towards.

And Republicans have come to
blows with Donald Trump over this running mate decision.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

CNN issues a massive
confession about Joe Biden's reelection chances that has him
scared straight

Biden's poll numbers
are looking abysmal right now. He could very well be on his way
to being just a one-term president.
➞ Continue Reading

Congressional Democrats
on the verge of collapse after what the GOP just announced

The Left is looking
for momentum heading into the 2024 elections. But any hope of
that has been completely squashed.
➞ Continue Reading

Disturbing video of Joe
Biden unveils terrifying health crisis

At 81-years-old, the
president isn't getting any younger. His age has been a concern
for many voters in recent years.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Hillsdale College via Restore Our Nation
subject: Access “C.S.Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Restore Our Nation is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/915XYY0b0DS_h5wp0fBYqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWnqGP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDYyM1cDc3BjQgpmdSThd2Z23H8mUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/915XYY0b0DS_h5wp0fBYqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWnqGP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDYyM1cDc3BjQgpmdSThd2Z23H8mUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/915XYY0b0DS_h5wp0fBYqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWnqGP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDYyM1cDc3BjQgpmdSThd2Z23H8mUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/915XYY0b0DS_h5wp0fBYqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWnqGP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDYyM1cDc3BjQgpmdSThd2Z23H8mUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/915XYY0b0DS_h5wp0fBYqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWnqGP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDYyM1cDc3BjQgpmdSThd2Z23H8mUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/915XYY0b0DS_h5wp0fBYqw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWnqGP0TQaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLVJPTi0yMDI0MDYyM1cDc3BjQgpmdSThd2Z23H8mUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Broadcast
subject: Access “C.S.Lewis on Christianity”
body:
C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history.

This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4SV-BLTPDoHQcHFe9x1x6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWoS4P0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjQwNjIzVwNzcGNCCmZ1qOt3ZjoEAYhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4SV-BLTPDoHQcHFe9x1x6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWoS4P0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjQwNjIzVwNzcGNCCmZ1qOt3ZjoEAYhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4SV-BLTPDoHQcHFe9x1x6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWoS4P0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjQwNjIzVwNzcGNCCmZ1qOt3ZjoEAYhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4SV-BLTPDoHQcHFe9x1x6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWoS4P0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjQwNjIzVwNzcGNCCmZ1qOt3ZjoEAYhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4SV-BLTPDoHQcHFe9x1x6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWoS4P0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjQwNjIzVwNzcGNCCmZ1qOt3ZjoEAYhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/4SV-BLTPDoHQcHFe9x1x6g~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWoS4P0TPaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmVkLmhpbGxzZGFsZS5lZHUvaGlsbHNkYWxlL2JlLXRoZS1maXJzdC10by1nZXQtaGlsbHNkYWxlcy1uZXctYy1zLWxld2lzLWR2ZC1zZXQ_c2M9MDA0NjROMDI0MkwxNURPREVFUyZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWNzbGV3aXNfZHZkJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PVBBLUNCLTIwMjQwNjIzVwNzcGNCCmZ1qOt3ZjoEAYhSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: These diaper brands are pro-abortion
body:
Did you know that America’s most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion?

| [ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_p_G7KweDWtHSnnHrBzVag~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWoUwP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLmxpdmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnL3NlbmQtYS1ib3gtb2YtZGlhcGVycy10by1hLW1vbS1pbi1uZWVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRpYXBlcl9wYWNrX2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lbTJfQUUtUk9ONTA1ODdXA3NwY0IKZnWt63dmAq8FwVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
#
Friend of Life,

Did you know that America's most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion?

This is peak irony. Brands that provide a necessity for babies also financially and/or publicly support an act that intentionally kills innocent children in the womb.

As pro-life people, we can do something to put a stop to this.

**Live Action is hosting a diaper drive with EveryLife -- the first pro-life diaper company -- to help mothers and their babies in need.**

If you're tired of supporting brands that don't align with your pro-life values, you can do something now to help women AND support a pro-life business.

**Your gift of just $50 will provide six packs of EveryLife diapers to a mom who is considering abortion or is facing a crisis and help her embrace life. We are searching for 100 people who can give before midnight so we can get diapers to local pro-life pregnancy centers nationwide. **
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_p_G7KweDWtHSnnHrBzVag~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWoUwP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLmxpdmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnL3NlbmQtYS1ib3gtb2YtZGlhcGVycy10by1hLW1vbS1pbi1uZWVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRpYXBlcl9wYWNrX2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lbTJfQUUtUk9ONTA1ODdXA3NwY0IKZnWt63dmAq8FwVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Is this something you can do? Here's your secure link to give: **[https://give.liveaction.org/send-a-box-of-diapers-to-a-mom-in-need/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_p_G7KweDWtHSnnHrBzVag~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWoUwP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLmxpdmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnL3NlbmQtYS1ib3gtb2YtZGlhcGVycy10by1hLW1vbS1pbi1uZWVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRpYXBlcl9wYWNrX2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lbTJfQUUtUk9ONTA1ODdXA3NwY0IKZnWt63dmAq8FwVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

EveryLife prides itself in being a pro-life company that uses premium materials for their diapers-- and better yet, EveryLife promotes the message that every baby is a miracle from God who deserves to be loved, protected, and supported.

Your gift will send a box of diapers to a local pro-life pregnancy clinic so that moms days away from a potentially life-ending decision can receive the practical support they need to choose life.

There's only a few hours to go and we haven't been able to reach our goal of 100 partners before midnight. Please consider **[donating right now before this opportunity expires.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_p_G7KweDWtHSnnHrBzVag~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWoUwP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLmxpdmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnL3NlbmQtYS1ib3gtb2YtZGlhcGVycy10by1hLW1vbS1pbi1uZWVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRpYXBlcl9wYWNrX2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lbTJfQUUtUk9ONTA1ODdXA3NwY0IKZnWt63dmAq8FwVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Thank you in advance for standing with us against big abortion and equipping moms to choose life.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/_p_G7KweDWtHSnnHrBzVag~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWoUwP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLmxpdmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnL3NlbmQtYS1ib3gtb2YtZGlhcGVycy10by1hLW1vbS1pbi1uZWVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRpYXBlcl9wYWNrX2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lbTJfQUUtUk9ONTA1ODdXA3NwY0IKZnWt63dmAq8FwVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

clean_body: Did you know that America’s most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion? | ~ Friend of Life, Did you know that America's most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion? This is peak irony. Brands that provide a necessity for babies also financially and/or publicly support an act that intentionally kills innocent children in the womb. As pro-life people, we can do something to put a stop to this. Live Action is hosting a diaper drive with EveryLife -- the first pro-life diaper company -- to help mothers and their babies in need. If you're tired of supporting brands that don't align with your pro-life values, you can do something now to help women AND support a pro-life business. Your gift of just $50 will provide six packs of EveryLife diapers to a mom who is considering abortion or is facing a crisis and help her embrace life. We are searching for 100 people who can give before midnight so we can get diapers to local pro-life pregnancy centers nationwide. ~ Is this something you can do? Here's your secure link to give: ~ EveryLife prides itself in being a pro-life company that uses premium materials for their diapers-- and better yet, EveryLife promotes the message that every baby is a miracle from God who deserves to be loved, protected, and supported. Your gift will send a box of diapers to a local pro-life pregnancy clinic so that moms days away from a potentially life-ending decision can receive the practical support they need to choose life. There's only a few hours to go and we haven't been able to reach our goal of 100 partners before midnight. Please consider ~ Thank you in advance for standing with us against big abortion and equipping moms to choose life. For Life, Lila Rose President and Founder ~ 2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201 Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | ~~_
