body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author — C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Freedom Liberty Report is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkT1vpDAQhn-N6Yz8tRgKikiEKsmd7oorkfHMgiVjkD3s6v79aXNJ-pQzj_SO3mf-vE6vLsSQlje3YX-NecplSm5aQ-QJ79yvORTicINJCWW4aLjSk6ygF7IDYyrspZWd1G0jdbX2sxZd67UFAd4Zh0LAxRnbtm3ntZW2Cv0jRzRKi840oqu1t_JiYO6UbYRVhhnhImaqrxkR9s0liGHGTH8zHnum2u9bFfuV6ChMPzE1MjUW9GdGqNcQYwEXsUY4mRq_ZqbGGTmtyK8hF-K08wWJf_Hyvy0vPOI9lEdhXpCYHotnehDCNOZNKKNe5GX4MTw__2aqOWmbyn5mj0wPR97LgZ5CWj7QhhDOjekBNxfix9K77XBhSUwPvrzfmuAGn3BPhImYHn4-8fHlF_90VeUejnuIMZTGMiOWR-K7CfrG0269-hcAAP__TpygrQ) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I’m writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News_ because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty—like our free online courses. __ And though we’re best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author—C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **“[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkT1vpDAQhn-N6Yz8tRgKikiEKsmd7oorkfHMgiVjkD3s6v79aXNJ-pQzj_SO3mf-vE6vLsSQlje3YX-NecplSm5aQ-QJ79yvORTicINJCWW4aLjSk6ygF7IDYyrspZWd1G0jdbX2sxZd67UFAd4Zh0LAxRnbtm3ntZW2Cv0jRzRKi840oqu1t_JiYO6UbYRVhhnhImaqrxkR9s0liGHGTH8zHnum2u9bFfuV6ChMPzE1MjUW9GdGqNcQYwEXsUY4mRq_ZqbGGTmtyK8hF-K08wWJf_Hyvy0vPOI9lEdhXpCYHotnehDCNOZNKKNe5GX4MTw__2aqOWmbyn5mj0wPR97LgZ5CWj7QhhDOjekBNxfix9K77XBhSUwPvrzfmuAGn3BPhImYHn4-8fHlF_90VeUejnuIMZTGMiOWR-K7CfrG0269-hcAAP__TpygrQ)” **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That’s why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkT1vpDAQhn-N6Yz8tRgKikiEKsmd7oorkfHMgiVjkD3s6v79aXNJ-pQzj_SO3mf-vE6vLsSQlje3YX-NecplSm5aQ-QJ79yvORTicINJCWW4aLjSk6ygF7IDYyrspZWd1G0jdbX2sxZd67UFAd4Zh0LAxRnbtm3ntZW2Cv0jRzRKi840oqu1t_JiYO6UbYRVhhnhImaqrxkR9s0liGHGTH8zHnum2u9bFfuV6ChMPzE1MjUW9GdGqNcQYwEXsUY4mRq_ZqbGGTmtyK8hF-K08wWJf_Hyvy0vPOI9lEdhXpCYHotnehDCNOZNKKNe5GX4MTw__2aqOWmbyn5mj0wPR97LgZ5CWj7QhhDOjekBNxfix9K77XBhSUwPvrzfmuAGn3BPhImYHn4-8fHlF_90VeUejnuIMZTGMiOWR-K7CfrG0269-hcAAP__TpygrQ),” **we’ve received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis’ writings. [](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkT1vpDAQhn-N6Yz8tRgKikiEKsmd7oorkfHMgiVjkD3s6v79aXNJ-pQzj_SO3mf-vE6vLsSQlje3YX-NecplSm5aQ-QJ79yvORTicINJCWW4aLjSk6ygF7IDYyrspZWd1G0jdbX2sxZd67UFAd4Zh0LAxRnbtm3ntZW2Cv0jRzRKi840oqu1t_JiYO6UbYRVhhnhImaqrxkR9s0liGHGTH8zHnum2u9bFfuV6ChMPzE1MjUW9GdGqNcQYwEXsUY4mRq_ZqbGGTmtyK8hF-K08wWJf_Hyvy0vPOI9lEdhXpCYHotnehDCNOZNKKNe5GX4MTw__2aqOWmbyn5mj0wPR97LgZ5CWj7QhhDOjekBNxfix9K77XBhSUwPvrzfmuAGn3BPhImYHn4-8fHlF_90VeUejnuIMZTGMiOWR-K7CfrG0269-hcAAP__TpygrQ) We’ve also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I’m pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **“[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkT1vpDAQhn-N6Yz8tRgKikiEKsmd7oorkfHMgiVjkD3s6v79aXNJ-pQzj_SO3mf-vE6vLsSQlje3YX-NecplSm5aQ-QJ79yvORTicINJCWW4aLjSk6ygF7IDYyrspZWd1G0jdbX2sxZd67UFAd4Zh0LAxRnbtm3ntZW2Cv0jRzRKi840oqu1t_JiYO6UbYRVhhnhImaqrxkR9s0liGHGTH8zHnum2u9bFfuV6ChMPzE1MjUW9GdGqNcQYwEXsUY4mRq_ZqbGGTmtyK8hF-K08wWJf_Hyvy0vPOI9lEdhXpCYHotnehDCNOZNKKNe5GX4MTw__2aqOWmbyn5mj0wPR97LgZ5CWj7QhhDOjekBNxfix9K77XBhSUwPvrzfmuAGn3BPhImYHn4-8fHlF_90VeUejnuIMZTGMiOWR-K7CfrG0269-hcAAP__TpygrQ)”** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won’t last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://email.alert.freedomandlibertyreport.com/c/eJyUkT1vpDAQhn-N6Yz8tRgKikiEKsmd7oorkfHMgiVjkD3s6v79aXNJ-pQzj_SO3mf-vE6vLsSQlje3YX-NecplSm5aQ-QJ79yvORTicINJCWW4aLjSk6ygF7IDYyrspZWd1G0jdbX2sxZd67UFAd4Zh0LAxRnbtm3ntZW2Cv0jRzRKi840oqu1t_JiYO6UbYRVhhnhImaqrxkR9s0liGHGTH8zHnum2u9bFfuV6ChMPzE1MjUW9GdGqNcQYwEXsUY4mRq_ZqbGGTmtyK8hF-K08wWJf_Hyvy0vPOI9lEdhXpCYHotnehDCNOZNKKNe5GX4MTw__2aqOWmbyn5mj0wPR97LgZ5CWj7QhhDOjekBNxfix9K77XBhSUwPvrzfmuAGn3BPhImYHn4-8fHlF_90VeUejnuIMZTGMiOWR-K7CfrG0269-hcAAP__TpygrQ) Warm regards, Bill Gray, ‘01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

name: Candace Owens, BLEXIT
subject: I support law and order. Do you?
body:
I am so grateful for our police officers.

| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a9827c4be0d94ab5a8cd0155624bc791&_e=LqLvtZQn2-RQ3RljWQYkX0WkWnoURgCoQofukQM9w-zscezMsXebZAHk4wtnJBZpD6ob_KlzepTDvQX0CK6LDjljQUuBMK6N7r0O9WzlJ4sbc_Cp6_eGzWVFQyhUN8RxaiCEr0d4_XD11xrBpPj70NVeWu49g9xN_4LIQICX9MqV31IRlrhHKf8vPULTKU8JDuOwclATp9UxfhJwxc6STpksOsz_uZEeMo2ZYuPj6aouq5EWZjCF_EAjjLzvSrkCAmZeIqfwokGg1RSwqMc4Xunt9VB8ZxMI9gUP-cnTv8I%3D)
---
Friend, **I am so grateful for our police officers. ** As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. **[Please join me in thanking uniformed men and women by signing our'Back the Blue Petition' and letting brave officers know that we are grateful for their service and sacrifice.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a9827c4be0d94ab5a8cd0155624bc791&_e=LqLvtZQn2-RQ3RljWQYkX0WkWnoURgCoQofukQM9w-zscezMsXebZAHk4wtnJBZpD6ob_KlzepTDvQX0CK6LDjljQUuBMK6N7r0O9WzlJ4sbc_Cp6_eGzWVFQyhUN8RxaiCEr0d4_XD11xrBpPj70NqxwqXjYECoSufM4XRnYtZaSh86w1acGcbshUbgJgEh8vMk1Zg73jF2XCDXdGngoS9qi359JQCCmx_Ig68ADmpfyk-upq94DtrQOqi6r6-OVah7BVGLBIvR_KX7JR6Gmal2-2NN2H2sjArgHtpkt8U%3D)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a9827c4be0d94ab5a8cd0155624bc791&_e=LqLvtZQn2-RQ3RljWQYkX0WkWnoURgCoQofukQM9w-zscezMsXebZAHk4wtnJBZpD6ob_KlzepTDvQX0CK6LDjljQUuBMK6N7r0O9WzlJ4sbc_Cp6_eGzWVFQyhUN8RxaiCEr0d4_XD11xrBpPj70GngUMRtrRqP4aNcDO8qVY0CrIEQCBQCiel1opGb8pNYwKucFQ3kLG3vd9Yp9COkSX-BBXd-VY6woVtGVfMSKojtL4oJ-3jWsDqZKd61FV_6zAl2gM8yVpTe230EoyncLy_5OPtLx7IKJCQKbaZzRMY%3D)
---
Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "_defund the police_." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT -- an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. **Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. ** **[To join these chapters and stand with police officers, please sign the national petition today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a9827c4be0d94ab5a8cd0155624bc791&_e=LqLvtZQn2-RQ3RljWQYkX0WkWnoURgCoQofukQM9w-zscezMsXebZAHk4wtnJBZpD6ob_KlzepTDvQX0CK6LDjljQUuBMK6N7r0O9WzlJ4sbc_Cp6_eGzWVFQyhUN8RxaiCEr0d4_XD11xrBpPj70O22l4wOZuUG1yWRFOY0oLyYo8_m_hTet_-hbtFulemswY6BSFU5ELpuzsJsgb5-ZbFoxWhpzXYmoJD1EQZwrmeylb4LXcrSX-vmIdIxDo5sum7jOeqEdI483ufC6Szkh2dre3DvGM_y8UMsTDZpjuM%3D)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a9827c4be0d94ab5a8cd0155624bc791&_e=LqLvtZQn2-RQ3RljWQYkX0WkWnoURgCoQofukQM9w-zscezMsXebZAHk4wtnJBZpD6ob_KlzepTDvQX0CK6LDjljQUuBMK6N7r0O9WzlJ4sbc_Cp6_eGzWVFQyhUN8RxaiCEr0d4_XD11xrBpPj70G-4NSzjuIoeCsMln9-s_SfZbfvYeE17E3Hl3OXPjrTEGNfjYpQsYSLPBfsXFS1b44JFO_iFkuDlzMSiAGJ1ssa0vAIZTfZ7Z_yDdA-nIqn1MsoboXVWM7ZEdBl9Arw0MacxGwKKx_F01N3CnsYpA1Y%3D)
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a9827c4be0d94ab5a8cd0155624bc791&_e=LqLvtZQn2-RQ3RljWQYkX0WkWnoURgCoQofukQM9w-zscezMsXebZAHk4wtnJBZpD6ob_KlzepTDvQX0CK6LDjljQUuBMK6N7r0O9WzlJ4sbc_Cp6_eGzWVFQyhUN8RxaiCEr0d4_XD11xrBpPj70G_k35T2awjDEbTiFsRzBraHkJ6thqZonhRjWkWUTS7Nv4vGn3mfXKF46FT_IYRBambSpKIDH2Ecuc57GZezxRIOQHUFXN1kY1ubHbN-0vqo8elqSyoMGgb6PKJInA4P6N3mkeQloKKuyNUwSSC2KvA%3D)
---
_This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city 's police force._
---
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a9827c4be0d94ab5a8cd0155624bc791&_e=LqLvtZQn2-RQ3RljWQYkX0WkWnoURgCoQofukQM9w-zscezMsXebZAHk4wtnJBZpD6ob_KlzepTDvQX0CK6LDjljQUuBMK6N7r0O9WzlJ4sbc_Cp6_eGzWVFQyhUN8RxaiCEr0d4_XD11xrBpPj70FpACzoYxnJy5L1_ENcZMLMBYSrVAFhd5pw0LM9C1nv5nw5EAIUC0sKQfihx8CXqIqvr2pYdTL1g2AhFohj8aZMLZC5rplrZmUB7B6073w9Pb2x0a-YZ5nZstBVZuUMcf5pQ-tAhQYdVYZ2FoXufcUM%3D)
---
_The first state chapter -- BLEXIT North Carolina -- paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation._
---
**[If you'Back the Blue' -- and believe that we must support local heroes -- please sign the national petition right away.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a9827c4be0d94ab5a8cd0155624bc791&_e=LqLvtZQn2-RQ3RljWQYkX0WkWnoURgCoQofukQM9w-zscezMsXebZAHk4wtnJBZpD6ob_KlzepTDvQX0CK6LDjljQUuBMK6N7r0O9WzlJ4sbc_Cp6_eGzWVFQyhUN8RxaiCEr0d4_XD11xrBpPj70Ovs9IANd4IwD2ltjjhXEzKs7YKlmpl99wtjzApJyoCkUlQdpBVZGGggKceGTcHpZH--K7szEAYLYq9_PGpW_yB8gHqJEW69jGAPK5PhG3lgitkkjQEP2PjTHgiO4YW5vrdNzepXc40Jq1zCyJTcd0A%3D)** While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them -- polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals -- those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. **We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. ** If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. **[Join me in letting our police officers know that you support law and order, justice, and their valiant efforts to keep our communities safe.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a9827c4be0d94ab5a8cd0155624bc791&_e=LqLvtZQn2-RQ3RljWQYkX0WkWnoURgCoQofukQM9w-zscezMsXebZAHk4wtnJBZpD6ob_KlzepTDvQX0CK6LDjljQUuBMK6N7r0O9WzlJ4sbc_Cp6_eGzWVFQyhUN8RxaiCEr0d4_XD11xrBpPj70DKLYxgBNOLd9v7WkSScInBHaoHLYK7Jq8kSsAr31KjCBmti5gqYDyp0w5zoiMWeAf1oFFNOdoyNF6ERi8ak0XnmjC87fyS72_40JLVMWXGsq_PlcTFPCvtW-9BbOWYbSXlZJspIVtLqzfh_Dy6ECo4%3D)**
---
[**Sign the 'Back the Blue Petition'**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a9827c4be0d94ab5a8cd0155624bc791&_e=LqLvtZQn2-RQ3RljWQYkX0WkWnoURgCoQofukQM9w-zscezMsXebZAHk4wtnJBZpD6ob_KlzepTDvQX0CK6LDjljQUuBMK6N7r0O9WzlJ4sbc_Cp6_eGzWVFQyhUN8RxaiCEr0d4_XD11xrBpPj70Lh8gdE3SIYYyNOm6Qh04w0WRkc5FMc14OSB-hzftH8q-xfseZ78ingTUosJL0SX8tDS7ubVC9Ps2Xw26-xARwEjV7bfhUunDFyHbr1RwVJNC-yVHAAsNRFlXgDJQVxQVHZsLXxLb4XMrq56gmOZmnY%3D)

clean_body: I am so grateful for our police officers. | | | Friend, I am so grateful for our police officers. As an American who believes in law and order, truth, and justice, I have always stood with the public servants who protect our communities. Unfortunately, a few years ago, radicals began propelling criminals into heroes overnight and campaigning to "defund the police." I refuse to accept that we must cater to the bottom denominator of our society and that the black community must fight and scream and demand support for the people in our community who are up to no good. That's one of the reasons I founded BLEXIT -- an organization focused on shifting the culture in Black America as well as educating and uplifting minorities through educational programs and acts of community service. Around the nation, our BLEXIT chapters have supported local officers, while so many others have turned their backs on those who serve our communities. This summer, BLEXIT Maryland spent the day giving back to the Baltimore Police Department and learned some history about the city 's police force. The first state chapter -- BLEXIT North Carolina -- paid a visit to local officers in July. Our State Director showered them with thank-you notes and delicious food as a token of BLEXIT's appreciation. While the 'defund the police' crowd wants us to think minorities stand with them -- polls show that the vast majority of black voters (more than 80%) want police funding to stay the same or even increase. We've been sold a lot of lies by anti-police radicals -- those lies have been a detriment to Black American culture, the country as a whole, and the police officers who fight for justice every day. We must stop the deception that is harming urban communities and demeaning police around the nation. If you are an American, no matter what color you are, you should want law and you should want order. That is the way forward. Candace Owens Chair of BLEXIT Powered by Turning Point USA Reclaiming American Freedom PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522

name: Health and Wellness Insider
subject: Your Brain Cuts Off Your Hearing When You Lack This Mineral
body:

| verb | 1\. Speak at length. 2\. (Archaic) Sum up and conclude a speech.

| |

| [](https://track.worddaily.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sfj2hx&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | | "He could perorate about his knowledge of World War II for hours."

Latin, early 17th century
| |

The word "perorate" contains an important clue about its definition — the word "orate," which means "to make a speech, especially pompously or at length." "To perorate" is to drag your oration out for longer than necessary. ...

body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College

name: Hillsdale College via Defend the Constitution
subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8d04a224d5746538832fab06aba9637&_e=y3MapzRP9cWd-b5tOeRdR0xR57CR-bSXgaZIXJxxs-d_bnGO3wy87igAXSDKh2n34DIHc-p-pfUXZSKFxqs1QD8SSLlO-jyiDTK9OIGp1rm5JLxVATl8O2z2bvfT8wLsSxyZ9wymNe_aeRRYmfyaGc8kYzjFYETZWObHI0ZGYhWTfLeNn7xcxqpE0qPk0bMJdYAqY5trot-I80WnVvornui5-fBUitmExsOagrEkdd5coEIVbev8V5S6NNAokLmNsmA4OS8T3IYk-6MElrkXPVu2u85gyJVozGarPqwTXOaQL9Egix9ezV0ERMWR1UwVFjjO5ztb68ShJLOwSnevNkHadb7XfFW4B4lltto7wuvPU5LVHso_MNyr88JiHfSXRJmWz0-sdu_hRN4H0WGJ5nEjX-TO0qeDqTTgTGtgrbXmOmALyJegWyqEnalaPo5X) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8d04a224d5746538832fab06aba9637&_e=y3MapzRP9cWd-b5tOeRdR0xR57CR-bSXgaZIXJxxs-d_bnGO3wy87igAXSDKh2n34DIHc-p-pfUXZSKFxqs1QD8SSLlO-jyiDTK9OIGp1rm5JLxVATl8O2z2bvfT8wLsSxyZ9wymNe_aeRRYmfyaGc8kYzjFYETZWObHI0ZGYhWTfLeNn7xcxqpE0qPk0bMJdYAqY5trot-I80WnVvornui5-fBUitmExsOagrEkdd5coEIVbev8V5S6NNAokLmNsmA4OS8T3IYk-6MElrkXPVu2u85gyJVozGarPqwTXOYzW1O2-l2nc8BFmDkC-49S3HzCoaXino15bIYz9BVJo30QmGOdgst7o8WACpC8rhTpz3InEpxMCQ-jODO5nd3ATVY1aRFwt4ZeiDf5ZB_W7acb76x9XLaj79hnIxl863AO0OSr8qtkAF6wFjW0n92W)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8d04a224d5746538832fab06aba9637&_e=y3MapzRP9cWd-b5tOeRdR0xR57CR-bSXgaZIXJxxs-d_bnGO3wy87igAXSDKh2n34DIHc-p-pfUXZSKFxqs1QD8SSLlO-jyiDTK9OIGp1rm5JLxVATl8O2z2bvfT8wLsSxyZ9wymNe_aeRRYmfyaGc8kYzjFYETZWObHI0ZGYhWTfLeNn7xcxqpE0qPk0bMJdYAqY5trot-I80WnVvornui5-fBUitmExsOagrEkdd5coEIVbev8V5S6NNAokLmNsmA4OS8T3IYk-6MElrkXPVu2u85gyJVozGarPqwTXOY1MW2AcOZdPynp7FKdlbxxzOnNgaDJ9-Fg48Y1pGc2TP79alh-W17H4n_x63ySED40HBcrfZp5LHVr0dZwR23Kag35U436fz4RwrZdwhpGpRd4ihNt-Sc5DMfOuJX8Rj0iMoBM_D_nOLRCJ04rf5nG)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8d04a224d5746538832fab06aba9637&_e=y3MapzRP9cWd-b5tOeRdR0xR57CR-bSXgaZIXJxxs-d_bnGO3wy87igAXSDKh2n34DIHc-p-pfUXZSKFxqs1QD8SSLlO-jyiDTK9OIGp1rm5JLxVATl8O2z2bvfT8wLsSxyZ9wymNe_aeRRYmfyaGc8kYzjFYETZWObHI0ZGYhWTfLeNn7xcxqpE0qPk0bMJdYAqY5trot-I80WnVvornui5-fBUitmExsOagrEkdd5coEIVbev8V5S6NNAokLmNsmA4OS8T3IYk-6MElrkXPVu2u85gyJVozGarPqwTXObFejJCGdYQi4Ye4by_BuqUm2by0-BKf-OCWwCMlya7lvCjZOo7DEZZCBtlfHqOEbh_ZwX709bVjoTLxLIQ0FWRZC1Vsu6ZPQSajf51yW90pr6ETRdJvhszjJ9D8jIZY5AwacN-xCR0caj4igHRTy4C) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8d04a224d5746538832fab06aba9637&_e=y3MapzRP9cWd-b5tOeRdR0xR57CR-bSXgaZIXJxxs-d_bnGO3wy87igAXSDKh2n34DIHc-p-pfUXZSKFxqs1QD8SSLlO-jyiDTK9OIGp1rm5JLxVATl8O2z2bvfT8wLsSxyZ9wymNe_aeRRYmfyaGc8kYzjFYETZWObHI0ZGYhWTfLeNn7xcxqpE0qPk0bMJdYAqY5trot-I80WnVvornui5-fBUitmExsOagrEkdd5coEIVbev8V5S6NNAokLmNsmA4OS8T3IYk-6MElrkXPVu2u85gyJVozGarPqwTXOZTBLKwcJpX0fou_3xs_QGdrL9_rqXKR14m-rQVpYSa9tUeO-8uCI9sCmTp4lC3cKw5OGGuw8RbuHmOoGLx4nano63JhL3XJqmoh0OtyfcpDcemSFr9dMVumVsNQJHC8CEYgRTikW3HDPQAQWiwKooD)"** on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: [**https://secure.hillsdale.edu/be-the-first-to-get-hillsdales-new-c-s-lewis-dvd-set/**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e8d04a224d5746538832fab06aba9637&_e=y3MapzRP9cWd-b5tOeRdR0xR57CR-bSXgaZIXJxxs-d_bnGO3wy87igAXSDKh2n34DIHc-p-pfUXZSKFxqs1QD8SSLlO-jyiDTK9OIGp1rm5JLxVATl8O2z2bvfT8wLsSxyZ9wymNe_aeRRYmfyaGc8kYzjFYETZWObHI0ZGYhWTfLeNn7xcxqpE0qPk0bMJdYAqY5trot-I80WnVvornui5-fBUitmExsOagrEkdd5coEIVbev8V5S6NNAokLmNsmA4OS8T3IYk-6MElrkXPVu2u85gyJVozGarPqwTXOZleaxg1_QLpAh8ILAzOTOcsJujCfqFyTwGXmzrSiXjPy1-Nk7b06lcdjgn-BdROuV2V3sAQZFuJ-h024q-5sG1kC7QjQ6e2Ifa04qg8o1MuySVLiqdi2vxam6lZ9yUPq6iIGuOaLC-kVTKpakA2II-) Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College

body:
Now more than ever, we need to hear from YOU.

**[OFFICIAL 2024 GOP VOTER VERIFICATION INITIATIVE](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0Q_fko3F9SRkxJvThv5mng~~/AARclAA~)**
ATTN: Friend,

Please don't ignore this message. _This is truly ALARMING!_

_First, a deeply troubling statistic regarding GOP membership emerged:_
**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS"REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0Q_fko3F9SRkxJvThv5mng~~/AARclAA~)**
_And Democrats weaponized these headlines to go on an all-out**[BLITZ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0Q_fko3F9SRkxJvThv5mng~~/AARclAA~)** of attacks against our America First candidates._

_But now, we have to level with you, Friend, we 've never been more worried..._
_**[NEW polling just indicated that _10% of Republicans_ are now _WALKING AWAY!_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0Q_fko3F9SRkxJvThv5mng~~/AARclAA~)**_
If ultimately true, this would spell DISASTER for our Party.

_That 's why our **[Voter Verification Initiative](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0Q_fko3F9SRkxJvThv5mng~~/AARclAA~)** has never been more critical. We need to _PROVE_ just how many patriots still stand behind this movement to save our country._

## Floods Rise Across Midwest
Heavy rains have caused severe flooding in multiple states this weekend. In Iowa, Governor Kim Reynolds issued a disaster declaration for 21 counties, and authorities are asking people to avoid the state's northern region--especially along the Rock River, which broke its record height by 5 week. ([Video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyrCAUgOGnwQ4HDohaUNzGbm-b0mHhuJ4syg4SmH37TFKn_pt_vo_benMU6Xz8dwfasqXV-UIVV8NBcdCr7oLdEAFVh1aOcpaD1EJ0u1UBZxjGScAMSt_1JO5quo-j1GbAoOaOLAjQwoCSQk2D7mcD2oNxKMB4FQamBQYqKfefic6y4xbfqWLufTq6aPdSXhdT_xgsDJbWWv_0nn4ig8XlQj4ig4VSc7yhKztmvsWUAp0PfmHFjPwqKR8Xz8k_eXUx4ptjdf7LFUong8VIkGYeRJdteDWKkS4zMi0eh6P4-1H-VqkWvgMAAP__EJZkRQ)) In [South Dakota](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDGPozAQRn-N6RzZgzFQuLiGLtdeiSZ4iH1rcGTPgvLvV6Te7iue9D69f_f5jjHF_fkXN3K85hkXjgfNVkIrwcym8W4lAmobcrrXo-60UaoJbnys0A-LhgUGY5Vu-xFB96bz_foYOtNEBwqMstBq1Q6duY0WzAIWSYFdWt8Jo8hHzuX2P8edA63pnQ8qtyVvTXKB-VVF-0fAJGCq-ZuDx6_MWAnLElJ8Br5QAdMlEjApe224aC4Yd_LyxMp0IlOR9V2ZtirrmVOiXZZ4UKmy0IZxlxwKIVcZd7mmnD15-VESVpbVC5ia4vzrjCnFanth1HPDmD5f-fdyh4OfAAAA__90anH1), officials are warning that floods will likely reach peak levels tomorrow or Tuesday. Sioux Falls is routing wastewater to holding tanks never before needed, and Mayor Paul TenHaken says that this is "_the most strained the system has ever been_." [Minnesota](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0L9uwyAYBPCngQ0LPv44GRi6sKVrRwvDR0KEIQokVt--codOXe833Om-LsvF55Lr9dNvaEdqiw8jv3ExDCQDtSgabUIElBStmMVZaKE4pzcr0ipVTFyr-bQmz5NIcwQhzDnoyFdNswUOihuQgsuTVtPZgApgPHIwQUZNFMeYR3tO95bruGEq3-2Nzym0jRZ7G-PRifwg4Ai4fd-nsPaKez-cgNtyrdjb8ATcERNwqbQWc72yP2OvR_QDO7u_KjIAdmwi4OjTxseeS8ndzETx6-Zz-S0e_9_wtvATAAD__wAcX1s) has activated its National Guard to help with flood response, and in New Mexico, flooding [interrupted wildfire responses](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAURb8Gb1jwjO1mYOjClq4dLQqP-EUYIiCh_fvKnTte6Urn6Hxet6ulSOn2YQ_ULeTNukYv3BYOEwe1qcHrgAg4DajlKi9ylkqIYdezCmH-clIGIYLyXq6rs0FeglDWh3kdSIMAJRaYpJjeZjVeFlAOFosCFjf5mSmBnlou4z1TajuG-JNfWEaXjyHqvbVHZdM7A8PA9N7HtuPtaYsnm84PA_OsPGGvDIwtjVxEBuakMjD3ZzoHMDAJOz_wm1zmnaIPVLDyEHP2lXuqtjYsQ9H-0SlGqsvKlLgdluKfSfu_y0vDbwAAAP__n-5lkQ).
## Heat Wave Gets Hotter
Over 120 million Americans are under heat warnings this weekend as [temperatures soar](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LGOszAQBOCngc7IXhsDhYu_SZe_vRIZvMR7MjjCCyhvf8qlvXbmK0bzdR_vnhJtj_9-RcdLHv3MdOJoBWgBZjR1cAsioK7RqU4NqlVGyjo6jdIPs5bTEvpukt3QYr9Io7p-MlYNoSYHEoy0oJXUfWuawYKZwXqUYGcd2spIDMR5b74zbRxxSa984t7Mea2Ti8zPUul_FdwquF3X1XDE4Cm9JvSF36qCG0cUET2Ly58oOO987LQ9xDs_iriI46cPeUVRmFISVDYWC21UIoYPOUq9u_C8KCUqtquMfKye0u8U_vuY08FPAAAA__-UImgR) from the Eastern Seaboard to the West Coast. New York City is predicted to tie its daily record high of 96 _°_ , and Philadelphia may break its own record of 98 _°_. In Palm Springs, an excessive heat warning is likely as temperatures are predicted to hit 114 _°_ , and cities in Arizona, Nevada, and California are all dealing with sizzling temps. Experts say that it's difficult to define the exact parameters [of the "heat domes"](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGOgzAQRL8GukVmbUwoXFxDl2uvRBu8xI4MjvAqKPn6E1dfOTMazej9XKcrxRS3-zet7GTJE80SXzxZQA1oJlN7tzAj65pd27dD27VGqTo4ppu1N_a6vy3eDKiN6mfrh7kzl0XhUEeHCo2yqFulL51pBotmRkus0M7ad5VR7KPkvXnkuEngJb3zi_dmzmudXBB5lkp_VThWOB7H0WyPMzoFkwTeKxzPiQpHZU83kEAsQBCYBHxeGQLvXOAIb9geQJuHlbY35LMNRUi4AO0MJX4-JwYIWZoga6p3559HTCkW21dG3VeK6e-Y_I_p5fA3AAD__zwdaoM) in the atmosphere that are causing the air below them to compress and heat up, but noted that they do not typically form with this strength this early in the year.
## List: America's Fastest Growing Retirement Spots
Cities in Arizona and Florida provide the most value for relocating retirees, according to GOBankingRates' list of America's 50 Fastest-Growing Retirement Hot Spots. Check out the [full list here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFuwyAQgOGnwRsWHBjHA0MXb-na0brgw74KQ4RRrLx91c7df-mXvq_7ckdOnLdPPMi3WBYMjV-0OAlGgl1st_pIBGQ68nrUkx60Varb_cPgECcY4-P2wOlmVnKjUahNcFavdurYgwKrHBitzG2w_eTABnBIClww6yCsopVbqf134dx2iuldXlT7UI4u-b215ynMh4BZwBw5Yw7Uv3Ev5bcQMGe6TgEzHlQ5oByUjHg2Opvcark4b7JS40oH5SY1KGXMAGO_tyN11a_Pi1Pi043Cqu1ATn_j9j_Dy8NPAAAA__-wFV7u). GOBankingRates analyzed population, living expenses, amenities, and taxes and determined that Goodyear, Arizona is the No. 1 retirement hotspot. Goodyear also featured the largest percentage increase of people in retirement age living there. Florida had four cities in the top 10, with Clermont, North Port, Fort Meyers, and Vero Beach South. The Sunshine State also has the most cities out of all the states on the top 50 lists as it landed 12 retirement hot spots overall.

clean_body: Heavy rains have caused severe flooding in multiple states this weekend. for the first 2024 presidential debate on June 27 in Atlanta, with Independent candidate Robert Kennedy, Jr., still having a chance to join Biden and Trump on the podium. | | | | | | SUNDAY, JUNE 23, 2024 ---|--- Good Morning! On this date in 2016, the United Kingdom voted in a referendum to leave the European Union. "Brexit" shocked pollsters and was the first time a country chose to leave the EU. (). It's summertime, and the weather outside sure is frightful. We hope you stay cool and dry this weekend. We've got a new sponsor for you today: . They have a great lineup of skin care products, and they've got a special coupon code just for Flyover readers. Check it out below. | Floods Rise Across Midwest Heavy rains have caused severe flooding in multiple states this weekend. In Iowa, Governor Kim Reynolds issued a disaster declaration for 21 counties, and authorities are asking people to avoid the state's northern region--especially along the Rock River, which broke its record height by 5 week. () In , officials are warning that floods will likely reach peak levels tomorrow or Tuesday. Sioux Falls is routing wastewater to holding tanks never before needed, and Mayor Paul TenHaken says that this is "the most strained the system has ever been." has activated its National Guard to help with flood response, and in New Mexico, flooding . Heat Wave Gets Hotter Over 120 million Americans are under heat warnings this weekend as from the Eastern Seaboard to the West Coast. New York City is predicted to tie its daily record high of 96 ° , and Philadelphia may break its own record of 98 °. In Palm Springs, an excessive heat warning is likely as temperatures are predicted to hit 114 ° , and cities in Arizona, Nevada, and California are all dealing with sizzling temps. Experts say that it's difficult to define the exact parameters in the atmosphere that are causing the air below them to compress and heat up, but noted that they do not typically form with this strength this early in the year. List: America's Fastest Growing Retirement Spots Cities in Arizona and Florida provide the most value for relocating retirees, according to GOBankingRates' list of America's 50 Fastest-Growing Retirement Hot Spots. Check out the . GOBankingRates analyzed population, living expenses, amenities, and taxes and determined that Goodyear, Arizona is the No. 1 retirement hotspot. Goodyear also featured the largest percentage increase of people in retirement age living there. Florida had four cities in the top 10, with Clermont, North Port, Fort Meyers, and Vero Beach South. name: Hillsdale College via Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: Access "C.S.Lewis on Christianity"
body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=33d5896ca95043a1bfbb49ad17273857&_e=V3SqhrAajLbrOtTtzvh9nASWEjci2H5NBcA25vrgkflq_Jkxtl-t9QhJeJuc_j5em7hfudYB9uCcwbUXKrSTNur7f9KX4YQfUUTltgOEAcjjJXy8RH36AS2z1tOzSkZP2e4h9F2iSRgdBEux96EOzcGoVOWFh5nvVv0-wiJ-pVz2n-luq4cXsu65BKhTvr_RnZTwp6TXfPMXo6fBu5FiW7L6euI8OqztwT87banyKT3xWXRhflzjNMKHSCLJMNGWGI-5s57fGsChcsvqzVtpONc9QLtTUUkXKVrMa5puQ466Rv3dvOUmLSQrpFm9DhedQB-Kde-JI89xzDJudgu1SWzwh9XWg06Vwz7eiRWa5zSoaAnNkfiVThR81j0Z-mWOIGIjC6Nl60KI3tIS-9HCiAlzxtkvfQMroM9a2V0qc_eYFDDYjG7VhClh9Vo2FR_x) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. Friend,

With _Right Wing Revolution_ as our guide, I truly believe that the Turning Point USA movement can take back our SCHOOLS, our CULTURE, and our COUNTRY with a restoration of FREEDOM and PATRIOTISM. body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | June 23, 2024

MSNBC hosts committed
a despicable act live on air that will leave you seething with
anger

MSNBC's Leftist propaganda has been a stain on the
network for years. But now it's reached a boiling point.

Because these MSNBC hosts
committed a despicable act live on air that will leave you
seething with anger.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

Republicans come to
blows with Donald Trump over this running mate decision

The former president
is set to publicly announce his pick for VP soon. But as of now,
only true insiders know who Trump is leaning towards.
➞ Continue Reading

CNN issues a massive
confession about Joe Biden's reelection chances that has him
scared straight

Biden's poll numbers
are looking abysmal right now. He could very well be on his way
to being just a one-term president.
➞ Continue Reading

Congressional Democrats
on the verge of collapse after what the GOP just announced

The Left is looking
for momentum heading into the 2024 elections. But any hope of
that has been completely squashed.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

Here’s a story that explains why we need more technologists in government
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T52d37bd7-d9a3-4303-8071-0543d1764696/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| Peter, If I win in November, I’ll be the only legislator in the State Senate with a computer science background. I’m going to [ask you to split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action so I can bring my technology expertise to the legislature](https://default.salsalabs.org/T65308e38-f276-498f-a5a5-253f0e179755/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[,](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9ffda5b7-cb60-46fc-84b6-4806c2e2dc57/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) but first let me tell you a story about why that’s so important. In 2023, through the American Bar Association, I worked in a non-partisan role as a legal fellow in the Georgia Attorney General’s Consumer Protection Division. Our office was working on multistate litigation to hold Meta accountable due to child safety issues on Facebook and Instagram. Despite executives like Mark Zuckerberg saying publicly that his products were safe for children, research has shown that wasn’t the case – so the AG’s office sued. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4595fe33-b530-4463-b21c-d9cec85a317e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) However, I quickly realized that I was the only person in the entire division with a computer science background. This wasn’t just an issue for the Meta lawsuit; the division I worked in for the state of Georgia didn’t have anyone with the necessary expertise in technology to assist with cases involving issues such as crypto scams, cyberattacks, or AI. That moment was a turning point for me in realizing that more folks with backgrounds like mine needed to turn to public service. Georgia – and other states across the country – should hire more people with STEM backgrounds across all branches of government. We should provide a STEM education both to high schoolers across the state and make a quality technology education available to universities that serve all Georgians. And graduates from Georgia Tech shouldn’t just be interning at tech companies; they should consider working at the state Capitol. I have my degree from Stanford in computer science, I’ve worked on and helped build multiple startups, and I’m ready to bring my expertise on law and technology to the State Senate. It’s time for the next generation of leaders like me to bring our voices and perspectives to the government. [If you’re with me, please support my campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today. I’m a first-time candidate going up against a wealthy fake-elector incumbent. Unlike him, I can’t self-fund this campaign, so I’m counting on grassroots support from people like you.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T999f1600-6020-4a07-bc94-c9cb1c440d2b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: CLOSING NOTICE
subject: RE: Final Attempt to Verify

body:
Now more than ever, we need to hear from YOU.

**[OFFICIAL 2024 GOP VOTER VERIFICATION INITIATIVE](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3a9b85df69f541d7b72e539f5b87de46&_e=Cefkm-IrMd3DC8hJmFU_Vpsg7znUoI10wsG88b8HKx12kSFt816jsQwMmjozzrKdCYGNeZ20u2gBaJX8EpSalTx4J87uInAZFhoMZe1q_bZh1S3-ooD48McwzqpkBxDA90VppwdKeyVk_UmFSKt9gi59g8KppXruldbO27yAp4GyF-99f_I3MYjouinFXr7jSwLX5c9hfLeDg_K0Gru4uyFpijGiMTuNQx-HHwiXJNBWSm_fR_09ZRXJC2B49pdu7gdIv4SAAoV8A3Jne1fHMvEUppfGdAH0LKZvElFGhQHVz4LolYcyh6KEV8021J7Z1JMr3eKTja8BDlvVVrzq1XZHZgZgWbn_AdH-QI5ugc6M386x9wlLnHN6-v5y2rD95WFoksfsUnWvX7wxl0FN6qamCcUmHbPB18ZKLBlhnsMU2dQOUe3EfcT-ncViNqgyUISiQaxZN4gAx4BsUrfg0fYTtqQIjp2fBhFJFabbjzhbdInd6KNp-aYRFzP0MR-QGUK1l8SJMmuC8YJGSXU90pXXlRVRrHnMIOnpT6u6jIU%3D)**
ATTN: Friend,

Please don't ignore this message. _This is truly ALARMING!_

_First, a deeply troubling statistic regarding GOP membership emerged:_
**[NUMBER OF AMERICANS IDENTIFYING AS "REPUBLICAN" HITS LOWEST POINT IN A DECADE](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3a9b85df69f541d7b72e539f5b87de46&_e=Cefkm-IrMd3DC8hJmFU_Vpsg7znUoI10wsG88b8HKx12kSFt816jsQwMmjozzrKdCYGNeZ20u2gBaJX8EpSalTx4J87uInAZFhoMZe1q_bZh1S3-ooD48McwzqpkBxDA90VppwdKeyVk_UmFSKt9gi59g8KppXruldbO27yAp4GyF-99f_I3MYjouinFXr7jSwLX5c9hfLeDg_K0Gru4uyFpijGiMTuNQx-HHwiXJNBWSm_fR_09ZRXJC2B49pdu7gdIv4SAAoV8A3Jne1fHMvEUppfGdAH0LKZvElFGhQHVz4LolYcyh6KEV8021J7Z1JMr3eKTja8BDlvVVrzq1XZHZgZgWbn_AdH-QI5ugc6M386x9wlLnHN6-v5y2rD95WFoksfsUnWvX7wxl0FN6kuFl9io1L0rkpzYn19-8o8o3OtCwtU0oWSspWuUv1DFoDIYH7iI5RUkyFg1hapj34Z70_LfYDJLy9EVD-d6FPLo6pJum6nZk0pevO52MkXSNECOKM3bSVL6DBfqE4vTMWfZaBPasjgC7-9hO3Et8SU%3D)**
_And Democrats weaponized these headlines to go on an all-out**[BLITZ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=3a9b85df69f541d7b72e539f5b87de46&_e=Cefkm-IrMd3DC8hJmFU_Vpsg7znUoI10wsG88b8HKx12kSFt816jsQwMmjozzrKdCYGNeZ20u2gBaJX8EpSalTx4J87uInAZFhoMZe1q_bZh1S3-ooD48McwzqpkBxDA90VppwdKeyVk_UmFSKt9gi59g8KppXruldbO27yAp4GyF-99f_I3MYjouinFXr7jSwLX5c9hfLeDg_K0Gru4uyFpijGiMTuNQx-HHwiXJNBWSm_fR_09ZRXJC2B49pdu7gdIv4SAAoV8A3Jne1fHMvEUppfGdAH0LKZvElFGhQHVz4LolYcyh6KEV8021J7Z1JMr3eKTja8BDlvVVrzq1XZHZgZgWbn_AdH-QI5ugc6M386x9wlLnHN6-v5y2rD95WFoksfsUnWvX7wxl0FN6s5VWnvt62-xVzHOFPnbbyc-xb518NA3RUaOsZ6Ip7MRwEyjrxGESEulSIv3OTgScbsgmBPutBTLXZbt5YZD7dXdlGIske52pua9D_MjIRFgafg7zJZs8EmUZwwl95BZiPjdGgdWKRV5r5Q-Zi1suCg%3D)** of attacks against our America First candidates._

_But now, we have to level with you, Friend, we 've never been more worried..._

body:
One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis.

This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91ff615e541145e39c5a7fd5708f553e&_e=mIujwMXoTAGS_HUEkFJCk3Q-NUW5VQsEt1oY6N5AGRdiHcd3XEbXQ9LNOT40_u-Q6GfY4QLl-rhPq7neMJtlzxiRPFIHfxr4Lozkd550Yjy7gtKWigmYmV1l3DJcxwrj90axJF5pnOK4wph97H3W6vuXy3-Jd0uzTBL3_ZJahJO6HbI3aoNrxApF4fBa5EoGBO75PS_noxI6_1x0Id-ifSJmJQ47yzvLzKMO6If5v_IkjyDTCN-uf_2DlF4Vxc0qtQJUR9GSkCxQl4hsLbk-Fmdp0n65ouTHWywQiOtIYCyF1v-tL6vKLOUAcZlmIbgDeZiF25C4Mm-MuWwxED-SaYZ7LBG9XTXVwvI1N3njQf8bb_zftaEab1offH3_69b-9sYTnSlAsZ01Z1xci7kdbAxD7RXboAltrw_Du44VsmMUpVndMXZ9AK4xreSCL3C1) Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on _Fox News _because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. _ _ And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous _British_ author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, **"[ An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance,](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91ff615e541145e39c5a7fd5708f553e&_e=mIujwMXoTAGS_HUEkFJCk3Q-NUW5VQsEt1oY6N5AGRdiHcd3XEbXQ9LNOT40_u-Q6GfY4QLl-rhPq7neMJtlzxiRPFIHfxr4Lozkd550Yjy7gtKWigmYmV1l3DJcxwrj90axJF5pnOK4wph97H3W6vuXy3-Jd0uzTBL3_ZJahJO6HbI3aoNrxApF4fBa5EoGBO75PS_noxI6_1x0Id-ifSJmJQ47yzvLzKMO6If5v_IkjyDTCN-uf_2DlF4Vxc0qtQJUR9GSkCxQl4hsLbk-Fmdp0n65ouTHWywQiOtIYCxEQI-EnVcKYjyZOJo6TdwjiNe47Dn1br4VjhwVuEBN5Gfky-dlu02bhluQc66RUwWOp48voUrBs032mPhzm8nnL8USIM1g-ydlKX4z09pDQ2U1U2etZ-nnd5I4v0RCnmKiqiFHjQrgqh7IRed8fGK8)" **has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark _Chronicles of Narnia_ series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching **"[An Introduction to C.S. Lewis: Writings and Significance](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91ff615e541145e39c5a7fd5708f553e&_e=mIujwMXoTAGS_HUEkFJCk3Q-NUW5VQsEt1oY6N5AGRdiHcd3XEbXQ9LNOT40_u-Q6GfY4QLl-rhPq7neMJtlzxiRPFIHfxr4Lozkd550Yjy7gtKWigmYmV1l3DJcxwrj90axJF5pnOK4wph97H3W6vuXy3-Jd0uzTBL3_ZJahJO6HbI3aoNrxApF4fBa5EoGBO75PS_noxI6_1x0Id-ifSJmJQ47yzvLzKMO6If5v_IkjyDTCN-uf_2DlF4Vxc0qtQJUR9GSkCxQl4hsLbk-Fmdp0n65ouTHWywQiOtIYCw-rlAyOOTHlGEOJLbWHqFtG-3VkWbyYJnLNJKJzTiiEh7ueLzpfJ--4OagFr34AiFdT1bx15ng5b-DQIINYiD4oEQTa6XoYNPP7NomI0dqVA85A9vNTsPHVqoyl2Jj2pVhyTooh0tJgmUYcqRShOWZ)," **we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=91ff615e541145e39c5a7fd5708f553e&_e=mIujwMXoTAGS_HUEkFJCk3Q-NUW5VQsEt1oY6N5AGRdiHcd3XEbXQ9LNOT40_u-Q6GfY4QLl-rhPq7neMJtlzxiRPFIHfxr4Lozkd550Yjy7gtKWigmYmV1l3DJcxwrj90axJF5pnOK4wph97H3W6vuXy3-Jd0uzTBL3_ZJahJO6HbI3aoNrxApF4fBa5EoGBO75PS_noxI6_1x0Id-ifSJmJQ47yzvLzKMO6If5v_IkjyDTCN-uf_2DlF4Vxc0qtQJUR9GSkCxQl4hsLbk-Fmdp0n65ouTHWywQiOtIYCx4-ocywW_qPNl0VtorCisaiuN4CqC8XGvyY1cxBET0TPeQNvfmEvEuxxao3AAZEGDAN0WcZdaY3cJh857r_FqpI3VrWIA9cCf0Mf5eUki7Jrdey2f0E8Veewuya_e2rMavTWSsZ-Y4dWuS7qOE_5dM) We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of **"[An Introduction to C.S. clean_body: One of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author -- C.S. Lewis. This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I hope you are having a fine day so far. Thanks for opening my email. Today, I'm writing to let you know about a special offer for you from Hillsdale College, a private, fiercely independent, conservative college located in south-central Michigan where I work. You may have heard of us on talk radio, social media, YouTube, podcasts, or even on Fox News because of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty--like our free online courses. And though we're best known for educating Americans about the Constitution and founding principles through these free courses, one of our most popular courses has been about a famous British author--C.S. Lewis. In fact, our free online course, "" has more than 500,000 people enrolled. C.S. Lewis was a war hero, a bright light during some very dark hours in world history. He is one of my absolute favorite authors because... ...While you may know him for his landmark Chronicles of Narnia series, he was also a brilliant philosopher, writer, and Christian apologist. That's why we decided to develop this online course. Since launching "," we've received an outpouring of thanks for offering a course that covers the breadth and scope of Lewis' writings. We've also heard from many of our friends that they would love to own a DVD version. So, I'm pleased to announce that the C.S. Lewis course is available on DVD for your home library. You can also give it as a gift or use it in a small group, such as a Bible study or book club. We only made a few of these special sets, so get this premium edition of "" on DVD today. Given how popular this course is, the DVD box set won't last long. Reserve your DVD set now using this secure link, while they last: Warm regards, Bill Gray, '01 Vice President Institutional Advancement Hillsdale College Conservatives Give PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. A politician committed to telling you the truth.
Refreshing. Different.
That’s Robert F. Kennedy Jr.

_As social media algorithms and the political class foment a culture war that pits Americans against Americans, big companies like State Street, Blackrock, and Vanguard keep _devouring what’s left of the American middle class_._
__I refuse to feed into the anger and divisiveness.__
Our candidate, our campaign, is running on our shared values, like keeping down the cost of living and getting Americans into their own homes.
| | **“The purpose of life is to contribute in some way to making things better.”**
---
—Robert F. Kennedy Jr.
This positive, uplifting message is winning over millions.
Thus it comes as no surprise that Independents now constitute the largest voting block in America.

subject: I won't stop fighting – and neither can you.

body:
Two years ago tomorrow the Supreme Court's dangerous reversal of Roe v. Wade ripped away almost 50 years of women's constitutional right to access abortion care.
| | |

Peter,
Two years ago tomorrow, the Supreme Court's dangerous reversal of _Roe v. Wade_ ripped away almost 50 years of women's constitutional right to access abortion care.
For women across nearly half of America, Republican politicians are forcing them to stay pregnant – no matter the circumstances and even if they don’t want to be. And doctors in countless states are now barred from practicing essential reproductive health care like abortions – even in life-threatening situations. **T****his new post-Dobbs world is nothing short of a living hell for women in America.**
I’ve been doing everything I can in the Senate to be a firewall against Republicans’ continued attacks on women’s reproductive rights and freedoms. **But the truth is, we can stop Republicans’ anti-abortion crusade – and here’s how:** **A pro-choice Democratic House.
One more Democratic Senator.
Joe Biden in the White House. **
If we get that in the next election, **Democrats can – and will – restore _Roe v. Wade_ and the right to abortion nationwide.** But here’s where you come in. This election year is close, and we need all the help we can to make sure Democrats win in November – because we know, if given the chance, Republicans will do everything they can to ban abortion nationwide.
**So please, Peter: [Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more right now to keep the Senate blue and power the fight to save abortion and all reproductive freedoms? Until women can make their own health care decisions – without interference from Republican politicians – I won't stop fighting. And I sincerely hope that neither will you.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87421747/481101170/1853438702?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk305-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjIzYzVjYS01ZjMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gYKPHlsuPAWnGmFFEjDHhxi68fXsA5OfEON9__g2XGU=)**

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Memo Alleges Delco Prison Murder Cover-Up
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

[Subscribe to our daily email list](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=781cc92a23&e=b7b3eddce2) and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Exclusive: Delco prison document alleges cover-up regarding inmate murder investigation](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d6e18e42e7&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Todd Shepherd_
A memo written by an internal investigator in the Delaware County prison makes a number of shocking and potentially liable claims, including that procedures were not followed when one inmate, Elliot Funkhouser, was transferred to share a cell with Shad Boccella, even though Boccella had been classified as being so unstable he should only be housed alone. The investigator who wrote the memo then went on to imply that the prison’s then-director of internal affairs, Mario Colucci, tried to hide damning evidence of the mistake. The[ two-page memo](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a3e188087e&e=b7b3eddce2) was written on April 29, 2022, nearly one week after Funkhouser’s dead body was found in the cell with Boccella on Friday morning, April 23. **Why It Matters. **One source with intimate knowledge of the jail’s activities and procedures told _Broad + Liberty_ the memo shows a complete breakdown of management — all the way to the top of the county. Yet the memo is certain to make its way into the[ lawsuit against the prison](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8aed42e5f4&e=b7b3eddce2) filed by Funkhouser’s estate in March. "It is believed...that there existed instructions and/or warnings relative to Mr. Boccella, that he was not to be housed with fellow inmates, due to his predilection for violence,” the[ lawsuit filed two months ago says](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b15a158654&e=b7b3eddce2). Colucci, meanwhile,[ filed suit](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a96d2b9f9d&e=b7b3eddce2) last November against the county for “wrongful discharge,” about a year after he was fired. His lawsuit also says he was the prison’s deputy warden of security from 2008 until 2022, at which time he was “demoted” to director of internal affairs. His lawsuit claims he acted as a whistleblower by highlighting some employment infractions to management, but was fired instead of rewarded. **Quotable.** “Colucci withheld exculpatory evidence from an active criminal homicide investigation,” a source said. “Not only should he have been fired, he should have been criminally charged.” That source is known to _Broad + Liberty_ , but is granted anonymity because of fear of retaliation.
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=77930097c3&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Do the Democrats have an Erin McClelland problem?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4670b4beff&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Salena Zito_
In the run up to the Pennsylvania primary in April in the race for state treasurer the assumption among Democrats and most of the press covering that race was that Erie state Rep. Ryan Bizzarro was going to win the Democratic nomination. Just about everyone who is anyone in the Democratic Party went into election night believing Bizzarro was going to win; his rival in that primary, Erin McClelland, was running for the fifth time for office having already run and lost for congress twice for the 12th congressional district as the Democratic nominee losing to Republican Keith Rothfus as well as losing when she ran in the Democratic primary in 2018 against Conor Lamb for the 18th congressional district before dropping out. By election night McClelland, a former contractor for the Allegheny County’s Human Services Division, sailed through the contest seemingly effortlessly, stunning the southeast machine of the state by earning 56 percent of the vote to Bizzarro’s 44 percent. **Why It Matters. **The Democratic nominee has had little scrutiny from the press, mostly because few expected her to win, with the exception of[ a deeply reported story by Penn Capital-Star](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=53bb2d4ab2&e=b7b3eddce2) that showed McClelland campaigned and accepted donations several months before registering a fundraising committee. Her public campaign finance reports showed that McClelland both began accepting donations and spent them on the campaign expenses beginning in September however she did not register her fundraising committee with the Department of State until four months later. McClelland, who is seeking the office of the treasurer, whose duty is to[ “be the custodian of over $150 billion in Commonwealth funds as well as be responsible for the receipt and deposit of state monies and oversight of all withdrawals and deposits from state agencies”](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=bdf3942a4c&e=b7b3eddce2) told Penn Capital-Star in February that she and her campaign staff had discovered a number of mistakes. **Quotable.** “Geography and gender often have huge impacts on the results in low profile primaries because the candidate’s home county is on the ballot,” he said of the advantage Allegheny County had over an Erie county candidate. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=5b24d04ae8&e=b7b3eddce2)**

# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Judge halts Upper Darby ARPA spending changes](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=16194b3bdf&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Bipartisan bill hopes to legalize cannabis in Pennsylvania](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a30052162d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Bob Casey quiet on fate of Norcross donations](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7ea1dd22a7&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: Journalist used disgraceful in tactics against Alito and his wife](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=32938b02f0&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: Juneteenth represents what’s best about our country](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=43b58d2509&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Jeffery S. Prushankin: The real story behind Juneteenth](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=076c15d426&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: The city of Mozart](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=82cef593aa&e=b7b3eddce2)**

# **4\. What we're reading**
Franklin Roosevelt brought together a massive coalition of Americans that led to Democratic victories for him and his successors for decades. But the New Deal was nearly a century ago, and different segments of the voting public have been defecting from that party for years now. Here in 2024, at last, we may be seeing the end of early 20th-century politics and the birth of the new political array.

As [Daniel Henninger noted this week at the _Wall Street Journal_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=dd1671b2eb&e=b7b3eddce2), the strongest part of Biden’s coalition is Hollywood. While the President campaigned before a gala of movie stars this week (and became briefly confused about whether to leave at the end), Donald Trump took his talents to North Philadelphia – looking for people to add to the effort, not just backslapping with old friends and rich donors. A sign of things to come?

The investigator who wrote the memo then went on to imply that the prison’s then-director of internal affairs, Mario Colucci, tried to hide damning evidence of the mistake. The was written on April 29, 2022, nearly one week after Funkhouser’s dead body was found in the cell with Boccella on Friday morning, April 23. Why It Matters. One source with intimate knowledge of the jail’s activities and procedures told Broad + Liberty the memo shows a complete breakdown of management — all the way to the top of the county. Peter,

In case you missed the news, Montana voters formally nominated me as the Republican nominee in this year's pivotal U.S. Senate election.

I am grateful.

My entire team has worked incredibly hard since I got into this race, and now we're all going to redouble our efforts to ensure Jon Tester's current term is his last.

I've sent you requests for your support before, and now I do so again, but this time, I'm **[requesting your endorsement](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f220a18609a048cfb50653f9560e1be9&_e=EbjhGQiXP6Rspx5TQxQD77vM6gld3pM-w_4aDzbPkJI5iEt7uirxy7t_5b4-xAHqCQQGG7AW3Z_GiD7TY5cd_wsORCdC_b9ahmEv2IbJeRuE5rp3p2i-0V4MalfhQjb2iBEZCMx-bNW255QeuOR8ftWQpDyX8poDkgmvF6f0m5nuYJNHsngxpS96uepqpUJ93NDqDKijcQ2fPD-_eHWw2A5lTTcH_J0kJAkQu-7nsBq6nYstUwcSTH7_tA4SoiyW6w1AWT58_XAggFx-HNVMqm-msOwxhNR1wP3s3bwXONGtEzEPAYO-mRNffVnN8yS1wwqqSwlRw8pcCzzjw_KhZg16yL0dXOrw3N4KecgXlZlsFYzUPqOYoFgGXbQfFDkBxlKermWlkikrnui2oaG2j_L2ay-SaRsfgeHhsPICFKE%3D)** not just as a Republican candidate for Senate but as the Party's nominee in Montana.

America is at a crossroads, and we need a new generation of leaders to save our country. Joe Biden and Jon Tester's reckless agenda has brought us skyrocketing food, housing, and energy prices and an open border allowing illegal immigrants, drugs, and crime to flood into our country.

As a Navy SEAL, I've always put country before self, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to end Joe Biden and Jon Tester's inflation, seal our border, secure our children's future, and put America First! I am humbled and honored by all the support the voters in Montana have shown me since I entered this race a year ago. I look forward to finally retiring the #1 recipient of lobbyist cash and pro-Biden liberal Jon Tester.

**Five years out of every six, he's a dyed-in-the-wool liberal, firm progressive ...** votes in lockstep with Schumer, Biden, and every other progressive in the country. And then, for his election year, he tries to shift back to the center and act like a moderate.

Enough is enough. **There should not be a Democrat in the Senate hailing from a state where President Trump beat Joe Biden by 16 points.**

If you haven't done so yet, **[please endorse my candidacy today.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f220a18609a048cfb50653f9560e1be9&_e=EbjhGQiXP6Rspx5TQxQD77vM6gld3pM-w_4aDzbPkJI5iEt7uirxy7t_5b4-xAHqCQQGG7AW3Z_GiD7TY5cd_wsORCdC_b9ahmEv2IbJeRuE5rp3p2i-0V4MalfhQjb2iBEZCMx-bNW255QeuOR8ftWQpDyX8poDkgmvF6f0m5nuYJNHsngxpS96uepqpUJ93NDqDKijcQ2fPD-_eHWw2A5lTTcH_J0kJAkQu-7nsBq6nYstUwcSTH7_tA4SoiyW6w1AWT58_XAggFx-HNVMqjyEC_lh96yIdeyb1nzg8En5CE9eA0ZLiuavq3GS91rfz2xXVw45M6b9T4wyGNV1BKtsoOsSk-hXuCzImKiwPaJJXagXr0VVLmRf8A8uZ8SPJkY8-oUgE0iyZDvdpNw-_kjSo4jIyWpC9iZL8dRfdqk%3D) **

clean_body: On June 4th, Montana Republicans gave me their stamp of approval in nominating me as their chosen candidate to take on radical leftist Jon Tester | Peter, In case you missed the news, Montana voters formally nominated me as the Republican nominee in this year's pivotal U.S. Senate election. I am grateful. My entire team has worked incredibly hard since I got into this race, and now we're all going to redouble our efforts to ensure Jon Tester's current term is his last. I've sent you requests for your support before, and now I do so again, but this time, I'm not just as a Republican candidate for Senate but as the Party's nominee in Montana. America is at a crossroads, and we need a new generation of leaders to save our country. Joe Biden and Jon Tester's reckless agenda has brought us skyrocketing food, housing, and energy prices and an open border allowing illegal immigrants, drugs, and crime to flood into our country. As a Navy SEAL, I've always put country before self, and I'm running for the U.S. Senate to end Joe Biden and Jon Tester's inflation, seal our border, secure our children's future, and put America First! I am humbled and honored by all the support the voters in Montana have shown me since I entered this race a year ago. I look forward to finally retiring the #1 recipient of lobbyist cash and pro-Biden liberal Jon Tester. Five years out of every six, he's a dyed-in-the-wool liberal, firm progressive ... votes in lockstep with Schumer, Biden, and every other progressive in the country. And then, for his election year, he tries to shift back to the center and act like a moderate. Enough is enough. There should not be a Democrat in the Senate hailing from a state where President Trump beat Joe Biden by 16 points. clean_body: Every vote equals support for voting rights | | | Our pro-voter, people-powered movement requires resources to ensure we can reach voters across Georgia and keep our eyes on voting issues across the country. That’s why we need your help today: CREDO Mobile — a progressive cellphone company — has chosen Fair Fight Action as one of three nonprofit organizations to support this month! Every vote cast until June 30 equals money contributed to our critical work, meaning the more votes we receive, the larger our share of the funds will be. Funding from this CREDO grant will support our goals to mitigate voter suppression, advocate for pro-voter legislation, and provide voters with reliable and accurate voting information. We can’t lose momentum now, not with our democracy on the line. Thank you, Fair Fight Action | = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2024 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. In this podcast, we highlight President Donald Trump's steadfast support for traditional American values during Pride Month. It showcases his dedication to religious liberty, free speech, and the preservation of the family structure, emphasizing his efforts to uphold the nation's moral foundation against progressive pressures.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26912?t=2&akid=21594%2E4449941%2EcFIAsP). **Or, to help us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26913?t=3&akid=21594%2E4449941%2EcFIAsP).**

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Tikkun Olam (to leave the world a better place)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87425312/481107503/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4057-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzYwMjRlMy02MTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bGKbYCdnSzZambLbQnFbuRdRJ81VVvKpbOjENQSWN2E=)
Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, friend?
While serving as the president of the largest synagogue in Nevada, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that _this_ was my entry point to public service – because my Judaism helps guide much of my work in the Senate today.
In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it.
Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country.**** And I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. **But I need your help.**
For months, polls have shown me neck and neck with my extreme GOP opponent in Nevada's must-win Senate race and** _The_ _Cook Political Report_ recently named Nevada the "most PERILOUS" battleground for Democrats.**
**So please, I have to urgently ask:**[**If the principle of Tikkun Olam resonates with you****– if you're with me in the fight to continue making progress for the people and communities that we love –****will****you chip in $5 or more today to help me defend my seat in Nevada and our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87425316/481107507/-1278658170?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4057-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzYwMjRlMy02MTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bGKbYCdnSzZambLbQnFbuRdRJ81VVvKpbOjENQSWN2E=)

clean_body: | | | = Can I tell you the story of how I first got involved in politics, friend? While serving as the president of the largest synagogue in Nevada, I was recruited to run in a competitive House race to help flip a red seat blue. Looking back, it's incredibly fitting that this was my entry point to public service – because my Judaism helps guide much of my work in the Senate today. In fact, my decision to say "yes" and run for public office in the first place was guided by the Jewish principle of Tikkun Olam – which means to leave the world a better place than how we found it. Now, as the third Jewish woman and only former synagogue president in Senate history, I'm proud to serve Nevada and our country.** And I'm as committed as ever to keep fighting to better this world and make positive change happen. But I need your help. For months, polls have shown me neck and neck with my extreme GOP opponent in Nevada's must-win Senate race and The Cook Political Report recently named Nevada the "most PERILOUS" battleground for Democrats. So please, I have to urgently ask:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you so much, Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen: Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But experts say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, and the GOP is zeroing in on me as a top target for defeat. That’s why I’m counting on your critical grassroots support to fight back and win. Senate control will all come down to Nevada – and I need to know you’re with me. = You can also to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help.

body:

$3.
That is the donation I am asking you to make today. Yes, just $3.
When we file our next FEC report, it's not just the amount of money we raise that will be public, but the number of donations we receive will be public as well.
Report after report, we have generated significantly more donations from individuals than any of our opponents. That's something I am very proud of. You should be, too.
Those donations are a demonstration of true grassroots strength, and they send a strong message to people looking to support our campaign that we are a good investment. They send a message to people who want to spend against us that we have the strength to beat them.
So, $3. That's what I am asking of you.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: A pretty wild story, if you have a minute
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Back when I was that kid sleeping on the floor of our apartment, I never would’ve guessed this is how things would turn out.
#

Hola, Peter. It’s Ruben.
You might be wondering how this kid...
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=1&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)
...ended up here, running for U.S. Senate, in one of the most competitive races in the entire country.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=2&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)
Well, it started back in the apartment I shared with my mom and my sisters after our dad left. It was tough. I was sleeping on the floor because that’s all we could afford.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=3&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)
I knew I had to do whatever it took to build a better life for us. I worked a bunch of jobs all through school to help make ends meet.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=4&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)
Thanks to my family, my community, and a lot of hard work, I got into college. But before I graduated, I enlisted in the Marines to serve the country that gave me so much.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=5&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)
I deployed to Al Anbar, Iraq with my brothers in arms. They called us “Lucky Lima”, but our luck turned eventually. We ended up the hardest hit Marine unit of the entire Iraq war, and I lost some of my best friends over there.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=6&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)
You’re never the same person after something like that. And I knew I had to do something to improve things for the guys I served with, for people who grew up like me. So, I ended up running for Congress — and I won.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=7&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)
Then, on January 6th, everything changed. It became clear to me that public service wasn’t just about improving the lives of the people in my community anymore — it was about defending our democracy, too.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=8&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)
So now, I’m running for U.S. Senate. My opponent Kari Lake continues to spread the same lies and conspiracies that caused January 6th in the first place, and she’s one of the greatest threats to our democracy — after Trump himself.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=9&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)
Back when I was that kid sleeping on the floor of our apartment, I never would’ve guessed this is how things would turn out.
When I was a Marine in Iraq, I never would’ve thought I’d have to fight to defend our democracy at home.
When I launched my first campaign, I never would’ve imagined that hundreds of thousands of people would back me up and donate to support me, either.
And I never, ever would’ve thought I’d need to ask supporters like you, people who have already done so much, to do a bit more. But to defeat Kari Lake and win in Arizona, that’s what I have to do.
I need you to do a bit more.
[**Please — if you can afford to make a donation of $5 or anything you can to my campaign, it would mean the world to me. An official FEC fundraising deadline is right around the corner, and we’ve got a ton of progress to make on our goals between now and then.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=10&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1061?c0=ruben-em-june24.iW05vD&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=29&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-june24.zae7AS&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=30&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-june24.Hgsby7&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=31&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-june24.1tMu9E&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=32&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1041?c0=ruben-em-june24.yGjtLV&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=33&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-june24.5QiiEK&refcode=em240623-1-160&t=34&akid=2519%2E734936%2ExRGjSz)**
---
****
Thank you. I couldn’t do this without you and the team we’ve built together.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

Thank you for believing in OH-13.
_Emilia Sykes_

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **
