body:
Please read.

| [](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4af4e9318682469baa6edbb606afc154&_e=U_4qVoRcRX1D3n4LRpO5AhXlw3_hec1gkrlwDU91lsStA9GWOL8H2alvtqqPia7OuY8yHajvgZeRD8rR-ODHys2msh2GM76svJc37wneKSjps6j_uEqgsI_h-Kj6u3nUU2b3xoojB3anGBDYIvXeeU-UbxbYhV7B2NTXN95D2Td2wquNgmKdazEcPQ6vnIkCVaJZeVSKE1ELv-u-d06XE_COervbshlDRfXkeNmARsMQBUMeNCNryqjdgBt4O6VBueINpGl9UPRD6oTlKp8O9alpJG-vPguLche4_fJa-WfHm52Evfr-AeJHAV_o-wGEteGf-IM4tXGFzjAynmUNUZKuKN5m3E94tf2zFnTzGOh-ZKnF5SjXPXFkXUADdLLT)
---
Friend,

I wanted to take a few minutes today to tell you a little bit about myself, my life story, and what's never going to change.

**__My Upbringing__**
I was raised in Zachary, Louisiana where I was taught the values I live by today by my mother and father. Those same values that I fight for each and every single day to protect. Values like hard work, dedication, and putting God and family first in everything.

[](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4af4e9318682469baa6edbb606afc154&_e=U_4qVoRcRX1D3n4LRpO5AhXlw3_hec1gkrlwDU91lsStA9GWOL8H2alvtqqPia7OuY8yHajvgZeRD8rR-ODHys2msh2GM76svJc37wneKSjps6j_uEqgsI_h-Kj6u3nUU2b3xoojB3anGBDYIvXeeU-UbxbYhV7B2NTXN95D2Td2wquNgmKdazEcPQ6vnIkCVaJZeVSKE1ELv-u-d06XE_COervbshlDRfXkeNmARsP88uU2UdIC0lY1QcWN9d0G8d9c813bLTXGQS-5i4fR-a6jG68XH-pcPj58J2YsbmsfTh45H2h5pFoKlbQo8wchN6TJji0USDqleWrOvtbAv4_W7ZAQVF0o7bdtoVH47L9aIFEVgiDaZNOI6JOYXBBd)
After high school, I attended Vanderbilt University, graduated, and then went on to receive my law degree at the University of Virginia. I tell you that so you know that I know a little more about law than the average pink-haired woker would like you to believe.

**__So, what 'd I do after college?__**
I was elected to five terms as State Treasurer where I managed the state's $10.6 billion investment portfolios. I also oversaw local and state bond issues and returned millions of dollars in unclaimed property each year. Before I was Treasurer, I served as Secretary of the Department of Revenue, Special Counsel to Governor Roemer, and Secretary of Governor Roemer's Cabinet.

[](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4af4e9318682469baa6edbb606afc154&_e=U_4qVoRcRX1D3n4LRpO5AhXlw3_hec1gkrlwDU91lsStA9GWOL8H2alvtqqPia7OuY8yHajvgZeRD8rR-ODHys2msh2GM76svJc37wneKSjps6j_uEqgsI_h-Kj6u3nUU2b3xoojB3anGBDYIvXeeU-UbxbYhV7B2NTXN95D2Td2wquNgmKdazEcPQ6vnIkCVaJZeVSKE1ELv-u-d06XE_COervbshlDRfXkeNmARsNmxXRMfaGFLkKgHV7Q3Gra_1QOxB4IxfyZ8pyAR2sbBbZLxd_RLK03Hu9wV9KyHA_J9MFcYjWhRmMxCjl789rWgkaQOgj4J2KHtczJ8IVRtkvDoV4IF-1jtZuPWLes5dzgkKdQrUlK6VJPbUQ6g9uJ)
Then, I got my biggest call. **The call to help the people of Louisiana and America.**

**_Time as U.S. Senator of Louisiana_**
I was elected to the U.S. Senate in 2016 after being endorsed by none other than President Donald J. Trump. I serve on the Appropriations, Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, Budget, Judiciary, and Small Business and Entrepreneurship committees in the U.S. Senate. I serve as the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Energy and Water Development for the Appropriations Committee, the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Federal Courts for the Judiciary Committee, and the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Economic Policy for the Banking Committee.

[](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4af4e9318682469baa6edbb606afc154&_e=U_4qVoRcRX1D3n4LRpO5AhXlw3_hec1gkrlwDU91lsStA9GWOL8H2alvtqqPia7OuY8yHajvgZeRD8rR-ODHys2msh2GM76svJc37wneKSjps6j_uEqgsI_h-Kj6u3nUU2b3xoojB3anGBDYIvXeeU-UbxbYhV7B2NTXN95D2Td2wquNgmKdazEcPQ6vnIkCVaJZeVSKE1ELv-u-d06XE_COervbshlDRfXkeNmARsOSKDiRf6GWlkw-plJiOXuop2oOfvZak6rsxG60vOtvjVBa6SPr57-Ivo1vQ7Liv_juzZM0tUT6BqXYd56TL1eLvK2aSibGkqiAX5Q1oOYv8DF-Z5Y0n_CEGx78yOtV3GBtxGnsXLs0xBrOizW27FT7)
Every day for me is a new challenge, another day to serve the people of Louisiana, and another day to fight for our conservative values. You see, I'm always going to be **100% PRO-LIFE, PRO-GUN****,** and **PRO-FREEDOM**. That's not going to change regardless of what the Neo-Socialist Left throws at me and you can write that down and take it home to mama.

**I 'm going to fight for your rights, your freedoms, and for a better future for our children. **

That won't change, I'd rather drink weedkiller than let the Socialist Left Agenda poison this country that we know and love so much.

**[So, now that I've given you my story in a nutshell, I'm going to humbly ask for your support. The Left likes me about as much as a cat likes swimming. I need you to rush whatever you're able below to make sure I have the resources necessary to fight for you and defend our nation.](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4af4e9318682469baa6edbb606afc154&_e=U_4qVoRcRX1D3n4LRpO5AhXlw3_hec1gkrlwDU91lsStA9GWOL8H2alvtqqPia7OuY8yHajvgZeRD8rR-ODHys2msh2GM76svJc37wneKSjps6j_uEqgsI_h-Kj6u3nUU2b3xoojB3anGBDYIvXeeU-UbxbYhV7B2NTXN95D2Td2wquNgmKdazEcPQ6vnIkCVaJZeVSKE1ELv-u-d06XE_COervbshlDRfXkeNmARsNPohlgWwukY3y2lvdObW4GBhL84TR34xjuuvi6O4qnpBvH_4lwTUCGsURFzt3ZJO4DVNmIDhhxq2RjOBqbFtmZ5DEq0PKjusYecsVPwaSTBlsADRVTfjJV6aQ2AxNDSRSgx_nt9pqHdM__NQOohJBO)** | [**DONATE $500**](http://links.thegopreport.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=4af4e9318682469baa6edbb606afc154&_e=U_4qVoRcRX1D3n4LRpO5AhXlw3_hec1gkrlwDU91lsStA9GWOL8H2alvtqqPia7OuY8yHajvgZeRD8rR-ODHys2msh2GM76svJc37wneKSjps6j_uEqgsI_h-Kj6u3nUU2b3xoojB3anGBDYIvXeeU-UbxbYhV7B2NTXN95D2Td2wquNgmKdazEcPQ6vnIkCEXRss12dfZ9FO0Y7NUPoTYkrpk5YztxFQT3HUMbPJ1Vik2-ia-lbQTAHthmOKVw45hqrusbcwtqklXNAKJoI168ztW9PZ9asLUrk8fsfsZsxrhvBd70f9AMdtT6ocBa8-uWP5u7_gZyaVMA-NmMmOtn-GAjN4sSgXqq1Yo9wPmN4qf6FEoz7dYEyiwf1dM5v)

I also oversaw local and state bond issues and returned millions of dollars in unclaimed property each year. Before I was Treasurer, I served as Secretary of the Department of Revenue, Special Counsel to Governor Roemer, and Secretary of Governor Roemer's Cabinet. Then, I got my biggest call. The call to help the people of Louisiana and America. Time as U.S. Senator of Louisiana I was elected to the U.S. Senate in 2016 after being endorsed by none other than President Donald J. Trump. I serve on the Appropriations, Banking, Housing and Urban Affairs, Budget, Judiciary, and Small Business and Entrepreneurship committees in the U.S. Senate. I serve as the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Energy and Water Development for the Appropriations Committee, the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Federal Courts for the Judiciary Committee, and the Ranking Member on the Subcommittee of Economic Policy for the Banking Committee. Every day for me is a new challenge, another day to serve the people of Louisiana, and another day to fight for our conservative values. You see, I'm always going to be 100% PRO-LIFE, PRO-GUN, and PRO-FREEDOM. That's not going to change regardless of what the Neo-Socialist Left throws at me and you can write that down and take it home to mama. I 'm going to fight for your rights, your freedoms, and for a better future for our children. That won't change, I'd rather drink weedkiller than let the Socialist Left Agenda poison this country that we know and love so much. | God Bless, Senator John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808

clean_body: Holding the Senate Majority is vital, and we’re confident that we can win this race with your support. | | | | Holding the Senate Majority is vital, and we're confident that we can win this race with your support. Andy is a Democrat who won a district Trump won twice , and our grassroots team is stronger than anything New Jersey has seen before. He's proven he can beat Republicans in New Jersey, and he will help Democrats hold the Senate and win races down the ballot for the general election. We can take on any challenge and win, but nothing is guaranteed in this race – and there's a lot at stake.In a year where Democrats are in the fight of our lives to hold the Senate Majority, Bob Menendez's third-party candidacy could swing the Majority to the GOP. This election isn't just about keeping New Jersey's Senate seat blue, it's about building the biggest effort possible to win for Andy AND our candidates down ballot in November. We have Congressional seats we need to win and other elections that we need to show up for. Mobilizing our grassroots army today will help keep every competitive seat in New Jersey blue and showcase that a better kind of politics is possible. = = Thank you, Team Andy Kim | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by . Hi, friend, it’s Sherrod. Our race is heating up as fast as the weather – and I wanted to take a brief moment to say thank you.
There’s so much for me to be grateful for: I'm thankful for my wife, Connie, our kids and grandkids, and our two rescue dogs, Franklin and Walter. I'm thankful for the good people of Ohio.**And I'm thankful to you, friend, for your solidarity in this fight to build a brighter future for all Americans, which starts by protecting our Senate majority. **
But the truth is: I’m Trump and McConnell's top target for defeat, and _CNN_ says I'm one of the most vulnerable senators in the country. **With our Democratic majority and all our progress on the line, we have to fight back ASAP. **
**_[That's why I'm setting a goal to get 10,000 folks – including you, friend – to activate your summer membership and join Team Sherrod in the next 24 hours so we can win this race and defend the Senate. Will you chip in $5 now to activate your official Summer of Solidarity membership?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87428270/481116549/691330008?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk2034-fr-nd-v1&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTU2NGI2MS02NTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CnTjiWg5DdGJZvwyHCJtnjMbOkncXqi5bBEoM4EwDrk=)_**

Friend: I grew up in the working-class town of Mansfield, Ohio – a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, electricians, and more.
That's where I started my career fighting for the Dignity of Work – the belief that hard work should pay off for everyone, no matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do.
But while I'm fighting for workers and families in the Senate, my Trump-endorsed opponent, Bernie Moreno, is writing himself million-dollar checks to try to buy this seat. **We can't let that happen, friend.**
But here's the deal: **June needs to be our biggest fundraising month yet. And with our critical end-of-quarter FEC deadline coming up fast, we need every grassroots supporter to join this team with a donation of $5 or more so we have the resources we need to fight back against the GOP's millions and win this race.**
**_[So how about it, friend? Will you rush $5 or more now to activate your Team Sherrod membership? Every dollar helps as we work to defeat our MAGA opponent and keep the Senate blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87428273/481116564/691330008?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk2034-fr-nd-v1&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MTU2NGI2MS02NTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CnTjiWg5DdGJZvwyHCJtnjMbOkncXqi5bBEoM4EwDrk=)_**

subject: Team Cruz Grassroots Newsletter >> June 23, 2024

| | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ...** **[ON FIRE: Ted Cruz Jumps On Trump's 'No Tax on Tips' Idea And Introduces Bill:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "There are talkers, then there are doers. Ted Cruz is showing everyone that he is the latter. The Texas senator was quick to act on a fresh idea announced by Donald Trump that would help middle-class Americans right where they need it. Trump first announced his idea to end taxes on tips for hospitality workers at a Las Vegas rally on June 9th. Cruz immediately favored the idea and promptly produced a bill. The "No Tax on Tips Act" is co-sponsored by Republican Sens. Steve Daines of Montana, Rick Scott of Florida, and Kevin Cramer of North Dakota.... **[Sen. Cruz Introduces Bill To Combat AI-Generated Deepfake 'Revenge Porn':](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Sen. Ted Cruz (R-TX) has introduced legislation in an effort to combat “revenge porn” and add protections for victims of the crime. The “Tools to Address Known Exploitation by Immobilizing Technological Deepfakes on Websites and Networks” or “TAKE IT DOWN” Act will criminalize the publishing of revenge porn — “non-consensual intimate imagery” uploaded on social media or other online platforms to embarrass or harass the individual depicted. The bill aims to criminalize the publication of non-consensual intimate imagery (NCII), including..." **[EXCLUSIVE: Joni Ernst, Ted Cruz Demand Investigation Into ‘Abuse’ Of Telework At Biden Admin:](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "Republican Sens. Joni Ernst of Iowa and Ted Cruz of Texas on Tuesday called on a government watchdog to investigate the abuse of telework policies at the Department of Transportation (DOT). Ernst and Cruz informed Transportation Department Inspector General Eric Soskin of allegations from whistleblowers from multiple agencies that federal bureaucrats were failing to meet in-office work requirements, according to a [letter](http://trk.tedcruz.) provided exclusively to the Daily Caller News Foundation. These allegations included payroll..." **[Sen. Cruz Blasts Biden Executive Action To Give Amnesty To Illegal Aliens, "Utterly Abandoning The American People":](http://trk.tedcruz.)** "U.S. Sen. Ted Cruz (R-Texas) made the following statement blasting Biden’s executive action to give mass amnesty to illegal aliens: “The Biden Border Crisis is exacting a devastating toll on Americans – and has taken innocent lives like Laken Riley, Jeremy Caceres, and Rachel Morin. While our border is being overrun by ISIS terrorists and cartel criminals, Joe Biden’s top priority is to give amnesty to illegal aliens. "He has utterly abandoned the American people. “This amnesty program allows illegal aliens to..." **[Cruz Defies Anti-Israel Agitators Who Descend On His Home 'Just About' Every Weekend: 'Wake The Neighbors':](http://trk.tedcruz._1sw)** "Republican Texas Sen. Ted Cruz remains unbowed in his support for Israel despite nearly two dozen anti-Israel protests staged outside the Houston-area home he shares with his wife and their two children, Fox News Digital has learned. Protesters have gathered to shout slogans outside Cruz's home since February as outcry surrounding Hamas' Oct. 7 attack on Israel mounted. The demonstrations came in response to Cruz's staunch support of Israel during the war and as the Texas senator railed against "cultural Marxism" promoted..." ** [**Ted Cruz Needs Your Help To Build A****Red Wave For 2024 >>**](http://trk.tedcruz.) **

Peter, today I am so excited to share my campaign’s contest. **We’re flying out one lucky supporter (and their guest) for a beach day in Rehoboth! After you soak up the sun, you’ll get to meet up with Jill and me for an ice cream cone.** 😎 🏖️ ☀️ 🍦 Flights and hotel stay are on us. All you need to do is donate for your chance to win. Jill and I have fond memories of taking our kids and grandkids to Rehoboth Beach in Delaware. There’s just no better way to spend a hot summer day than with your toes in the sand, looking out at the ocean.
That’s why we wanted to extend that experience to a lucky supporter like you! When you’re done with your beach day, you’ll get the chance to cool off and enjoy some ice cream with Jill and me.
**So, what do you say? We would love to meet you. Just chip in $25 or any amount below to get your name in the running:**

name: Sherrod Brown and Jon Tester
subject: Defending Montana and Ohio
body:
This is the toughest reelection fight of our lives.
| | | | | |
---
| | | | [MAX my impact →](http://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2tth04-dxe66g-kyd76rh3/)
---
| | | | | [ ](http://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2tth04-dxe66h-kyd76rh4/)
---
| | | | Hi folks, Jon Tester and Sherrod Brown here. We’re reaching out today because we’re in the middle of the two most competitive Senate campaigns in the country, and we need your help to win. We’re not the typical politicians you’d expect to see every day in the Senate. One of us is a seven-fingered dirt farmer. The other has been called disheveled, wrinkled, and rumpled. Neither of us are winning any best dressed awards anytime soon. **But the thing that really sets us apart? We’ll work with anyone to get the job done for our constituents.** And we’ll always stand up to the special interests in Washington to help folks back home. But right now, we’re in the toughest reelection fight of our lives. **FIRST,** election experts called us the most vulnerable Democratic senators up in 2024. **THEN,** Mitch McConnell and his cronies said they would spend over a hundred million dollars to try to defeat us. **NOW,** we’re officially up against two self-funding multimillionaires who are bankrolling their campaigns themselves. We can’t write our campaigns million dollar checks. But we’ve got something better: You. Our supporters are teachers, electricians, farmers, autoworkers, you name it — who work hard every day to make a living and together, we can make a difference. [**_Things are really heating up in our races so we’ve set a rapid response Big Sky Buckeye Fund goal to raise $500,000 in the next 48 hours to fight back against the millions being thrown our way. So we’re asking: Will you chip in $10 to split between our campaigns and No Dem Left Behind to keep a seven-fingered dirt farmer and a disheveled champion for the Dignity of Work in the Senate?_**](http://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2tth04-dxe66i-kyd76rh5/)

name: Colleen Davis
subject: Trigger Warning: Infuriating, tragic stats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Her Bold Move Action
body:
In anticipation of what we’re remembering on Monday, these stats are more important to keep in mind than ever.| | |
---
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87430075/481121578/1023799078?refcode=EM_F_240623Stats_N_CD_90DO_7_G_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwMDFjMWRmLTY4MzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zWQRF_7l5tjKBHJ56212Z28T5ah_x_0u9rqSOCW1diU=)
---
**Trigger Warning:** This email contains statistics that many readers may find triggering or distressing, but on the eve of the anniversary of the _Dobbs_ decision, which overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , we felt it was important to share. [**If you don’t want to read ahead but wish to support our efforts, please consider chipping in $20.24 to help us elect fiercely pro-choice women who will fight for our ability to make our own healthcare decisions. →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87430077/481121580/1023799078?refcode=EM_F_240623Stats_N_CD_90DO_7_G_N_L1&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwMDFjMWRmLTY4MzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zWQRF_7l5tjKBHJ56212Z28T5ah_x_0u9rqSOCW1diU=) Hi Peter,

An extremely troubling and infuriating stat was released earlier this year, and with **Monday being the two-year anniversary of the fall of _Roe v. Wade_** , we felt it was important to remind you why our work is so important.

According to _NBC News_ , a study* estimated that, since abortion bans were put into place, “nearly 520,000 rapes were associated with 64,565 pregnancies across 14 states, most of which had no exceptions that allowed for terminations of pregnancies that occurred as a result of rape.”

Texas saw the highest numbers, which, according to the _Houston Chronicle_ , had over 26,000 “rape-related pregnancies during the 16 months after the state outlawed all abortions, with no expectations for survivors of rape or incest.”
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87430079/481121582/1023799078?refcode=EM_F_240623Stats_N_CD_90DO_7_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwMDFjMWRmLTY4MzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zWQRF_7l5tjKBHJ56212Z28T5ah_x_0u9rqSOCW1diU=)
---
_The picture (above) is of Greg Abbott at a press conference after passing SB8 in 2021. According to _The 19th News_ , at that press conference, he told a reporter that this bill wouldn't force women to carry pregnancies to term that resulted from rape or incest because "they will have 6 weeks to get an abortion" and that his administration would "work tirelessly" to "eliminate all rapists." _ These findings are chilling. Greg Abbott and a room full of men crafted and passed legislation that has directly resulted in more than 26,000 rape victims in Texas being forced to carry their rapist’s baby. WE HAVE HAD ENOUGH!

We **_need_** women in the rooms where these dangerous, deadly, sexist decisions are being made. We **_need_** women in these rooms to serve as a voice for ALL of the women in our country.

[**Women in America deserve better. Period. That’s why we are dedicated to working harder than ever before to elect fiercely pro-choice women who will fight for our fundamental freedoms. Will you join the fight to get our roster of 2024 candidates elected by donating $19.73 today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87430081/481121584/1023799078?refcode=EM_F_240623Stats_N_CD_90DO_7_G_N_L2&amount=19.73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwMDFjMWRmLTY4MzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zWQRF_7l5tjKBHJ56212Z28T5ah_x_0u9rqSOCW1diU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**$20.24 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87430084/481121609/1023799078?refcode=EM_F_240623Stats_N_CD_90DO_7_G_N_EB20.24&express_lane=true&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIwMDFjMWRmLTY4MzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=zWQRF_7l5tjKBHJ56212Z28T5ah_x_0u9rqSOCW1diU=)

We are just as angry as we were two years ago, and we have no doubt that you are, too. We are working to chip away at the male majorities in the states where abortion bans have been written. We desperately need to hear more women’s voices in the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made.

For ALL women,

clean_body: In anticipation of what we’re remembering on Monday, these stats are more important to keep in mind than ever.| | | | | = Trigger Warning: This email contains statistics that many readers may find triggering or distressing, but on the eve of the anniversary of the Dobbs decision, which overturned Roe v. Wade , we felt it was important to share. = Hi Peter, An extremely troubling and infuriating stat was released earlier this year, and with Monday being the two-year anniversary of the fall of Roe v. Wade , we felt it was important to remind you why our work is so important. According to NBC News , a study estimated that, since abortion bans were put into place, “nearly 520,000 rapes were associated with 64,565 pregnancies across 14 states, most of which had no exceptions that allowed for terminations of pregnancies that occurred as a result of rape.” Texas saw the highest numbers, which, according to the Houston Chronicle , had over 26,000 “rape-related pregnancies during the 16 months after the state outlawed all abortions, with no expectations for survivors of rape or incest.” = The picture (above) is of Greg Abbott at a press conference after passing SB8 in 2021. According to The 19th News , at that press conference, he told a reporter that this bill wouldn't force women to carry pregnancies to term that resulted from rape or incest because "they will have 6 weeks to get an abortion" and that his administration would "work tirelessly" to "eliminate all rapists." These findings are chilling. Greg Abbott and a room full of men crafted and passed legislation that has directly resulted in more than 26,000 rape victims in Texas being forced to carry their rapist’s baby. WE HAVE HAD ENOUGH! We need women in the rooms where these dangerous, deadly, sexist decisions are being made. We need women in these rooms to serve as a voice for ALL of the women in our country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = We are just as angry as we were two years ago, and we have no doubt that you are, too. We are working to chip away at the male majorities in the states where abortion bans have been written. We desperately need to hear more women’s voices in the rooms where decisions about our bodies are being made. For ALL women, Colleen Davis Endorsements Manager Her Bold Move This study was published by JAMA Internal Medicine and led by the medical director at Planned Parenthood of Montana | | Her Bold Move believes that ambitious women will transform our country. We provide critical support for fiercely pro-choice women candidates and their campaign teams: financial support, endorsements, message amplification, campaign media, fundraising support, and more. Will you support us with a contribution today? = | | | | | Paid for by Her Bold Move Action. name: Ben Wikler, WisDems Chair
subject: Earlier this month I took the stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
It starts in Wisconsin
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5a3f7798-8b24-4dc5-81e6-58ff54b4b58d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
| | |
---
| | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td146f239-bfe2-4f7a-bbf4-d5fb1ba56ee2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Earlier this month I took the stage at the WisDems 2024 Convention where we were Fighting For Our Freedoms. Make no mistake. We’re in for one of the most important fights in the history of this country—the fight to preserve democracy. And it begins right here in Wisconsin. Wisconsin is the tipping point state and the GOP knows it. That’s why they put their national convention in Milwaukee. But thanks to supporters like you, we have new fair maps, more chances to flip districts from red to blue, and Democrats running in NEARLY EVERY race up and down the ballot in every part of Wisconsin. And with only 150 days till the election, we have a lot of work ahead of us. To keep a Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate, we must reelect Tammy Baldwin, who will continue to fight for health care, clean air and water, peace and public safety, and reproductive freedom. We must reelect President Joe Biden, who will continue to fight to bring down costs, invest in American workers, and protect voting rights—or else face the prospect of Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies deciding our elections. And to do all that—to elect Democrats in the Assembly, state Senate, U.S. House, U.S. Senate, and the White House... we need you! Although the WisDems State Convention happened weeks ago, WisDems and Blue Amp Action are mobilizing and Fighting For Our Freedoms by prioritizing this important work — the kind of work that will protect our elections, protect abortion rights, and help save democracy from MAGA extremism. [Peter, will you join me, my team, and Blue Amp Action in making that work happen by chipping in a $25 split donation right now? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tefafc0b5-7342-4425-9609-82d7302ebaf5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | | | Yours in the fight, Ben Wikler, Chair WisDems

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Lucas Tyree Kunce
subject: I’m so proud of the movement we’ve built together, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We’re going to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and put working people in charge of our country. Please let me explain how we got here.
#
I’m so proud of the movement we’ve built together, Peter.
From calling out Josh Hawley on cable news to breaking fundraising records and earning major endorsements from organizations like the Missouri AFL-CIO, End Citizens United, and VoteVets, we’ve put a national spotlight on Missouri’s U.S. Senate race.
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to add your first donation of any amount toward my campaign to defeat Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat. **But first, please let me share a little more about how we got here.**
**[ADD A DONATION NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52986?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc)**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52986?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc)
I grew up in mid-Missouri. And like so many other Americans, my family lived paycheck-to-paycheck. So when my little sister was born with a heart condition, the medical bills bankrupted us. Maxed-out credit cards and no money left, times had never been tougher.
But we weren’t alone — our community took care of us. When my parents had to take my sister to the hospital in St. Louis, our neighbors and friends took my siblings and me into their homes and brought more meals by the house than we could ever hope to eat. **That’s the Missouri I grew up in.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52986?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc)
Their support helped send me to college, and after that I joined the Marines to honor everything they had done for me and my family growing up. Got deployed to Iraq and Afghanistan. Later the Pentagon. I was on the Joint Staff negotiating arms control agreements with NATO and Russia.
When I came home between tours in Iraq and Afghanistan, one of the hardest things was seeing what was happening back in my old neighborhood. It was a community picked for parts — the local corner store boarded up, my first family house bulldozed to the ground. **Here’s all that’s left of it:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52986?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc)
While all of us were risking our lives building up towns like Habbaniyah, Fallujah, and Herat, career politicians like Josh Hawley let our country waste away. They spent trillions on bailouts, tax breaks, and subsidies for the industries that stripped our communities for parts — like Wall Street, Big Pharma, and Big Oil — and then told us they can’t figure out how to invest even a fraction of that into building up our own country and investing in our own people.
**I saw what was happening — and I was ready to fight back.**
So in my final year of active duty, I worked to upend the corporate defense monopolies that leave our country less safe. I also joined an organization that fights corporate monopolies — we took on defense contractors, Big Pharma, Big Tech, Big Ag, Wall Street. The people buying off our politicians and leaving the rest of us behind.
**And now, I’m running for U.S. Senate to replace Josh Hawley and fundamentally change who has power in our country** — so everyday people call the shots, not massive corporations or corrupt politicians. I want to abolish corporate PACs, expose lobbyists writing our laws, criminalize war profiteering, ban insider trading among members of Congress, and enact a Marshall Plan for the Midwest — a massive investment and job creation program that will rebuild our forgotten communities and get us off fossil fuels once and for all.
I want to codify Roe v. Wade, secure voting rights, and ban anti-union “Right-to-Work” scams forever. I want to put working people in charge of our country. But I need your help to get it done.
**Without a single cent of corporate PAC money, we’re building the people-powered movement that’s going to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this Senate seat — and I need you on our team.[Please add a donation of any amount right now so we can continue building this movement and finally give power back to everyday, working people.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52986?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52987?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52987?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52986?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc)
---
I’m not just running to make a point — **this is a race we can win.**
**Josh Hawley is vulnerable.** In 2018, he won his seat with only 51% of the vote — and after he exposed himself to be a fraud and a coward on January 6th, he became the least popular Republican Senator up for re-election in 2024.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52986?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc)
Since Hawley was elected, Missourians have broken with him and taken back their power at the ballot box by voting to raise the minimum wage, expand Medicaid through the Affordable Care Act, and legalize cannabis. And this year, with an initiative to end Missouri’s extreme abortion ban going on the ballot, we expect even more voters to turn out and protect their freedom this November.
So if we’re able to communicate to voters that our campaign is about taking back power for real Missourians, we have a real shot at defeating Josh Hawley.
**But I need you on this team to get it done, Peter.** National insiders and even Hawley’s own campaign have already started attacking me — and over the coming months, they’re bound to get even more vicious. That’s why we need to start preparing right now to fight back and deliver our positive message to voters.
**[Will you chip in anything you can right now so we can keep building this record-breaking grassroots movement and stay prepared for the fight ahead? I don’t take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say anything makes a big difference to our campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52986?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52987?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=11&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52987?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=12&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52987?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=13&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52987?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=14&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52987?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=15&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52987?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=16&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52986?refcode=em20240623-5826&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc)
---
Together, we can take back power from corrupt politicians like Josh Hawley and finally put real, everyday people in charge of our country.
Thanks for helping us get it done,
Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20240623-5826-footer&t=18&refcode2=5826_614464_m6bDAc&akid=5826%2E614464%2Em6bDAc)**

Just by opening this email, you earned your spot in the Top 30% of my supporters. You can get to the Top 15% by reading it through to the end, so do you think you can do me that favor? **Thank you in advance!**

Look, I know that times are _**really**_ hard right now. "Bidenomics" has crippled middle class families, and Biden's open borders have let crime seep into previously safe communities.

I'm about to offer you a spot in our Top 2% of donors, but please know that if you can't afford it, then I'm just grateful that you've already earned your spot in the Top 15%.

I spend **every day** trying to make life better in America by restoring the American Dream and standing up for the families and communities that have been affected most by Joe Biden's liberal policies. I want to make sure the American Dream is attainable for every single American no matter where they come from, where they live, how old they are, how big their family is, or even who they vote for. **[Please chip in whatever you can spare today to join the Top 2% of supporters that support my work to restore the American Dream:](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=766d197480dd4cde919fb499d1b0cd79&_e=IzeursQy60m4Z5z22Js6knD7VGDZpj1xL8u1r98qLN6M3qT8wyWxpIy6QSxFgBb-GV1IaeGLxHfqjHqGXx34CUi6522LY3JGXJWGTKGMtnVzVFzXqMTxn2TabzFq7bO76pidr8zqyDxEbtVe7Egn-21laJY8Du3nM5BcKm__ASVm5RgwNZQQxij0phNa4DFKNWZm1GGrlfiI-RSi6SGFpIeQ9NSQj1w7PTuEq0pzCKWTP1ldbV-0qmotPI4jBKkb9bXChVp3cOAg_oqzi2jJeoEiaovX-jfUixsDdZQEAp_yZ09FwfAIKAzDyG7XiNLhR9T8vkqiXUYw8pFuBVX3IMcAuhnUHN45t1yhk-iEeiPHrhRqyMTlUhAn1frcdzM3FIy-RwdJpKCDZZIewT9yUJ3K40Mf_e79vuxISc7ilx4%3D "Please chip in whatever you can spare today to join the Top 2% of supporters that support my work to restore the American Dream: ")**

clean_body: I spend every day trying to make life better in America by restoring the American Dream and standing up for the families and communities that have been affected most by Joe Biden’s liberal policies. I spend every day trying to make life better in America by restoring the American Dream and standing up for the families and communities that have been affected most by Joe Biden’s liberal policies. | | | | | Friend, thank you and God bless you! 🙌🙌 | "Marco Thank you, God bless you gif" Just by opening this email, you earned your spot in the Top 30% of my supporters. You can get to the Top 15% by reading it through to the end, so do you think you can do me that favor? Thank you in advance! Look, I know that times are really hard right now. "Bidenomics" has crippled middle class families, and Biden's open borders have let crime seep into previously safe communities. I'm about to offer you a spot in our Top 2% of donors, but please know that if you can't afford it, then I'm just grateful that you've already earned your spot in the Top 15%. I spend every day trying to make life better in America by restoring the American Dream and standing up for the families and communities that have been affected most by Joe Biden's liberal policies. I want to make sure the American Dream is attainable for every single American no matter where they come from, where they live, how old they are, how big their family is, or even who they vote for. "Please chip in whatever you can spare today to join the Top 2% of supporters that support my work to restore the American Dream: " | | "PLEASE DONATE NOW >>" Any single amount will make a difference in my fight, and as such a reliable supporter, I'm happy with any amount you can spare. The ugly truth is that some of you reading this won 't be able to part with your hard-earned dollar, which is exactly why I'm fighting so hard for the American Dream. "If you can’t donate today, I will be just as happy if you can only submit your endorsement." | | "ENDORSE ME TODAY >>" Once again - thank you and God bless you, Marco Rubio | | | * "Marco Rubio Endorses Marsha Blackburn!" | "JOIN MARCO!" | Paid for by Rubio Victory Committee 1101 30th St. NW #125 Washington, DC 20007 The appearance of U.S. Department of Defense (DoD) visual information does not imply or constitute DoD endorsement.

Last night, Donald Trump, alongside David McCormick, personally**attacked Bob by name on stage at his MAGA rally in Pennsylvania.**
This changes EVERYTHING, Peter. In the aftermath of Trump’s endorsement of McCormick, MAGA Republicans are FIRED UP to flip PA red, and GOP spending will skyrocket.
**And let’s not forget that polls out of PA are showing Bob’s lead slipping.**
We can’t afford to sit this one out. If Bob and his team are going to stand up to the MAGA millions that are headed his way, he needs grassroots supporters like you to step up right now.

name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Intel
subject: Get “The Great Principles of Chemistry” on DVD
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWtPmCAWcN

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWtPmCAWcN

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times-since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, "The Great Principles of Chemistry."

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals
the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, "The Great Principles of Chemistry" contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or
lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/63316881:WtPmCAWcN:m:3:2627245898:1D3299B0BFD248728251E6EA53104632:r

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with "The Great Principles of Chemistry."

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWtPmCAWcN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWtPmCAWcN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-75539002595-echo3-B00D291FB3453A0D7D865DCE4CEE8EC7@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: Sorry to bother you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| This is my least favorite part of the job.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2869%2E35263%2EqaBwge)
I’m sorry to bother you so early on a Sunday, Peter. Asking for donations is my least favorite part of the job, but they make a big difference for our campaign. Let me explain: My megamillionaire opponent, Eric Hovde, outraised us last quarter thanks to a $8 million check he wrote his campaign. He’s used that cash to flood Wisconsin’s airwaves with ads and try to control the narrative in this race. On top of that, right-wing super PACs and dark money groups have poured resources into our state to uplift my opponent and attack my campaign. In total, Republicans have already spent more than **$16 million** on ads in our Senate race, making this one of the most expensive races in the entire country. We spent more than we budgeted for this quarter so that we could fight back against the flood of attacks Hovde and his allies have thrown my way. I’ll put it bluntly: **Whoever has more resources to get their message out will likely win this statistically tied race, so we need every bit of help to fight back.** But I don’t have an unlimited campaign war chest like my megamillionaire self-funding opponent, Peter, which is why I’m counting on your support to stay competitive. **[The last thing I want to do is bother you more over the weekend, so I’m hoping you can help us close the gap toward our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. If you’re able, will you chip in to help me defend Wisconsin’s Senate seat?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun24.Hijekx&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240623_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2869%2E35263%2EqaBwge)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-jun24.xQpXoA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240623_AM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2869%2E35263%2EqaBwge)

name: Evers Finance Team
subject: Rising to the challenge
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek, did you see
our team’s message about our important mid-month deadline? This is the
last deadline before our numbers go public. With so much at stake, we
can’t afford to fall short.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2257?t=1001&akid=6757%2E1827488%2EOoXN9d ]Whoever wins Wisconsin will win the presidency, which is why we need
your help to make critical investments now. Can we count on you to pitch
in $10 before it’s too late?

— Begin Forwarded Message —

The mid-month fundraising deadline is Sunday at midnight, and it’s the
last one before the public filing deadline at the end of the month. It’s
critical that we don’t fall short of our goal now.

We need to be able to keep making the investments we need to win another
razor-close race in Wisconsin, and since Republicans have the right-wing
special interests in their corner, we can’t afford to fall even a little
short.
[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2257?t=1002&akid=6757%2E1827488%2EOoXN9d ]Can you click here to chip in $10 and help us win
Wisconsin?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

| Social Security is on the ballot!

Rick Allen, the current representative for the 12th district in Georgia, wants senior citizens to wait longer to access social security benefits. He says people "want to work longer." This is outrageous and just one example of how completely out of touch representative Allen is with what the people really need and want.

**Friends and neighbors in the 12th district have worked long and hard and our senior citizens can rest assured if I win the election and become their representative, I will fight for them and against efforts that will make their life more challenging. **

I ask for your support so I can reach more citizens and work for you on a plan for the future that is prosperous.

[Will you support my campaign by donating $25 or even $5 so we can make sure the people in Georgia's 12th district are properly represented?](https://lizjohnsonforus.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4a0fd0913238344008dfe952&id=0ef911c7aa&e=e8eaba4639)

Liz

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Donald Trump just attacked me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Hey everybody, it’s Mark Kelly. My friend Sherrod Brown is running for re-election to the Senate in 2024, and we’re working to support him. I hope you’ll read the message below from him, and [**consider splitting a donation between Sherrod's campaign and mine.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrod-brown.a43gKG&refcode=em240623-1-30&t=1&akid=5790%2E6688874%2E84UE89)
---

Friend, this is urgent: **Donald Trump just held a massive MAGA rally in Nevada – where he personally attacked me and our movement.** Let's be clear: The only reason Trump is flying across the country to mobilize the GOP base and his megadonor donors against us is because he knows our race will decide Senate control.
**With so much at stake, we need to fight back ASAP:[So please, will you chip in $3 to split between my campaign and Mark Kelly to help me overcome the GOP's attacks, win in Ohio, and keep the Senate blue?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrod-brown.a43gKG&refcode=em240623-1-30&t=2&akid=5790%2E6688874%2E84UE89)
I'm facing the toughest election of my life against my Trump-backed opponent, Bernie Moreno, in what experts are calling the nastiest and most expensive Senate race. If you can believe it, more money is being spent on ads in our race heading into November than any other race in the country – including for president.
**But unlike my MAGA opponent, I'm running a true grassroots campaign, which means I'm counting on folks like you chipping in what they can, when they can, to power us to victory.**
[**Friend, will you rush $3 or more right now to split between my campaign and Mark Kelly so we can reach our $200,000 rapid-response goal, fight back against Trump's attacks, and win this race?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-sherrod-brown.a43gKG&refcode=em240623-1-30&t=3&akid=5790%2E6688874%2E84UE89)

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=a615e4ef350045598060a3f108bab4ab&_e=iubNcVmrUL_75ZnIHPb7Y9LHRfDBtI14DMRfO7XnYQSPbPoiqfLUCSecxnWxYsVLAKw99746dfNEOWnuZWu6a3h7IK9pfMpqLJxIRXrCTYhxPrEUDpZXx2XF2B2CDiFuLQHnHQEiZT6O73Nux1S1SHsdLa_LllAuolXS5KWejoDXY5WZtnPU1BzCB8TYoETivCzy4V3oxgBv-pL5qoRrWzz_lSCJqimz94JhCZYvxIC3ryLWUL2EGsbN6zx7uTTKMhUcgg2oUlVYJywXNTjF8j5Hp4e-RJzU4f_3rCdbAaNnNu9xc4jn25M-eC3hSuEC)
---
Did you hear the great news? I am thrilled to have received President Donald J. Trump's endorsement this week! I'm thankful for his endorsement and look forward to working with him in Washington to Make America Great Again. We've all felt the effects of Democrat mismanagement under the Biden/Peltola agenda. Our southern border is in disarray, our dollars don't go as far as they used to, and our adversaries are emboldened across the globe. Now more than ever, we need real conservative leadership in Washington to right the ship. It's time to defeat Mary Peltola and ensure Alaska has a true leader in Congress once more. Your support is crucial in this fight for our future. Thank you for standing with me. Together, we can live up to our state’s promise – _**North to the Future.**_ Warm regards,
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=a615e4ef350045598060a3f108bab4ab&_e=iubNcVmrUL_75ZnIHPb7Y9LHRfDBtI14DMRfO7XnYQSPbPoiqfLUCSecxnWxYsVLAKw99746dfNEOWnuZWu6a3h7IK9pfMpqLJxIRXrCTYhxPrEUDpZXx2XF2B2CDiFuLQHnHQEiZT6O73Nux1S1SHsdLa_LllAuolXS5KWejoAa9SBEAX8DBLFn0UOCBd2b1hwECCpcwVh6BB1-RSoJhpLeKVJZZi_nXJlPxU8h1pSYmDuFFXZdbPr4wtLcqy4odp2txucgx_40xpRRIQSWeiQacVUzDOymOPHdovhNnWQVR4S_BlxfGYhXeUNmCo0s)
---
**Nancy Dahlstrom** _Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large_
---
|
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=a615e4ef350045598060a3f108bab4ab&_e=iubNcVmrUL_75ZnIHPb7Y9LHRfDBtI14DMRfO7XnYQSPbPoiqfLUCSecxnWxYsVLAKw99746dfNEOWnuZWu6a3h7IK9pfMpqLJxIRXrCTYhxPrEUDpZXx2XF2B2CDiFuLQHnHQEiZT6O73Nux1S1SHsdLa_LllAuolXS5KWejoB7wLYEZK4SVH4Xi3mzYFZ6Rg5NlUTiT-HYMhxT8YXZeUdV_OSLBFb58vCoYgUQT6-Ki0CNzmfGtqQY2OylRdPX94o-PtWhAa2oryMWphXGd95QTz_NVjB5IkgubJOYt20yAaM7_RS4c6yqeIDBTzrD)

I am honored to have received support from leaders across Alaska and our country, especially from former President and Republican Presidential nominee, Donald J. Trump! We must rebuild our country and work together to do it.

**President Trump Endorses My Campaign**
---
This week, President Donald J. Trump endorsed my run for the at-large congressional seat currently occupied by Mary Peltola.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=a615e4ef350045598060a3f108bab4ab&_e=iubNcVmrUL_75ZnIHPb7Y9LHRfDBtI14DMRfO7XnYQSPbPoiqfLUCSecxnWxYsVLAKw99746dfNEOWnuZWu6a3h7IK9pfMpqLJxIRXrCTYhxPrEUDpZXx2XF2B2CDiFuLQHnHQEiZT6O73Nux1S1SHsdLa_LllAuolXS5KWejoDhnkaKhd0Iz92saitNslbwamgXm4tDTYmPC-P48nSpXEVFiFnd2U0BmHc2qiBZu3YKp9klHAgtIXt8rjeC2uYC9yOxDwxJoyesZV72S6NJG6UTHpURxUCYYJ3vV-MXc1pZVwI07xzRzA3O-bufponV)

_ "Nancy is a proven fighter! In Congress, she will work to Secure the Border, Create Jobs, Lower Taxes, Promote American Energy Independence, Support our Incredible Military and Police Officers, and Defend our always under siege Second Amendment."_ _-_**President Donald J. Trump**
---
|
---
**My Interview with Fox & Friends** Last week, I joined my fellow Elevate PAC (E-PAC) candidates for a panel discussion on Fox & Friends to discuss my campaign and the importance of electing conservative women leaders into office. Republican women are in the middle of a political Renaissance and are defying the liberal media’s stereotype that women always fall in line with the Democratic Party. I spoke on the wide-open southern border, Joe Biden’s executive orders targeting Alaska, and more.
---
[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=a615e4ef350045598060a3f108bab4ab&_e=iubNcVmrUL_75ZnIHPb7YzDNfjIS5IUuoQeZGqUIv0IgAAdg_VEriC1ivBOywVuJT1bvE0tNCKcCypEBGRdhyqLE9I7fX7kTSe7gjXRIKQB9j4CiqBMSVZkBTMuIItMl8btWIqkuGXTFFp94ZYtVT3vWjmO5EIEnJFESsSjKyaVHj2Kc6l7EYf07Ob8L8Dr4bFfVB2gDxHkgDpOVib4p5S_NQ3xQt7uipVFvsqigHQg%3D)
---
[**📺 Watch Now**](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=a615e4ef350045598060a3f108bab4ab&_e=iubNcVmrUL_75ZnIHPb7YzDNfjIS5IUuoQeZGqUIv0IgAAdg_VEriC1ivBOywVuJT1bvE0tNCKcCypEBGRdhyhhaYsuWOWBpbbHqk69DL4Fd1Xt1QYTkA0Y6f8GNNt8TH0AazezFurPqMHtThSOgvt_YMtoXdwQ436DIO0keGFBKGKJz_XkbtG6bn3uXrxpmxAZVUHes65b0zhGqgmQ7smOe1Ld52pqPNnfBUd9LCCU%3D)
---
_“We’re an oil and gas state, we’re a mining state, we have all kind of minerals and things here that the entire country needs, and we need those things for many reasons, not just production but also for national security. If we don’t have those things in our country, we have to rely on other countries. And so we have to have a change in D.C. We have got to have President Trump back in office. We need to get the course reversed that we are on.”_ You can watch the full Fox & Friends interview by [here](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=a615e4ef350045598060a3f108bab4ab&_e=iubNcVmrUL_75ZnIHPb7Y9sQzMNpkhYWE4q3B4ctlqiABV7i3f1VuSdX4B6MGawASi5SDzh8zHtsBIEbOCz2UnexQZRut6vAH9YEEOjf9L8QnvBL8DuYtWmu9RTqmwMZCrs6WJ2h7lswhfnBlPBraSs23pQaXRikuoZi_fUPcGfzTBoupNTc61pE4KbGkD8Cqt3vVnhuu6D73mEJ6Ncw1cROdv3ybXHxawWHMhdLSddWawJjul6PTETRT7IZnii3m23NBDLrzr9K_5hFskkhwqSNZAo7N_-E101HlKOERRY%3D).

|
---
**My Opinion Piece With Townhall**
---
In case you missed it, I penned an [opinion piece with Townhall](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a8e41c2a970b44d0a291e2cbf8512a7f&_m=a615e4ef350045598060a3f108bab4ab&_e=iubNcVmrUL_75ZnIHPb7Y9sQzMNpkhYWE4q3B4ctlqiABV7i3f1VuSdX4B6MGawAyzpvlKlVX9YzGmFupoOsf3iM-GHw0n0KpOwhZHtY4qx1lcmUeZjWtao3QYdcX3nst7EdijDVk5vpV_uOGaEnfL8ao8sMjDseHZlHbwcUt0IGqP5Zvkve8lzVo7d0Wi1mMrlh99hBqXECNcS9P625T8CW1n-8xdbnLv38n4wK3a7RDsKrE8trPFP8IDehSk1fjQsT4-CSI_WdF9mIm-B3Pzpjg9357itItinuG_moQP4%3D) on my recent visit to the wide-open southern border in Yuma, Arizona. As the Biden-Peltola border crisis rages on with no end in sight and a lackluster border order coming out of the White House, it has become clear that the Democrats are derelict in their duty to secure America. The open border has turned every state into a border state, including Alaska, and is allowing the flow of fentanyl into the nation via cartel smugglers. In my piece, noted that U.S. national security is in jeopardy under the backwards policies of Joe Biden and Mary Peltola, the brazenness of hundreds of illegal migrants crossing over unfettered, and the food security crisis that can arise from the border disaster.

clean_body: | | | Did you hear the great news? I am thrilled to have received President Donald J. Trump's endorsement this week! I'm thankful for his endorsement and look forward to working with him in Washington to Make America Great Again. We've all felt the effects of Democrat mismanagement under the Biden/Peltola agenda. Our southern border is in disarray, our dollars don't go as far as they used to, and our adversaries are emboldened across the globe. Now more than ever, we need real conservative leadership in Washington to right the ship. It's time to defeat Mary Peltola and ensure Alaska has a true leader in Congress once more. Your support is crucial in this fight for our future. Thank you for standing with me. Together, we can live up to our state’s promise – North to the Future. Warm regards, Nancy Dahlstrom Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large | I am honored to have received support from leaders across Alaska and our country, especially from former President and Republican Presidential nominee, Donald J. Trump! We must rebuild our country and work together to do it. | | | President Trump Endorses My Campaign This week, President Donald J. Trump endorsed my run for the at-large congressional seat currently occupied by Mary Peltola. "Nancy is a proven fighter! In Congress, she will work to Secure the Border, Create Jobs, Lower Taxes, Promote American Energy Independence, Support our Incredible Military and Police Officers, and Defend our always under siege Second Amendment." -President Donald J. Trump | My Interview with Fox & Friends Last week, I joined my fellow Elevate PAC (E-PAC) candidates for a panel discussion on Fox & Friends to discuss my campaign and the importance of electing conservative women leaders into office. Republican women are in the middle of a political Renaissance and are defying the liberal media’s stereotype that women always fall in line with the Democratic Party. I spoke on the wide-open southern border, Joe Biden’s executive orders targeting Alaska, and more. “We’re an oil and gas state, we’re a mining state, we have all kind of minerals and things here that the entire country needs, and we need those things for many reasons, not just production but also for national security. If we don’t have those things in our country, we have to rely on other countries. And so we have to have a change in D.C. We have got to have President Trump back in office. We need to get the course reversed that we are on.” You can watch the full Fox & Friends interview by . | My Opinion Piece With Townhall In case you missed it, I penned an on my recent visit to the wide-open southern border in Yuma, Arizona. As the Biden-Peltola border crisis rages on with no end in sight and a lackluster border order coming out of the White House, it has become clear that the Democrats are derelict in their duty to secure America. The open border has turned every state into a border state, including Alaska, and is allowing the flow of fentanyl into the nation via cartel smugglers. In my piece, noted that U.S. national security is in jeopardy under the backwards policies of Joe Biden and Mary Peltola, the brazenness of hundreds of illegal migrants crossing over unfettered, and the food security crisis that can arise from the border disaster. “Everything I witnessed made it clear that Joe Biden and his Democrat lackeys, like Mary Peltola, are failing our nation and Alaska by leaving our border open. The chaos and lack of leadership has led to 85,000 migrant children unaccounted for, with fears they are currently being trafficked. We are simply not equipped to handle this disaster, yet Democrats continue to support policies that encourage illegal immigration and welcome these criminals with open arms.” Read the full piece in Townhall . | | | | Purchase one of our campaign's bumper stickers today, and let everyone on the road know you're heading North to The Future! Grab yours | Mary Peltola was recently asked if she agreed with the Trump trial verdict. Her answer? ⬇️ "I gotta go." Her response is a stark contrast to the outrage felt by Alaskans who see through this politically motivated facade. The American people are tired of the left's use of our legal system as a political weapon. We need representatives who will stand up against these injustices, and not shy away from tough questions. Alaska deserves better. It's time for Mary Peltola to go. | Thanks for checking out the latest edition of the Dahlstrom Dispatch! Together, we WILL take back our conservative voice in Congress. Can't contribute financially? Don't worry! There are plenty of other ways to get involved. | | | | Was this email forwarded to you? If so, below to sign up for our Dahlstrom Dispatch and never miss a beat! | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | |

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87435856/481136370/-120062714?refcode=WTEFER53_20240623_MatchLaunch_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1054071&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2ZlNjg0MS03MTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkmIi4xHPjALMOaW2Do28Z4OWSY8tFEoYCUk5zMpalE=) Peter, _tomorrow marks two years since the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade__ , ending our constitutional right to abortion and jeopardizing the freedoms of millions of Americans.

**We know that when choice is on the ballot, choice wins, and we won't stop fighting back until our rights are restored.**

That's why, on this two-year anniversary, we're launching our **Fight Back Fund** to help elect Democratic pro-choice women nationwide who will DEFEND and EXPAND reproductive freedom for every American. **[Every donation between now and midnight on Tuesday, June 25, will be MATCHED! **_Roe_ was just the beginning for anti-choice Republicans. **Look at how much destruction they've caused in just two years:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87435899/481136409/-1084675668?refcode=WTEFER53_20240623_MatchLaunch_PL_v1s3&sourceid=1054071&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzY2ZlNjg0MS03MTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xkmIi4xHPjALMOaW2Do28Z4OWSY8tFEoYCUk5zMpalE=)
Nearly one in three American women of reproductive age live in a state where abortion is banned or mostly banned. That's unacceptable, Peter.

And anti-choice Republicans aren't stopping there. They're now going after FDA-approved abortion medication, in vitro fertilization (IVF), and even birth control. We need leaders who will stand up to these extremists, stop them in their tracks, and restore our rights.

name: Angela Alsobrooks
subject: the longest email I’ll ever send you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/27049?t=1009&amount=25&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ][IMG]

Peter, this is probably the longest email you’ll ever get from
me.

But it’s also one of the most important, so it really would mean a lot to
me if you could read through it.

If you’re in a hurry or if you’re already sold and ready to do whatever it
takes to help me defeat Larry Hogan and defend our Senate majority,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/27049?t=1010&amount=25&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]then please consider making a quick grassroots contribution to help us
start the general election with some serious momentum!

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/27049?t=1011&amount=25&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]Donate

I want to outline our campaign message going forward for the General
Election to fill Maryland’s open U.S. Senate seat. It hinges on 3 major
components:

Power to the People

This campaign has never been about me,
Peter. It’s always been about
Marylanders, our families, and our communities.

And when Republican Larry Hogan entered the race putting our Democratic
Senate majority at risk, it became about the future of the entire country.

That’s why national Republicans are pouring millions of dollars into this
race. But during the Democratic Primary, we proved that Maryland is won by
the many, not by the money.

We’ve never had limitless resources, million dollar checks, or shady dark
money super PACs pulling the strings. Instead, we built a grassroots
coalition of people in every corner of the state who stepped up to
volunteer, donate, and talk to their neighbors about our campaign.

Your time and your contributions were the driving force behind our primary
victory, and we need to continue building on that in order to win in
November.

Focus on the Issues that Matter

While Republicans are lining up to get behind Donald Trump and his
divisive MAGA agenda, we're focusing on the issues that matter most to
people — like protecting abortion rights, improving wages, and preserving
our democracy.

My Republican opponent Larry Hogan hopes Marylanders won’t remember that
as governor, he vetoed legislation that would have expanded access to
abortion care throughout the state.

He’s banking on Marylanders forgetting that he vetoed a $15 minimum wage
and legislation to benefit unions and workers.

He’s hoping Marylanders won’t realize that electing him means handing
control of the Senate over to extremists like Ted Cruz and Lindsey Graham.

On the issues that matter most, Hogan’s record speaks for itself: He’s all
wrong for Maryland, and he’ll say and do whatever he thinks will win him
this seat.

Make the Case for a Democratic Senate Majority

Here’s the truth,
Peter: There simply isn’t any
way Democrats maintain our razor-thin Senate majority if Larry Hogan wins
this open seat.

Mitch McConnell handpicked Hogan for this race because he sees Maryland as
his best chance to flip a seat, retake the majority, and enact his
far-right, anti-choice agenda.

If the GOP retakes the Senate, they'll have the power to pass a national
abortion ban, roll back environmental protections, undermine our
elections, and so much more.

Hogan has proven that he cannot be trusted to protect our reproductive
rights or put Maryland families first. Defending the Senate is the only
way to protect our freedoms, uplift working families, and preserve our
democracy.

We’ve got a winning message that’s resonating with voters,
Peter, and I need your support
to make sure everyone hears it. [ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/27049?t=1012&amount=25&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]Can I count on you to chip in $25 to
give our grassroots team the resources we need to reach Marylanders across
the state?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/27049?t=1013&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]Chip in $25
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/27049?t=1014&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]Chip in $50
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/27049?t=1015&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]Chip in $100
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/27049?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=200&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]Chip in $200
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/27049?t=1007&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]Chip in $250
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/27049?t=1008&amount=35&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]Other Amount

Thank you for taking the time to read this, Peter.

Together,

Angela Alsobrooks

[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=1001&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ][IMG]

We believe that emails are the best way for our organization to stay in
touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails,
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=1002&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]click here.
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/115?t=1003&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]Text JOIN to 74064 to receive SMS updates
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4693?t=1004&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]Chip in a one-time donation
[ https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/4694?t=1005&akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra ]Chip in a monthly recurring donation!

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1885%2E52803%2EldQrra

Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
Alsobrooks for Senate
PO Box 6058
Largo, MD 20792

name: Team McCormick
subject: Bob Casey’s vote is never in question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
What a rubberstamp politician looks like
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5a93cd3523c046aba0650867e8a4dc6c&_e=VCuvWI6kwjm0x17YoYFO8qib8RLhZqzx8uAucWYhKCWXcP5b2M6AHQRBjIlaga0BnZkipI8b4ZOyEvpjbW0-9kUltPriRvAe8rJi_jNd118xUeezi6tWuZNPlH2cTwbzfmLbc5EvW65wecLCIwVRdbHtcZnhrhQmw3rf9jnPR1w8ItMJZG4xICGq5_J2YjwmNJp_NkCs5cek0nRfNAZ5pFvYUYy5hcbCZSWMVAPyPbShN13V-OYVNxmcf6wuJYOOUsyV_M2QjbyH1dgJSGG-vVYmt9GRA8QpWsoRuDt0UL_the7i4rdGlKJEaHR2VN0pWSqcJBp4NTL0CZCg0mww7qO_aPmxzOx5M0ELg8T02DXbKxgAA9i9e8feAkiQqq1gG0pOSaUDDqJjNox2gcSRNg%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

We're tired of politicians promising one thing but doing the exact opposite in Washington.

And we are certainly tired of having Joe Biden's army of rubber stamps in the Senate who fall in line without question.

Just look at Bob Casey. You know at one point he told Pennsylvanians he'd be "truly independent?"

He even went as far to say, "Being a rubber stamp for the president is NOT in the best interest of the people of America."

Now, that's laughable.

**At this very moment, he votes with Biden 98% of the time!** In fact, no one ever questions how Bob Casey will vote because he always votes along party lines.

**Pennsylvania deserves more than a rubber stamp for Biden's failed policies.

That is why we need to bring in a battle-tested leader who will fight for _you._

_And we have just that leader in Dave McCormick._**
[RUSH SUPPORT TO DAVE->](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5a93cd3523c046aba0650867e8a4dc6c&_e=VCuvWI6kwjm0x17YoYFO8qib8RLhZqzx8uAucWYhKCWXcP5b2M6AHQRBjIlaga0BnZkipI8b4ZOyEvpjbW0-9kUltPriRvAe8rJi_jNd118xUeezi6tWuZNPlH2cTwbzfmLbc5EvW65wecLCIwVRdbHtcZnhrhQmw3rf9jnPR1w8ItMJZG4xICGq5_J2YjwmNJp_NkCs5cek0nRfNAZ5pFvYUYy5hcbCZSWMVAPyPbShN13V-OYVNxmcf6wuJYOOlRQ3iSJkPOnnPyo2ILHLXN3h5J1FBCZfWVRb_hENXVb-wOUEdBkfusjfgJ3whactsa4gonBeb34-CgIB2x-WMmaaMu4BqQwN-JuVDwteRInrA2P6MFpGI1VginD-hMmDdd9U2nIDot-MB4YPFK5qig%3D%3D)
---
Republicans across the nation are uniting behind Dave McCormick because he is our best chance at winning this fight to secure our future. This isn't just about Pennsylvania - Democrats only hold the Senate Majority by ONE SEAT and what happens in this race will define the future of our nation.

The choice has never been clearer, %%=Propercase(first_name_most_recent)=%%.

**[If you're ready to be a part of the change that Pennsylvania and our country so desperately needs, please chip in $25 today. That is the best way you can make a difference.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5a93cd3523c046aba0650867e8a4dc6c&_e=VCuvWI6kwjm0x17YoYFO8qib8RLhZqzx8uAucWYhKCWXcP5b2M6AHQRBjIlaga0BnZkipI8b4ZOyEvpjbW0-9kUltPriRvAe8rJi_jNd118xUeezi6tWuZNPlH2cTwbzfmLbc5EvW65wecLCIwVRdbHtcZnhrhQmw3rf9jnPR1w8ItMJZG4xICGq5_J2YjwmNJp_NkCs5cek0nRfNAZ5pFvYUYy5hcbCZSWMVAPyPbShN13V-OYVNxmcf6wuJYOOGnXdIadkIIY7iNoc8v60ItPWsXKg0vChX9vZzdAlxnDx2sVX187qAoyxRvhGyRox-ofECQKzJnXKScAtlDr7qWsySqLbciFib2aqzWE-I_s5pDCo1av_P64rVjlPFT59sY1d3BpHFAzpJ-TLGHgViA%3D%3D)**

We can't do this without help from grassroots supporters like you. Your donation of any amount, **_[no matter if it's $1 or $100](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5a93cd3523c046aba0650867e8a4dc6c&_e=VCuvWI6kwjm0x17YoYFO8qib8RLhZqzx8uAucWYhKCWXcP5b2M6AHQRBjIlaga0BnZkipI8b4ZOyEvpjbW0-9kUltPriRvAe8rJi_jNd118xUeezi6tWuZNPlH2cTwbzfmLbc5EvW65wecLCIwVRdbHtcZnhrhQmw3rf9jnPR1w8ItMJZG4xICGq5_J2YjwmNJp_NkCs5cek0nRfNAZ5pFvYUYy5hcbCZSWMVAPyPbShN13V-OYVNxmcf6wuJYOOEBJIqCBUM_Vhu150g7jEcrtNE_ny7Z13E6wY4TNydnLVX33Btd-_G255Wew__mw8pyYwdUBer1rXCz2zpE9zgphSfFJWW5J2fgMy023Sy61ttoCJ2bqcGWnThaHNRe3rQkEkD7vcOxYE_rKWutC6Ng%3D%3D)_**, will help us elect Dave to the U.S. Senate.

Friend, As the first Muslim woman elected to the Michigan State Legislature and one of the first Muslim women elected to Congress, my whole career has been about breaking down barriers—and then keeping the doors wide open behind me for more progressive people to follow. That’s why I’m proud to endorse four candidates for Michigan State Representative who are rooted in their communities and who will continue to champion housing justice, environmental justice, and economic justice so our government works for everyone, not just the wealthy few. **With ballots for Michigan’s August 6th primary getting mailed to voters tomorrow, every day is Election Day for the next six weeks.** These candidates don’t take money from corporate PACs, and they need our grassroots support now. [**Split a donation today between Rima, Tonya, Dylan, and Layla and help send these champions of working class and marginalized communities to the state capitol to fight for \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Sat, Jun 22, 2024
Subject: Support Unbought Elected Officials
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
In Michigan, ballots for our August 6th primary will begin mailing this Monday. Four courageous candidates for State Representative need our urgent support.
**Each candidate is a champion of working class and marginalized communities, fighting for an economy that puts people first, rather than billionaires and corporations.** Each candidate is calling for a permanent ceasefire to save lives, recognizing the humanity of all people—including Palestinians and all of their constituents.
We need more people in public office at all levels who value life, stand up for human rights, and clearly denounce war crimes. In this time when dehumanization is endangering our communities, it’s vital to keep elected officials in office (and put more people into office!) who see everyone as worthy of life and of dignity.
