**Dylan Wegela** is a sitting member of the Michigan Legislature, a school teacher, and one of only 24 Michigan legislators who sent a letter to President Biden last November demanding a permanent ceasefire. In a state where 93% of state lawmakers have taken money from the utility monopoly DTE, Dylan is championing legislation to ban utility corporations from giving political contributions.
**Tonya Myers Phillips** is an attorney for economic and social justice. She has helped hundreds of people save their homes from foreclosure, successfully changed state law to support people at risk of closure, and led a successful campaign to pass the Detroit Right to Counsel Ordinance for people facing eviction. To protect tenants across the state, she helped get a statewide Right to Counsel bill introduced last year. A fierce advocate for criminal justice reform, she also led Detroit's first "Community Court" jail diversion program.
**Rima Mohammad** is an educator and a healthcare worker who emigrated to the U.S. as a refugee, with parents who are Palestinian refugees. She’s running for State Representative to ensure all of our voices are heard in the state capitol. A School Board member, she’s committed to protecting our rights to access quality public education, as well as affordable healthcare and clean water.
**Layla Taha** is a public health advocate and community organizer with an organizing background in voting rights and reproductive freedom. She helped enshrine abortion as a right in our state’s constitution. Layla is running for State Representative to make sure folks in Lansing prioritize people over profits.
[**Join me in supporting these four courageous candidates for Michigan State Representative today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsXu0R1XDWRVJnEMC9_ePsJQe5TvelZREm9mm2AjNkKmWQeOTvMOMcZP8jPvtop1iXHjueshYjBt6VSZ-Ly9H6p6ptIiek2kxe5OyOzh6WoKPck8Yq6j3QTd9tgAJFx86qePdsxJW_U6nOSHctrd4SrQUMzCVzVCLl6iNK6G-FQ2kKTvGnLV006ZNvc55oye9jbsaE6xutEkodVVYRDcDSVVB7m2inQNXxIOvuzgrXsN97NUNo9QkeH8i2YuKsfVwZ1roCi-21WgpvhLcNl5XuNY6aC7Ag6ubRcGtIn-O3yfqju2GTD7hrVeVQV8ZYUW3oPwcO0A79s_Sp9eDkf25kOchs3JlHFwVHl9AXqfXHBRQChNbGnJKZswX4XNUQYj5dUzGu8kipOXIZoyC6webjPKSr7WeK94o00n_lsdiiaTzeRBjcozjs7MJydVkHfwN7qwfrSsb603EMOnYu1HJBXbGtBpR9ep2OaZu6VNy5soFFacVmDyG2QObFQMnpubRY/47g/wni9B3O-SuWp9qq-rAf4sw/h12/h001.SpXvtkiWF0He--MFdyjs6hv9xJ4BhlPp2_1vaCn2Gno)

clean_body: I’m proud to endorse four candidates for Michigan State Representative who are rooted in community. | | | Friend, As the first Muslim woman elected to the Michigan State Legislature and one of the first Muslim women elected to Congress, my whole career has been about breaking down barriers—and then keeping the doors wide open behind me for more progressive people to follow. That’s why I’m proud to endorse four candidates for Michigan State Representative who are rooted in their communities and who will continue to champion housing justice, environmental justice, and economic justice so our government works for everyone, not just the wealthy few. With ballots for Michigan’s August 6th primary getting mailed to voters tomorrow, every day is Election Day for the next six weeks. These candidates don’t take money from corporate PACs, and they need our grassroots support now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Dylan Wegela, Layla Taha, Tonya Myers-Phillips, and Rima Mohammad | | | | | | | | | | The promise of a true multi-racial democracy is within our reach. Thank you for your support today, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Jun 22, 2024 Subject: Support Unbought Elected Officials To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, In Michigan, ballots for our August 6th primary will begin mailing this Monday. Four courageous candidates for State Representative need our urgent support. Each candidate is a champion of working class and marginalized communities, fighting for an economy that puts people first, rather than billionaires and corporations. Each candidate is calling for a permanent ceasefire to save lives, recognizing the humanity of all people—including Palestinians and all of their constituents. We need more people in public office at all levels who value life, stand up for human rights, and clearly denounce war crimes. In this time when dehumanization is endangering our communities, it’s vital to keep elected officials in office (and put more people into office!) who see everyone as worthy of life and of dignity. Dylan Wegela is a sitting member of the Michigan Legislature, a school teacher, and one of only 24 Michigan legislators who sent a letter to President Biden last November demanding a permanent ceasefire. In a state where 93% of state lawmakers have taken money from the utility monopoly DTE, Dylan is championing legislation to ban utility corporations from giving political contributions. Tonya Myers Phillips is an attorney for economic and social justice. She has helped hundreds of people save their homes from foreclosure, successfully changed state law to support people at risk of closure, and led a successful campaign to pass the Detroit Right to Counsel Ordinance for people facing eviction. To protect tenants across the state, she helped get a statewide Right to Counsel bill introduced last year. A fierce advocate for criminal justice reform, she also led Detroit's first "Community Court" jail diversion program. Rima Mohammad is an educator and a healthcare worker who emigrated to the U.S. as a refugee, with parents who are Palestinian refugees. She’s running for State Representative to ensure all of our voices are heard in the state capitol. A School Board member, she’s committed to protecting our rights to access quality public education, as well as affordable healthcare and clean water. Layla Taha is a public health advocate and community organizer with an organizing background in voting rights and reproductive freedom. She helped enshrine abortion as a right in our state’s constitution. Layla is running for State Representative to make sure folks in Lansing prioritize people over profits. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Dylan Wegela, Layla Taha, Tonya Myers-Phillips, and Rima Mohammad | | | | | | | | | Together, let’s send these champions for human and civil rights to the state capitol to fight for us. Always serving you, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . body:
https://www.trisha4colorado.com [https://www.trisha4colorado.com]
Hi Peter,
According to Politico, a poll shows what my team and I have known all along: we have a clear path to victory here in CO-04.
However, that path to victory requires the resources to reach voters where they are. That’s where you come in, Peter. Will you consider chipping in $10, $25, or $50 to help us connect with CO-04 voters and finally oust Lauren Boebert from Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/uplift-trishacalvarese?refcode=x_062324_politicoarticle_rs]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/uplift-trishacalvarese?refcode=x_062324_politicoarticle_rs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/uplift-trishacalvarese?refcode=x_062324_politicoarticle_rs]
Before we kick Boebert out of office, we’re up against Lauren Boebert's seat-warmer, Greg Lopez, in the Special General Election, and the Democratic Primary, on Tuesday, June 25th. If you’re counting, that’s just a few weeks away.
Lopez said he would stand aside for Bobert to run in November. It is like writing her name on someone else’s work.
But the grades are in and it looks like I’ve got a pretty good chance at flipping this district.
I’m excited to put that poll on the fridge but to get my name on the November ballot, I have to win our primary this Tuesday, June 25th. Would you consider pitching in to help get there? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/uplift-trishacalvarese?refcode=x_062324_politicoarticle_rs]
The past few years have felt like the school of hard knocks for many families in C0-04, including my own. But I’m a quick study — and ready to represent your voice in Congress.

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, According to Politico, a poll shows what my team and I have known all along: we have a clear path to victory here in CO-04. However, that path to victory requires the resources to reach voters where they are. That’s where you come in, Peter. Will you consider chipping in $10, $25, or $50 to help us connect with CO-04 voters and finally oust Lauren Boebert from Congress? [] [] Before we kick Boebert out of office, we’re up against Lauren Boebert's seat-warmer, Greg Lopez, in the Special General Election, and the Democratic Primary, on Tuesday, June 25th. If you’re counting, that’s just a few weeks away. Lopez said he would stand aside for Bobert to run in November. It is like writing her name on someone else’s work. But the grades are in and it looks like I’ve got a pretty good chance at flipping this district. I’m excited to put that poll on the fridge but to get my name on the November ballot, I have to win our primary this Tuesday, June 25th. Would you consider pitching in to help get there? [] The past few years have felt like the school of hard knocks for many families in C0-04, including my own. But I’m a quick study — and ready to represent your voice in Congress. [] [] Will you stand with me? [] DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] DONATE OTHER [] Thank you, Trisha [] Trisha Calvarese is a Colorado native who grew up in Sterling and Highlands Ranch. Fellow American,
**My parents weren’t the kind of people who put half-effort into anything.** They put everything on the line to escape communist Cuba. And when they got to America, they did _whatever_ it took to make it here. My parents instilled the same values of hard work and dedication to your country in me - _**and those are the same values I see in President Trump.**_ He doesn’t mince his words or put half of him into his job. He gives EVERYTHING he can to make our country great, and _that’s why I’m proud to support him for President._

body:
Pennsylvania deserves better
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=85eb770956c9436b8edcc37131d87873&_e=SJbPjpTNeaaSRFz_ClIuReQMNh8lRLS2_yZMw_nKnY5Ka2Xk6T1P5z40wmNWksvgQqK33xd-dioV0VVsuGK8ZK27h1KFLsQbpSe5amsUzAYRpYKy02Utjc4sSDAGEeg3_u3hXMbOaDTa8bLNWdTT4nASC5bpOqg8Qq4CGqu7ETivEcyEHYO41aeeBUUHCwV6oQhU1ocgNz8-ejBW_4DS9tPBZ1DXpN781pKCJcsI9zu0Yf32jT7W6ucA1jsECSn5es5F7RJ1uFsdFEDxGVoOyxMW66wWOc4g36fBO9n4phaf4puUhdvXo8pxGVOr8Lq-nQu7ZsMmjA_i2koXaSR2Pg63a_l--xU6SJJsVXeb1daVO7_V2cYBjQLlKOQfaPvSybAFInlDdkWOA_jJPFpTsA%3D%3D)

Peter,

We're tired of politicians promising one thing but doing the exact opposite in Washington.

And we are certainly tired of having Joe Biden's army of rubber stamps in the Senate who fall in line without question.

Just look at Bob Casey. You know at one point he told Pennsylvanians he'd be "truly independent?"

He even went as far to say, "Being a rubber stamp for the president is NOT in the best interest of the people of America."

Now, that's laughable.

**At this very moment, he votes with Biden 98% of the time!** In fact, no one ever questions how Bob Casey will vote because he always votes along party lines.

**Pennsylvania deserves more than a rubber stamp for Biden's failed policies.

That is why we need to bring in a battle-tested leader who will fight for _you._

_And we have just that leader in Dave McCormick._**
[RUSH SUPPORT TO DAVE->](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=85eb770956c9436b8edcc37131d87873&_e=SJbPjpTNeaaSRFz_ClIuReQMNh8lRLS2_yZMw_nKnY5Ka2Xk6T1P5z40wmNWksvgQqK33xd-dioV0VVsuGK8ZK27h1KFLsQbpSe5amsUzAYRpYKy02Utjc4sSDAGEeg3_u3hXMbOaDTa8bLNWdTT4nASC5bpOqg8Qq4CGqu7ETivEcyEHYO41aeeBUUHCwV6oQhU1ocgNz8-ejBW_4DS9tPBZ1DXpN781pKCJcsI9zu0Yf32jT7W6ucA1jsECSn53XBSu10vqSiqFGocOOqdlC9uP9mcjytlQY6Vairdk9OKl67467LXvyut6XDNsq8NKgnUL5krJEcH0kU5WJLF1kaZhMutjeJaZ30wR48Bccv0Nk79hxDvtZMyX424Ac5XguuHhDp_QEsUhY1xClu62w%3D%3D)
---
Republicans across the nation are uniting behind Dave McCormick because he is our best chance at winning this fight to secure our future. This isn't just about Pennsylvania - Democrats only hold the Senate Majority by ONE SEAT and what happens in this race will define the future of our nation.

The choice has never been clearer, %%=Propercase(first_name_most_recent)=%%.

**[If you're ready to be a part of the change that Pennsylvania and our country so desperately needs, please chip in $25 today. That is the best way you can make a difference.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=85eb770956c9436b8edcc37131d87873&_e=SJbPjpTNeaaSRFz_ClIuReQMNh8lRLS2_yZMw_nKnY5Ka2Xk6T1P5z40wmNWksvgQqK33xd-dioV0VVsuGK8ZK27h1KFLsQbpSe5amsUzAYRpYKy02Utjc4sSDAGEeg3_u3hXMbOaDTa8bLNWdTT4nASC5bpOqg8Qq4CGqu7ETivEcyEHYO41aeeBUUHCwV6oQhU1ocgNz8-ejBW_4DS9tPBZ1DXpN781pKCJcsI9zu0Yf32jT7W6ucA1jsECSn5kjfOKn_zc0Ou0U27eirIPnfhtUmyoxoWzR_TjB4rs-SwooxEi7AqeIvdg9IQi3SOXcvWavd_gI8dyPZ___P91aWP_qAz3Ff5m1YtP-Fzdnj0BK4CuN573k3rDtu1owyuFYU7QHGzrlSowYeNnpxC1Q%3D%3D)**

We can't do this without help from grassroots supporters like you. Your donation of any amount, **_[no matter if it's $1 or $100](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=85eb770956c9436b8edcc37131d87873&_e=SJbPjpTNeaaSRFz_ClIuReQMNh8lRLS2_yZMw_nKnY5Ka2Xk6T1P5z40wmNWksvgQqK33xd-dioV0VVsuGK8ZK27h1KFLsQbpSe5amsUzAYRpYKy02Utjc4sSDAGEeg3_u3hXMbOaDTa8bLNWdTT4nASC5bpOqg8Qq4CGqu7ETivEcyEHYO41aeeBUUHCwV6oQhU1ocgNz8-ejBW_4DS9tPBZ1DXpN781pKCJcsI9zu0Yf32jT7W6ucA1jsECSn5x5-3As5jPd5BEytnKmYcuH0kot70VjKdMOsKVg55YhTp97E87CNAuAyQggqjZbNx98mVhrhIu1CcY9fe-XWjI8z7T0tVbYmVlp_XPBGHnRL4uBhElPlEnn9CXFr0e184EyGAj-57sipQiMHFC2y7CA%3D%3D)_**, will help us elect Dave to the U.S. Senate.

Thank you in advance.

-Team McCormick Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick.

PO BOX 23537
PITTSBURGH, PA 15222

name: Tim Kaine
subject: I officially have an opponent:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Folks, the primary results are in and I have some important updates to share. But before I get into that, I have to ask: **[Will you become a General Election Founding Donor of my re-election campaign by splitting a $5 donation between me and the DSCC right now? This is going to be a tough fight, and we need you by our side to defeat our opponents.](https://go.dscc.org/go/18316?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)**

I want to start by sharing how _profoundly grateful_ I am to officially be your Democratic nominee for the United States Senate. I've been serving the Commonwealth for my entire adult life — in my career as a civil rights lawyer, on Richmond City Council, as Mayor of Richmond, as Lieutenant Governor and Governor of Virginia, and now as U.S. Senator — and my passion for this work only grows with each year. Thank you for everything you've done to support me over the years and during this election cycle, which will be the most consequential in our lifetime. We can only make progress by working together, so it means the world to me to have you on this team.

**Now, let's talk about my opponent.**

Virginia Republicans have nominated Hung Cao to run against me. Cao is a MAGA extremist through and through:

* He's endorsed by Donald Trump.
* He would be an automatic vote for a national abortion ban, and wants to dismantle the Affordable Care Act and put Social Security and Medicare on the chopping block.
* He wants to release and even _seek compensation for_ convicted January 6th insurrectionists.

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/18316?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)
Cao isn't new to Virginia politics — in 2022, he ran against my friend Jennifer Wexton in VA's 10th Congressional District and proved himself as a strong grassroots fundraiser, bringing in millions of dollars even as other Republican candidates, often with more national support, struggled to do the same.

This time around, Cao won't be hurting for national support. He's Trump's hand-picked candidate, and you can bet that the rest of the GOP will be right behind him funneling millions of dollars to Virginia in the push to unseat me.

**[We cannot afford to get complacent with a candidate like Hung Cao on the ballot, so I'm asking you to split a donation between me and the DSCC right now to become a General Election Founding Donor of my re-election campaign and defend the Senate.](https://go.dscc.org/go/18316?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)**

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately and be split between Kaine for Virginia and the DSCC.

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/18316?amount=5&t=9&amount=5&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)
---
| [Donate $10](https://go.dscc.org/go/18316?amount=5&t=10&amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)
---
| [Donate $20](https://go.dscc.org/go/18316?amount=5&t=11&amount=20&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)
---
| [Other Amount](https://go.dscc.org/go/18316?amount=5&t=12&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)
---

Look, I'm running for re-election because I love Virginia. I love the people of this Commonwealth, from Abingdon to Arlington and everywhere in between, and I believe in us.

In the face of a Republican Party that's hellbent on tearing down our rights and even our very democracy, I believe we are and will continue to be _stand-up_ people. We stand up for what's right, for economic opportunity, for democracy and equality, and for each other.

I am determined to win re-election this year in part because my opponent has made it clear that he is not a stand-up leader. It's clear even from how he operates on the campaign trail — refusing to attend a candidate forum in Abingdon because he deemed it "ridonkulous" to drive there from his home in Northern Virginia and ridiculing the Staunton newspaper as "podunk"?? That's not the leadership our Commonwealth deserves.

**Right now, I need your support to defeat my extremist opponent and keep my seat in the Senate — because we've got a lot more work left to do in this fight to stand up for each other.**

**Will you become a General Election Founding Donor? You can contribute to me and the DSCC at this link:[www.dscc.org/KaineFoundingDonor](https://go.dscc.org/go/18316?amount=5&t=13&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)**

Thank you so much — from the bottom of my heart.

Now let's go win this!

-Tim Kaine

Tim Kaine
U.S. Senator, Virginia

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/18316?amount=5&t=14&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)

Tim Kaine is running for re-election to continue standing up for Virginia, lower everyday costs, and safeguard our freedoms.
_**[Chip in now to help keep Virginia's seat blue and defend our Democratic Senate majority >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/18316?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)**_

| | [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/18316?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20240623-TimKaine-TKPostPrimaryTandem-Pros-sl1&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)
---
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2024-q2?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=15470_9716520_rU1yCc&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=15470%2E9716520%2ErU1yCc)** to unsubscribe.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Raja Krishnamoorthi
subject: as of 11am
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:

body:
That’s how much time we have left until our June FEC fundraising deadline.
#

**One week.**
That’s how much time we have left until our June FEC fundraising deadline.
**$3.**
That’s the amount we’re asking you to contribute to GIFFORDS PAC today to help us reach our quarterly goals.
[**What do you say? Will you make that $3 contribution right now?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240623-1-30&t=1&akid=8356%2E3935704%2EQB4yVV)
**[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240623-1-30&amount=3&t=2&akid=8356%2E3935704%2EQB4yVV)**
All of our fundraising deadlines are crucial to our success, but our quarterly deadlines are especially important. After next week’s June quarterly deadline, our fundraising numbers will be released **_publicly.**_ This means that both friends and foes will be able to scan our numbers, and they’ll be using them to judge the strength of our movement for gun safety.
You, Gabby, and all of us here at GIFFORDS know that our movement is stronger than ever. But it’s up to us to prove it to everyone who will be watching us.
[**So please, make a $3 contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today ahead of next week’s June FEC deadline.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june24.gd3XnS&refcode=em240623-1-30&t=3&akid=8356%2E3935704%2EQB4yVV)

Friend,

This is very serious, and I am coming to you first because I know you will not sit on the sidelines and let the radical left manipulate you with their murderous agenda.

That's right. Murderous. As in, they don't mind illegal aliens coming here and murdering American citizens.

But I am taking a stand. And I invite you to take a stand with me. Here and now. THIS MOMENT.

**[Will you make a special donation to my SECURE AMERICA money bomb and help me secure 100,000 online donations before 11:59 pm?](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=59b597f55a36417aad7b32544362355f&_e=8FShpHRWYbd2ScWzYVHHPi75bmdEAwfiYogJyDK-dE3FauvvD2vuG7f0oaorSgwEG27szfVF8xglOwsdVnn9JKSR4w9BVeL_rybcFqif9VO_aempgibk2zBtQ-aee2irzzyy1dYHpjRgyrAlsHwWY0mLb-nD7I6Q_BzE0f1QkI6s2DV636H3I_9GV7NX5-FYVomzU_r3C3KhggLKSkvmLOIUzGM-vkHC9-waaCyixvScWQzkboqMD_4QGLkYD5IiZGDW4x_GmnT9vMEEQlwlp1l3pinkH6_cX0Ma-MXVuAQHwl2wZgt2G808g-U9hl4TADtYZCc84zC44eiMw2AOrbANzdylp6NYaIeu8L9gsKw3nb3VeNNU_RrrnGzpDyRJ5wyTDDa9s_YQ5pe8LJCOcw%3D%3D)**

This asking for funding is literally my very least favorite part of running to retake the Senate and right the course of our nation. I think your money should not have to go towards fixing the government that should be working to serve your best interests and promote human flourishing...but right now, we know that is not the case.

So, I implore you to make a personal sacrifice and stand with me as I face a horrific barrage of demeaning and downright evil attacks and threats.

I won't go into them here. But I do need you to be with me or I fear what will happen with Chuck Schumer still in charge of the greatest deliberative upper chamber of government on the face of the earth.

In short, I need you.

Joe Biden has had how many chances to secure our southern border, and he's taken zero of them.

Do you think he really cares about you? Do you think anyone in his party does?

They. Do. Not.

We must stop them at all costs.

**[Please, I'm counting on you to make a sacrifice today and stand with me or face the consequences of what will happen if we don't!](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=59b597f55a36417aad7b32544362355f&_e=8FShpHRWYbd2ScWzYVHHPi75bmdEAwfiYogJyDK-dE3FauvvD2vuG7f0oaorSgwEG27szfVF8xglOwsdVnn9JKSR4w9BVeL_rybcFqif9VO_aempgibk2zBtQ-aee2irzzyy1dYHpjRgyrAlsHwWY0mLb-nD7I6Q_BzE0f1QkI6s2DV636H3I_9GV7NX5-FYVomzU_r3C3KhggLKSkvmLOIUzGM-vkHC9-waaCyixvScWQzkboqMD_4QGLkYD5IiMXhto-dtBnjP4UOQNq5WNCDBGaUeRe3aH6Lhosfsgo2_43SALNCJlgs75WnkbghEpMeTow-tLU6WHVZ0fmmj1JWMuabQ_migBblrNgjoa8i_cATOtaGHxxrA7Vzt9hEu2gm2d3BEIu31CqxXPZr9Fg%3D%3D)**

| [**DONATE** ](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=59b597f55a36417aad7b32544362355f&_e=8FShpHRWYbd2ScWzYVHHPi75bmdEAwfiYogJyDK-dE3FauvvD2vuG7f0oaorSgwEG27szfVF8xglOwsdVnn9JKSR4w9BVeL_rybcFqif9VO_aempgibk2zBtQ-aee2irzzyy1dYHpjRgyrAlsHwWY0mLb-nD7I6Q_BzE0f1QkI6s2DV636H3I_9GV7NX5-FYVomzU_r3C3KhggLKSkvmLA9mFOLlyyGihlp41q_PiKSAqM4MjLQnleu4QXP2Y_Ec099f1rdh2hhrLbrFgy1SeC7HissaZi-VC9DVMdbl6zqrbSgZyJAjanSQu4rcv88Z1lhHZVatEDjaFerNiVHsxFAGB2KVjNcdFakyaPHG8OQF_IU7lNizOxDeQOyuG3WCQ1D6ALTOKKpB4cT62i2kz3cJRjt8c9hRkiH9LotC_lc%3D)

body:
30,000 Newly Registered Voters Will Change Election Outcomes
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=yK4HWgNgh54qaFrYED0nw-JiMHB5gQJATgiZDl7kOrA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzZiUDE1b0MzdT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)_**
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| |
# In This Newsletter

1. Winning Not Whining
2. We Have Proof: Newly Registered Voter Campaign
3. Granny Caravan Kicks Off To Media Fanfare
4. The Race For Congressional Districts 4 and 5 Update
5. Potpourri: Pro Dems Stuff To Share

---
| | |
---
| | 1\. In Defense Of Our President: Winning, Not Whining
---
| | Imagine raising a child in a house where the only conversation is an obsession with an evil, corrupt person who inflicts pain and misery on others—and this is all they hear, which means it is all they know. There is no place in this house for stories about good, hope, and a better future, only fear. How do you think that child is going to turn out? What will their view of the world be? Let in stories of good, hope, and a better future, or you will manifest your destiny and theirs. We kicked off the [Pledge: Silence = Death](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=RNch_9AvJtrFH8INjNCN1kgzri7o2RbylFIFGRnpf2s.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL2hvbWUvcGxlZGdlIiwiciI6IjdhMTlmMWZjLWM3ZmQtNGM5MS04MzU4LTBlNWRjZjY4YTdhOSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) last week, and thank you to the many people who have responded thus far. Now more than ever, our President needs our support, and the best and easiest way we can do this is by promoting pro-Democrat and pro-Biden information. We can no longer allow the media to profit by pandering to the lowest common denominator and glorifying the Republican opponent, MAGA, and its minions. To earn our marketing dollars and respect, they need to publish news that is worthy, reflective of the good work Biden and Democrats are doing, and engage in fair and accurate reporting. We ensure they do this by withholding our attention from scandalous posts, articles, and news programs, and by directing our subscription dollars, likes, comments, and shares to what is strengthening our country and building a future where we all thrive.
---
| |
---
| | Everywhere we turn, we see the need for us to do better in our management of the media. Last Sunday, while on the stairmaster at the gym, I watched Fox, Fox Sunday Edition, and CNN. Fox was defending Biden against the inaccurate portrayal of him in recent social media posts. Fox Sunday Edition criticized the congressional GOP for blocking Democratic-led legislation to bring ethics standards to the Supreme Court. However, CNN was a steady drumbeat of Trump, Trump, Trump... The Lincoln Project has become well known for their defense of Democratic values, and a person wrote to me saying I should follow their media posts because they "get it right." I looked at the last ten Instagram posts of the Lincoln Project, and every one of them was about Trump, Trump, Trump. Not a good word to be had for the good being done in our great nation by Biden and our Democratic leadership.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=TLXsB_BIXsYX8JYhUE7-utMbh5XviD1XV911EYygrLU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL3NvLzZiUDE1b0MzdT9sYW5ndWFnZVRhZz1lbiIsInIiOiIxMzNhNzRlMC1hNGY3LTRkM2EtOWFiNS1kODVkYjc0ZjFlYjciLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)
---
| | [Harry Sisson](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=tkS7RKDfsugJ9u0-6BOyGOAvm3kyg4lvHNn-dSuOEuY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGlrdG9rLmNvbS9AaGFycnlqc2lzc29uP190PThuSk80RXVzSDNTJl9yPTEiLCJyIjoiNmE0YzliOTItYmFkOC00ZTUxLWFkYzMtMzM2YzIxOTlhZTNhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) is a name you might know, and if you don't, you should look him up. He is young and was one of the strongest proponents of Democratic action among social media influencers. He's been to the White House and recently received accolades from CNN for his work with the youth vote. When he started, he was all about supporting Democrats, but when Democrats switched from promoting Biden to bashing Trump, so did he. Now his feeds are almost exclusively about Trump, with barely a mention of Biden. Not even Biden’s well-paid campaign managers can find anything good to say about him. The Biden campaign is spending $50 million to launch advertisements, like this one, about—you guessed it—Trump. The first three seconds of a video are critical, as 50% of viewers drop off, and another 50% after seven seconds. Biden doesn't appear in his own video until thirteen seconds in!
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=QqdsxwItWEnhA3bagP6hSDDmnzCL-Xezc-ym8y__Bp8.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL2hvbWUvcGxlZGdlIiwiciI6IjZkOTExMDhmLTZhY2QtNDhiNS05Yzk1LTBkN2FmNDZiMWQ3NSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)
---
| | It is our obligation to help turn this around. If the media remains obsessed with Trump and even the Biden Campaign is at a loss for anything good to say about Biden, then the media can reframe any story so that down is literally up, as seen in [polling](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=NL5S8wWlPvnMII0OkKB85OKSnH7DfOAp81oee2EP_nc.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcG9wdWxhcmluZm9ybWF0aW9uL3Avd2h5LXNvLW1hbnktYW1lcmljYW5zLWhhdmUtbWlzY29uY2VwdGlvbnM_cj0yYmd6cHgmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1pb3MiLCJyIjoiZWY3MzRhNTItYTI1Yy00YjhkLWFjNjItYzZjODRjMDNkY2Q2IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMjc3ZTdmNGEtMDBlMy00OGZjLWJiOTctNjU0YjNmYTM3NGE4In0) showing people believe crime is up and the economy is tanking. Sadly, those most consuming this media are Democrats because MAGA supporters are watching media that is pro-Trump and anti-Biden, which looks a lot like too much of the rest of the media right now.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=da_F4iHcqXQpfngFIZHjB6iJ7IW3OV5oBBWvYyCnP8w.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucnVyYWxhbWVyaWNhbnN1bml0ZWQub3JnL2hvbWUvcGxlZGdlIiwiciI6IjkyOGM4NWVkLTRmMWQtNDUxZi1iOWQ0LTM5Y2Q3MTAwN2RjOSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9)
---
| | Pledge Silence = Death
---
| | |
---
| | 2\. We Have Proof: Newly Registered Voter Campaign
---
| | Rural Americans United's Newly Registered Voter Campaign is set to launch this month reaching out to over 30,000 potential new voters. Under the excellent guidance of our steering committee, our database of Washington State voter data is built, we have a list of eager volunteers, we have lined up a union printer, contacted every Democratic party in Central and Eastern Washington with the exception of Columbia County (does anyone have contact information for Columbia County Dems?), submitted two grant requests for additional funding, and confirmed our messaging strategy. Why are we reaching out to newly registered voters? This group is largely composed of youth and new citizens. They have no voting history and will fall outside the boundaries of most campaign strategies. It is strategically imperative that we make first contact, "immunize" them against the far-right and MAGA rhetoric, develop a dialogue with them to offer an alternative and informed option, and include them in the democratic process. Our messaging strategy is not traditionally issues-based, but broader. We believe, and studies support, that the majority of this group, particularly youth, has low knowledge of issues, low interest in specific issues as a driver of their daily decisions, and will find the specificity of healthcare, education, and party politics too obtuse and unrelatable. Instead, we have approached it from a contextual perspective, relating to life events and emotions. Here is the first proof draft. Language and editing are not confirmed, but this should give a good idea of our direction.
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | This project will reach over 30,000 newly registered voters in Central and Eastern Washington. Additionally, we are working with local Democratic parties and organizations to further target specific races and build support for our candidates. We need your support. These are union-printed postcards, and all the labor is volunteer, but it still costs money.
---
| | [](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=mZw0_JZgSJg8HISJN8SNxAjjdOpeK9b1Hdcr9C5dP38.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL25ydiIsInIiOiI2NGFmMTI3MS1kOGIwLTQ4MDktOGFhZi1kZmNhYjg1ODcwOTUiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyNzdlN2Y0YS0wMGUzLTQ4ZmMtYmI5Ny02NTRiM2ZhMzc0YTgifQ)

| | |

| | 3\. Granny Caravan Kicks Off To Media Fanfare
---
| | The Granny Caravan: Unity Road Tour kicked off to much fanfare. Shirley and Roz were featured on [Spokane public radio](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=bRrF1EQXGBizb3Mvk2QZq1B301P8lNBasICwAFfzwLw.) and in local newspapers like the Newport Miner. Stopping in Deer Park and Newport, they met many people who shared their concerns. This information is being collected and will be later summarized for distribution to all candidates. It is important that our candidates hear from people in small communities they otherwise would not. Follow along on their page to see if they will be stopping in your town soon.
---
| |

---
| | |
---
| | 4\. The Race For Congressional Districts 4 and 5 Update
---
| | The Congressional House races for districts 4 and 5 are well underway. With less than two months until the primary, all eyes are on the candidates to see who can "bring it" and make it through to the primary. Both districts 4 and 5 are crowded with Democrats, making it an exceptional challenge for them to reach the general election. We have [outlined a real path to victory](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=ny8DB1DK-jZ9H0rZP8868QOZMs8HDkzAw283lJ1loHk.) for Democrats in congressional district 5, and with this being an open seat, it is a once-in-a-generation opportunity that will determine whether extreme far-right politics continues to strangle rural Washington. However, it appears this is a high-stakes race of personalities rather than party unity, and the future of 1.5 million people living in Central and Eastern Washington is at stake. Below is the FEC reporting of the congressional district 5 campaign contributions for the first quarter of 2024. What I see as encouraging here is that the top Republican candidate has only raised $400,000, which may suggest they are expecting an easy win. Perhaps an unexpected surprise by Democrats might upset the apple cart. Unfortunately, Democrats are not well known for unexpected surprises.. Congressional District 4 candidates [Muchlinski](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=Qqrr_aKaNiXNNSmVFcst2b7pZfX622DygNAOVnvbhxw.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmVjLmdvdi9kYXRhL2NhbmRpZGF0ZS9INFdBMDQxODcvIiwiciI6IjI0MDkyNjk4LWRiMTUtNDZkNS1hMjI3LTE5ODM5NThjODlkOSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) and [Baechler](https://www.ruralamericansunited.org/so/6bP15oC3u/c?w=3UhkSN3qUeCQIKSyI2qtQHsBfThraLc46b2SCsqGAaA.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmVjLmdvdi9kYXRhL2NhbmRpZGF0ZS9IMldBMDQxMjQvIiwiciI6IjI0MDkyNjk4LWRiMTUtNDZkNS1hMjI3LTE5ODM5NThjODlkOSIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjI3N2U3ZjRhLTAwZTMtNDhmYy1iYjk3LTY1NGIzZmEzNzRhOCJ9) have not filed FEC reports according to the FEC online public archive. Next filing deadline is July 15, 2024.

In Defense Of Our President: Winning, Not Whining | | Imagine raising a child in a house where the only conversation is an obsession with an evil, corrupt person who inflicts pain and misery on others—and this is all they hear, which means it is all they know. There is no place in this house for stories about good, hope, and a better future, only fear. How do you think that child is going to turn out? What will their view of the world be? Let in stories of good, hope, and a better future, or you will manifest your destiny and theirs. We kicked off the last week, and thank you to the many people who have responded thus far. Now more than ever, our President needs our support, and the best and easiest way we can do this is by promoting pro-Democrat and pro-Biden information. We can no longer allow the media to profit by pandering to the lowest common denominator and glorifying the Republican opponent, MAGA, and its minions. To earn our marketing dollars and respect, they need to publish news that is worthy, reflective of the good work Biden and Democrats are doing, and engage in fair and accurate reporting. We ensure they do this by withholding our attention from scandalous posts, articles, and news programs, and by directing our subscription dollars, likes, comments, and shares to what is strengthening our country and building a future where we all thrive. | | | | Everywhere we turn, we see the need for us to do better in our management of the media. Last Sunday, while on the stairmaster at the gym, I watched Fox, Fox Sunday Edition, and CNN. Fox was defending Biden against the inaccurate portrayal of him in recent social media posts. Fox Sunday Edition criticized the congressional GOP for blocking Democratic-led legislation to bring ethics standards to the Supreme Court. However, CNN was a steady drumbeat of Trump, Trump, Trump... The Lincoln Project has become well known for their defense of Democratic values, and a person wrote to me saying I should follow their media posts because they "get it right." I looked at the last ten Instagram posts of the Lincoln Project, and every one of them was about Trump, Trump, Trump. Not a good word to be had for the good being done in our great nation by Biden and our Democratic leadership. | | | | is a name you might know, and if you don't, you should look him up. He is young and was one of the strongest proponents of Democratic action among social media influencers. He's been to the White House and recently received accolades from CNN for his work with the youth vote. When he started, he was all about supporting Democrats, but when Democrats switched from promoting Biden to bashing Trump, so did he. Now his feeds are almost exclusively about Trump, with barely a mention of Biden. Not even Biden’s well-paid campaign managers can find anything good to say about him. The Biden campaign is spending $50 million to launch advertisements, like this one, about—you guessed it—Trump. The first three seconds of a video are critical, as 50% of viewers drop off, and another 50% after seven seconds. Biden doesn't appear in his own video until thirteen seconds in! | | | | It is our obligation to help turn this around. If the media remains obsessed with Trump and even the Biden Campaign is at a loss for anything good to say about Biden, then the media can reframe any story so that down is literally up, as seen in showing people believe crime is up and the economy is tanking. Sadly, those most consuming this media are Democrats because MAGA supporters are watching media that is pro-Trump and anti-Biden, which looks a lot like too much of the rest of the media right now. | | | | Pledge Silence = Death | | | | | 2\. They have no voting history and will fall outside the boundaries of most campaign strategies. Our messaging strategy is not traditionally issues-based, but broader. We believe, and studies support, that the majority of this group, particularly youth, has low knowledge of issues, low interest in specific issues as a driver of their daily decisions, and will find the specificity of healthcare, education, and party politics too obtuse and unrelatable. Instead, we have approached it from a contextual perspective, relating to life events and emotions. Here is the first proof draft. Additionally, we are working with local Democratic parties and organizations to further target specific races and build support for our candidates. We need your support. clean_body: There’s an important U.S. Senate race happening in my home state this year that I think you need to know about. You received this message from Lisa Blunt Rochester because you've previously taken action and supported Democrats like Lisa. If you would like to get less email, To unsubscribe, | | = Hey there, it's Jon Hamm. There's an important U.S. Senate race happening in my home state this year that I think you need to know about. So before I ask you to support my friend Lucas Kunce’s campaign to defeat Josh Hawley and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat, please let me explain why no one can afford to sit on the sidelines in this race. | | = Let's start at the beginning. When I first got to know Lucas, his story resonated with me. He's a born-and-raised Missourian who knows the real value of community — helping each other out, for better or for worse. Growing up, his parents went bankrupt from his youngest sister's medical bills and his family survived on the support of their friends and neighbors. After getting to college on a Pell Grant, Lucas decided to join the U.S. Marine Corps to honor the community that had given his family so much. He served for 13 years, including three deployments to Iraq and Afghanistan before later being stationed at the Pentagon. Once he left active duty, Lucas turned his focus to the corrupt politicians and corporate monopolies that dominate our economy and squeeze small businesses. He took on everyone from Big Tech and Big Ag to defense contractors and pharmaceutical companies. Now, Lucas is running to defeat January 6th coward Josh Hawley and take back Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat for real, everyday people. | = Let's just be clear here: Hawley's January 6th cowardice isn't the only reason he's incapable of representing my home state. Since he was elected to office, Josh Hawley hasn't fought to bring even $0.01 back to our communities — but he’s had plenty of time to make money for himself. = While giant corporations strip our state of opportunity and jack up prices, Hawley is only focused on enriching himself. He’s made hundreds of thousands of dollars more than his congressional salary by selling his weird book all about "Manhood." All this, while he made taxpayers cover the cost of his own lawbreaking. = Missouri can't afford another six years of Hawley in the Senate, folks, and voters of all stripes seem to agree. Morning Consult reported that Josh Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any Republican incumbent up for re-election this November. And even Hawley's own former mentor, Missouri's three-term Republican U.S. Senator Jack Danforth, said supporting Hawley was "the worst decision I've ever made in my life." After spending a whole year consolidating support from workers, community leaders, and organizations across Missouri, Lucas Kunce has more than proved that he has what it takes to win this race. Multiple polls even confirm he's in a dead heat with Hawley. That’s why I'm asking for your help, folks: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Lucas Kunce and Lisa Blunt Rochester: | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Lucas won't be another shady, corrupt politician. He's put his money where his mouth is since day one — refusing to accept any money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or Big Oil and Big Pharma executives. He's running to be a real warrior for working Missourians, unbeholden to anyone other than the everyday people who elected him to office. Lucas will fight for investment in our state — rebuilding forgotten communities, creating jobs, and empowering workers. He'll stand up to the attacks on reproductive rights by controlling politicians like Hawley. He'll work to end the corporate grip on power in our country, by banning insider trading and abolishing corporate PACs. And he'll be accountable to real, everyday Missourians. I can't tell you how excited I am about everything we'll be able to accomplish in Missouri with Lucas fighting for us in the Senate, folks. But if we're going to take advantage of this historic opportunity, Lucas urgently needs your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Lucas Kunce and Lisa Blunt Rochester: | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thanks for hearing me out, Jon Hamm = | = In 2022, Mitch McConnell's personally-aligned Super PAC spent a record-breaking $205 million on Senate Races. And that number is likely to increase in 2024! body:
I first ran for Congress to deliver tangible results for my community in MN-02.

[_**Peter, I’m humbly asking you to split $10 — or anything you can give! — between my re-election campaign and Yadira Caraveo’s before our fundraising deadline. I’ll explain more in a moment, but if you’re ready to donate, you can do so here:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87439932/481150462/1826329468?refcode=email_062324_caraveo_craig_split&amounts=10,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYxODk3Zi03OTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ar2nHnp82aU7VUiPdwgTGnb0EfP7ICwX0K_nDocqN-k=) | | [DONATE →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87439933/481150463/1826329468?refcode=email_062324_caraveo_craig_split&amounts=10,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYxODk3Zi03OTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ar2nHnp82aU7VUiPdwgTGnb0EfP7ICwX0K_nDocqN-k=)
---
I first ran for Congress to deliver tangible results for my community in MN-02. That’s why I’m incredibly grateful every time I’m reminded of what an impact the work I do makes.
Recently, I ran into a constituent in Cottage Grove who now takes his insulin regularly because my bill last Congress capped the cost at $35 a month for our nation's seniors on Medicare.
Folks like him are counting on members of Congress to go to bat for _them_ — not for Big Pharma or other corporate interests.
From fighting to lower the cost of insulin for all Americans who need it, to working to stop price gouging and end the fentanyl crisis, I will always put the health of the people I represent first.
But Big Pharma has spent big against me in past races, and the pharmaceutical industry spent significantly more than any other industry to try to influence members of Congress last year.
We need to take back the House to deliver more progress and make sure Republicans don’t have the votes they need to overturn the _Affordable Care Act_ , cut Medicare and further attack healthcare access.
[_**That begins with having the resources we need to grow our team and reach voters. Will you split an urgent donation of $10 or any amount between my re-election campaign and Yadira Caraveo to help? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87439934/481150464/1826329468?refcode=email_062324_caraveo_craig_split&amounts=10,25,50,75,100,250,500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNzYxODk3Zi03OTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ar2nHnp82aU7VUiPdwgTGnb0EfP7ICwX0K_nDocqN-k=)
All the best,
Angie

subject: Over 1 million views on my anti-Boebert ad!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Padora for Colorado
body:
This weekend has been huge. Thanks to folks online, my ad (the one we filmed in the same seat that Boebert got kicked out of in her infamous "Beetlejuice" debacle) was seen by over 1 million people!

name: Jenn Fenn
subject: here's what I tell people who ask me if Trump's going to win:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chrissy Houlahan for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87440233/481151623/-1072566757?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NDkxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjFhNDFhMC03OTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kfgz-CfJS-nHIURb4sSRSGREZGBdyooamtXZGqdUhW4=&emci=f40d7e5f-9822-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=3f1a41a0-7931-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=21278485)
---
Hi, Derek. It's Jenn Fenn, Chrissy's campaign manager.

Because of my job, people ask me all the time if Trump's going to win. I try my best to give a good answer, but the truth is, _I just don't know –_ I've got the same information everyone else has.
But here's what I _do_ know:
**I know that the Biden campaign is doing all the little things they need to win.** They've got 24 offices just in Pennsylvania, which shows their commitment to having real, important conversations with voters – not just holding rallies like Trump. **And we've put together an amazing field team to make sure Dems win in November. **
**I know that the polls are neck and neck here in PA, and that whoever wins here has a really good chance to win the presidency. **
**And I know that, if every supporter pitches in even just $5, we can build the momentum we need to protect Chrissy's seat, hold extremism at bay in the House, and win the presidency come November. **

I try my best to give a good answer, but the truth is, I just don't know – I've got the same information everyone else has. But here's what I do know: I know that the Biden campaign is doing all the little things they need to win. They've got 24 offices just in Pennsylvania, which shows their commitment to having real, important conversations with voters – not just holding rallies like Trump. Friend,
We’re in the final 48 hours before Colorado’s primary election. Can you look at the numbers we just crunched?
* It costs about **$6** to register one new voter.
* The closest House election in 2022 was decided by **547 votes** — Lauren Boebert’s race in CO-03.

The latest polls of a 2024 matchup between Donald Trump and President Biden show the race in a dead-heat.

**And this Thursday, both candidates are set to debate head to head for the first time since 2020.**

Remember: a second Trump presidency poses a direct threat to our democracy and everything we’ve accomplished since he was defeated in 2020.

name: Schiff HQ
subject: We can’t afford to be outraised by Steve Garvey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=6778%2E5257348%2EXuiDZ1)
Hey Derek —
**[Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is one week away. Can you chip in a contribution of any size right now? We’ll explain why it’s especially important right now.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=june2024_abs_em.GGnUBV&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20240623_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=6778%2E5257348%2EXuiDZ1)**
Last fundraising quarter, Adam’s GOP opponent Steve Garvey raised nearly $5 million.
That’s a lot of money — and it’s very possible that he’s raised _even more_ this quarter since he’s now the only other candidate on the ballot for the U.S. Senate in CA.
If Adam’s fundraising falls short, we could be _outraised_ — which means we won’t have the resources we need to respond to Garvey’s attacks.
Or the funds to turn out voters in every corner of California.
Or the means to uplift Adam’s positive vision for our state.
And if we publish our fundraising report and it shows any signs of weakness, Steve Garvey and the Republican establishment will pounce.
We. Can’t. Let. That. Happen.

| | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. I want to share how far we've come, but first, I have to ask:

[We need to raise $100,000 by MIDNIGHT to keep Delaware and the Senate blue, so I'm personally asking: Will you chip in a split donation between my campaign and The Collective PAC to help us meet my campaign anniversary goal?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvJB22Yj9KNp6Q7r_1N-iSEnDYkOQe0O_Enb3D9ByFEzDMDZoG2x436tdbrv8LFYN_a5e-Zytm6Ievkwpm1N0BqargPpQgSXRTUhQf3oz7V_F4jaue8dxBGh0rC_nGPDEgB2gBj_tqykpZV1uUN97NnDm0EChUVbKyYYwj0IM14e_38ZQkUW4IAac93Ru5fkvZrDkqvXkTMRXCRG4NprgU_2MuCh7bvyodT60TlaHn9oR7If56Auh6GhFQPDPWoQGENEoNzyH61HTKpSaYbxVfkVXLXvcLQMiZyjt6OFTU4A1AvBF1uCOoU3S2OypV3If35F7J8sGFQxI2jxocw5Z8NthAEQRY3-gMUteQOo-ok3x_t2IW0gJLMQkkyW7P7Bu0qc9T5GivOmabg5kldVjv6/47g/i5etHX7sS1O6p4irEE5ECQ/h1/h001.CEZP2Y2sNIZuASyq7kcRTyxkIlvWSRVLvnv1Sj-xoSU)

Only three Black women have come before me to earn this honor, so I'm facing one of the largest glass ceilings in American politics. But I'm no stranger to tough fights. With the support of this grassroots team, I became the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware in the House.

Now, I'm running to make history again in the Senate. Despite the many barriers that stand in my way, I know I can get there, but it'll only happen with the support of people like you.

I'll tell you why: Historically, Black women running for office only raise one-third of what their white counterparts do. And already, I've seen that painful statistic come to life.

My self-funding opponent has already written his campaign a check for nearly a million dollars of his own personal fortune.

That means we're heading into our LAST FEC deadline before the primary election with some serious ground to make up. In order to fight back, we need to meet every single fundraising goal we set, including tonight's $100,000 goal.

[Will you chip in $10, split between my campaign and The Collective PAC to reach our campaign anniversary goal, keep Delaware blue, and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvJB22Yj9KNp6Q7r_1N-iSEnDYkOQe0O_Enb3D9ByFEzDMDZoG2x436tdbrv8LFYN_a5e-Zytm6Ievkwpm1N0BqargPpQgSXRTUhQf3oz7V_F4jaue8dxBGh0rC_nGPDEgB2gBj_tqykpZV1uUN97NnDm0EChUVbKyYYwj0IM14ewmeDQtliq2bviABfp7yHNFyZ49rUj3dctQ_775SnhlpcDq_MisRCvZT99NbKMMUcBNIRllnU1HTeqoo1seEXAFgMLzi5a0eSyAbwTCoXNaRxfmPxBhfjqhLoDu1AuoDUpsU7SRvjEg0yROQ7vBzsKWRe7_1t7N5JwEMo9ETxXPgDI_kZqoAFEmR-01d7wOSZU7XeYJQFjESKziWOkFSnAMya4j76es10zJ8cs8U6mXN/47g/i5etHX7sS1O6p4irEE5ECQ/h3/h001.N4BBvLX83Yy4Y-IqAc5FXQ-0URDQ2oYcCYd4Q16Bvx8)

Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | h Peter, we've come such a long way since launching this campaign one year ago. I want to share how far we've come, but first, I have to ask: | | Only three Black women have come before me to earn this honor, so I'm facing one of the largest glass ceilings in American politics. But I'm no stranger to tough fights. With the support of this grassroots team, I became the first woman and person of color to represent Delaware in the House. Now, I'm running to make history again in the Senate. Despite the many barriers that stand in my way, I know I can get there, but it'll only happen with the support of people like you. I'll tell you why: Historically, Black women running for office only raise one-third of what their white counterparts do. And already, I've seen that painful statistic come to life. My self-funding opponent has already written his campaign a check for nearly a million dollars of his own personal fortune. That means we're heading into our LAST FEC deadline before the primary election with some serious ground to make up. In order to fight back, we need to meet every single fundraising goal we set, including tonight's $100,000 goal. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Lisa Blunt Rochester and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | Together, we’ve made incredible strides in the first year of this campaign, and I'm counting on you to help power us all the way to victory on Election Day. I can't thank you enough for your support. It truly means the world. Let's win this thing! – Lisa The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Sarah McBride
subject: The biggest test of our campaign so far
body:
Together, I know we can rise to this challenge.
#
There is certainly _A LOT_ going on right now, so here’s a quick recap for you:
\- We’ve received a TON of exciting new endorsements, including Congresswoman Lisa Blunt Rochester and Senator Tom Carper.
\- The end of the session for the Delaware legislature is June 30, and I’m working overtime in the State Senate on behalf of Delaware families.
\- **Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is _the very same day_ – and I need YOUR support to keep this campaign in a strong position!**
[**Please – will you pitch in $5 right now toward my $25,000 fundraising goal? This deadline is the biggest test our campaign has faced so far, but I know that with this team’s support, we will be able to rise to the challenge!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240623-1?refcode=em20240623-1-681&amount=5&refcode2=681_21716_7p83Yg&akid=681%2E21716%2E7p83Yg)
We have so much to be proud of about this incredible campaign we’re building together. But candidly, all eyes are going to be on us after this deadline, so it is more important than ever that we come together and prove our strength.
When we file our end-of-quarter report with the FEC, _everyone_ – our supporters, opponents, special interest groups, and all – will be able to see our fundraising numbers. We need to show them that we are in this fight and we intend to win it.
[**So, I’ve got a question for you: Can I count on your support in this pivotal moment for our campaign? Make a $5 contribution right now!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240623-1?refcode=em20240623-1-681&amount=5&refcode2=681_21716_7p83Yg&akid=681%2E21716%2E7p83Yg)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20240623-1?amount=5&refcode=em20240623-1-681&refcode2=681_21716_7p83Yg&akid=681%2E21716%2E7p83Yg)**
Thank you so much,
Sarah McBride
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20240623-1&t=1&refcode2=681_21716_7p83Yg&akid=681%2E21716%2E7p83Yg)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=681%2E21716%2E7p83Yg)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=681%2E21716%2E7p83Yg)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=681%2E21716%2E7p83Yg)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)

name: VoteVets HQ
subject: $81 Million
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Trump just outraised President Biden by $81 million. One man — ONE MAN — donated $50 million to Trump’s Super PAC. These guys are running to roll back a hundred years of progress and rip the Constitution to shreds.
#
Derek, Lt. General Chesty Puller was one of the most storied leaders in the history of the United States Marine Corps.
In the winter of 1950 he and his Marines were under relentless attack from all sides at the Chosin Reservoir. Surrender didn’t cross his mind. Instead, he said:
_“We’re surrounded. That simplifies things.”_
Look — things are tough. Trump just outraised President Biden by $81 million. One man — ONE MAN — donated $50 million to Trump’s Super PAC. These guys are running to roll back a hundred years of progress and rip the Constitution to shreds.
But that simplifies things for us. We know our mission: We’ve got to rally as many of our supporters as we possibly can to stand against the millionaires and billionaires Trump is bringing to his side.
We’re not going to back down. We’ve got one week until our official FEC deadline, and it’s time to ramp up.
[**We need you with us. Please, chip in $5 to VoteVets and help us lead the fight against Trump. There’s only way we can beat these MAGA extremists for good — and that’s together.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june24.b7PZyP&refcode=em240623-1-30&t=1&akid=25793%2E3013755%2EWVsg5l)**

We know our mission: We’ve got to rally as many of our supporters as we possibly can to stand against the millionaires and billionaires Trump is bringing to his side. We’re not going to back down. We’ve got one week until our official FEC deadline, and it’s time to ramp up. ****Now,**** Ruben Gallego is launching a multi-million dollar ad blitz against the America First movement here in Arizona with the help of the Clinton and Soros families.

body:
If there was ever a doubt that national Republicans are going all-in to defeat me, this should settle it:

[|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/i2RyDGVxxbKf8tvgcnQh4Q~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoWtk_P0QgaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZXJpY2ZvcmlsbGlub2lzLmNvbS9XA3NwY0IKZnRWVHhmt7pdJ1IUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAABs~)
| | Peter, if there was ever a doubt that national Republicans are going all-in to defeat me, this should settle it: **GOP Leader Mike Johnson just sent out a petty, desperate fundraising plea on behalf of our opponent Joe McGraw.****
****
**Here’s an excerpt: [__](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/kvq4GU7JhEVP7GGIA8wvCQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoWtk_P0TkaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEyLTIwMjQ_) Johnson went on to disparage me as an “ultra-liberal” Democrat, and even called McGraw – the anti-choice right-wing culture warrior – a model conservative that he wants in the House. [**We need all hands on deck. Rush in $5 to counter Speaker Mike Johnson's fundraising surge for my opponent.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/kvq4GU7JhEVP7GGIA8wvCQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoWtk_P0TkaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEyLTIwMjQ_) | ****[Donate](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/kvq4GU7JhEVP7GGIA8wvCQ~~/AAUS1gA~/RgRoWtk_P0TkaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2VzLXEyLTIwMjQ_)****

Personally, I think the tropes are a little tired -- especially from someone as extreme as Johnson.
Remember, this is the same guy who likened abortion to ‘an American holocaust’ and has made clear he wants a **nationwide abortion ban** if Donald Trump is elected. And given his own comments, there's no doubt that Joe McGraw would be a loyal ally in that endeavor.

So in response to his email, we’re running a little fundraising push of our own:

_**OFFICIAL INVITATION FROM HOUSE GOP CHAIR ELISE STEFANIK**_
---
Friend,
---
Joseph Stalin’s ruthless secret police chief once boasted **_"Show me the man and I’ll show you the crime.”_**
---
Decades later, Democrat extremists have adopted that exact same Marxist philosophy as they seek to **_JAIL_** President Trump – an innocent man – by any means necessary.
---
When you ask the Democrats what “crime” President Trump actually committed, no one can give you a clear answer.
---

---

name: No Dem Left Behind
subject: Failed MAGA Prophecies
disclaimer_text: Paid for by No Dem Left Behind PAC
body:
their messaging is basic psychology, but it works in a nefarious way.
---
| | | | [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=logo)
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# Failed MAGA Prophecies
---
Look, Ever wonder how the MAGA crowd constantly gets conned into believing the next "big lie" from Trump and the GOP? _It's basic psychology_ , **but it works in a nefarious way**.
|
## 1.) The burden of proof constantly shifts
---
Example: Trump began his 2020 Big Lie trend by stating that if he lost, it would be "because of fraud." He primed his base to already believe that the system was set up "against him." Recall that at the same time in this country, in some areas, his supporters were chanting "stop the count" while others were calling for "**count every vote** " and recounts So when Trump lost, it was because there were too many "fraudulent votes" and the system was somehow rigged not to count the other votes.
|
## 2.) Evidence to the contrary
---
The evidence against Trump is somehow spun into a "gotcha." The documents case is a good example of this as it was originally stated he "had no documents," then it devolved into his "ability" to declassify whatever he wanted. The GOP has also blamed the FBI and claimed that the documents were "planted." The obviously broken law was the **possession of the documents** , but the MAGA GOP is now framing it as a casual mishap, some classic "_whataboutism_ ," AND a plot against Trump. **The fact that we now know he had the documents is the "proof" that it was a "targeted attack" on Trump (or a "raid," as they've described it.)**
|
## 3.) Blissful Ignorance
---
Finally, their more infuriating tactic is that of simply denying and ignoring the truth. Stating "fake news" when prompted with facts or refuting any evidence with clearly biased "proof" from sites like Fox News and Breitbart. It can feel like numbers and raw data don't matter to them because they aren't accepting them as "real." **The same applies to Trump's crimes; when polled, even recently, his base has claimed he didn't do anything wrong.** The burning question is: which members of the MAGA GOP are aware of the charade that their side is operating? How many of them are fully aware of the lies that they are selling for political gain and retaining power? [**These people are making our laws. They are selling nothing more than a grift while clutching power close to their hearts. We can fight back, but we need your help. Chip in today and help us reach rural voters far and wide.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=lnk)
| [ CHIP IN & FIGHT BACK!](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/maga-os?refcode=other)
---
| | | No Dem Left Behind
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | |

name: Bernie Moreno
subject: This isn’t good…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bernie Moreno for Senate<-
body:
-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5237.1.319aa33255255e58f60e138762a8f89b )<-

This fight will be tougher than we could have prepared for, Friend.

\*\*It’s official: this Ohio Senate race is now the most expensive in the country, and it will likely go down as the most expensive in history.\*\*

We’re in the fight of our lives to flip this seat and reclaim the Republican Senate majority, but Sherrod Brown is leveraging his insider swamp connections to help influence the outcome in his favor. \*\*The bad news: _this atrocious level of spending is moving the needle for Brown._\*\*

I mean, just look at these numbers, friend:

\*\*\*\* Shady Sherrod \*\*has reserved a jaw-dropping $104.3 MILLION in ads in total.\*\*

\*\*\*\* Shady Sherrod’s \*\*campaign has funded an absurd $24.8 MILLION of that amount, with the rest coming from ultra-left-wing, Schumer-aligned special interests.\*\*

\*\*And\*\* Shady Sherrod \*\*is going to raise a heck of a lot more between now and November to cling to his desperate grip on power.\*\*

-> \*\*RUSH 5 BUCKS\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5238.1.cf9441d5fd71c90495439cd02eda04fd )<-

-> \*\*RUSH 15 BUCKS\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5239.1.5270c66d6656317d2dbe0a40c319fc58 )<-

-> \*\*RUSH 20 BUCKS\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5240.1.44a7461a353bd7de011439f3b95fec38 )<-

-> \*\*RUSH 30 BUCKS\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5241.1.02edda3b980ae53ca5d4adc810e1d86d )<-

I’ll be honest, things aren’t looking good. We’re locked in a dead heat with Brown, but his ability to milk far-left, deep-pocketed donors could be enough to tip the scales in his favor.

\*\*We need to step up our game, which is why I’m begging you to chip in whatever you can right now to help my campaign stay competitive in this race.\*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5242.1.19b6cf8333dd7ee8304cbc5f850e5c53 )

\*\*Everything hinges on what happens in November, and I am determined to make it to Washington to represent you and put America FIRST.\*\*

Thank you for your support,

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5243.1.9fcfeea4d25070484c7ab320879e292e )

Bernie Moreno

GOP Nominee for Senate, Ohio

->

\*\*Meet Bernie Moreno:\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5244.1.7c47db7130e53fc8af9c4f949a02deb8 ) Bernie Moreno fights for the American Dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American Dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

-> \*\* Join Bernie ➞ \*\* ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5245.1.a0b64a1ee36cc273c588be76ffeb0585 )<-

<-

-> ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5233.1.ba5f2db216edac231c4f23a7346ca5ab )<-

->

\*\*FOLLOW BERNIE ON SOCIAL MEDIA\*\*

( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5234.1.af1292a3131bee44a4ebba77baf8b0e5 ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5235.1.256e128e95f740496bf473191eb3eeba ) ( https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/38066?id=12601979.5236.1.5ebe0fd1fa164d64682db9d714c63299 )

<-

name: Commander Jay Furman
subject: Welcome to the team!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COMMANDER JAY FURMAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Here's what you need to know about me:

|
---
Dear Friend,

Thank you for joining my team! I want to take a minute to introduce myself. I am a veteran, Christian, devoted husband and father, and an America First conservative running for Congress in Texas's 28th district.

After growing up in Austin, TX, I flew Blackhawk helicopters for the Texas Army National Guard on the Southwest border. After graduating from Texas A&M University, I became a U.S. Naval Aviator and Foreign Area Officer serving all over the world. In my 28 years of military service, I have helped our nation's allies secure the worst borders, only to come home to find ours kicked wide open, leaving our family's futures in peril from the most dangerous country killer weapon in history - weaponized mass migration -- an inhumane human bomb. My message is that our at-present lost security, freedoms, skyrocketing prices and morally detestable cultural attacks are just the beginning. Americans may soon find themselves in hand-to-hand combat for national survival -- at home - if we do not immediately deport Biden's 15 million invaders. Hidden among them (and us) lay this civilization's assassins. We do not know their identity, numbers, or locations, but we do know they are capable. If someone walked here through the Darien Gap, from Panama, then I'd put them up against the average American walking around today.

That is why I am running for Congress, because Biden and Democrat policies are simply the most radical and lawless in U.S. history. My Democrat competitor votes 96% with Biden in Congress. South Texans did not vote for fake borders, gender madness, weakened military, sky-high prices, energy dependence, more foreign wars, arresting our political enemies, spying on the American public, and giving-up gun rights.

Instead of just sitting and watching our state and nation burn to the ground, we must take action. The first step is to retire 14-time DOJ indicted Rep. Henry Cuellar. Henry has blood on his hands taking bribes to protect Muslamic Azerbaijan's genocidal march on Christian Armenia. He protected Mexican remittances over American interests boosting their business over ours. To do so, he hid behind dubious LLC's in his wife's and daughter's names. This person is not protecting South Texas, as he sells his own down the Rio. All the while voting to send our nation off the national cliff. Make no mistake, Texas is the Alamo all over again; and if Texas falls, America goes down.

Under Joe Biden and leaders like Rep. Henry Cuellar, our freedoms are under the constant threat of Marxist socialist's global agenda. With God's help, we will protect the values we are teaching our children. Their future is under constant attack from DC and the 160 nations to whom they are giving away ours. As Congressman, I will import bold South Texas leadership into the Swamp, to put America first and take back our southwest border, empowering all South Texas businesses, blocking woke insanity, and putting Texans back in charge of their day-to-day lives -- not big business, not big media, and definitely not today's Democrat run federal government.

**With your help, I will fight corruption in Congress, defend our families by securing the border, strengthen the dollar, restore our Constitutional rights, and defund woke Marxist socialism in our schools and public institutions. We have all had enough talk and pork barrel give-away politics responsible for our sinking national ship. Damn the torpedoes -- full speed ahead -- only together can we save the nation!**

| **SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN TODAY**
---
**DONATE $10**
---
**DONATE $20**
---
**DONATE $50**
---
**DONATE $100**
---

Welcome aboard!

Commander Jay Furman
Candidate for TX-28

|
---
