name: Ro Khanna
subject: Is America ready to listen?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

“Everything, everywhere” that’s how Slate described my approach to the 2024 election. It’s true. I’m traveling the country, listening to anyone who wants to talk. That’s because I truly believe that national reconciliation and healing begin with listening. And that’s what we need to defeat Trump in November 2024.

Let me explain, but first, will you rush a split donation to me and President Biden? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-2024-split?refcode=20240623-slate-biden-lift]

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-2024-split?refcode=20240623-slate-biden-lift]

Over the past year, I’ve been on the picket line in California, New York, Michigan, and DC. I’ve met with student protestors in Wisconsin and Arab American voters in Michigan. I stumped for the volunteer write-in campaign for Biden in New Hampshire. I’ve met with manufacturing workers in Pennsylvania, South Carolina, and Iowa. I’ve partnered with universities and tech leaders to bring new opportunities for the next generation across the Midwest.

I know America is the greatest country on earth. It’s not just our access to freedom and opportunity that makes us great, but the character of the American people. I see that every day in my travels. But I also see and hear about the struggles.

https://slate.com/news-and-politics/2024/06/ro-khanna-presidential-hopes-democrats-biden.html [https://slate.com/news-and-politics/2024/06/ro-khanna-presidential-hopes-democrats-biden.html]

READ: “This Junior Congressman Thinks He Knows How Biden Can Win. Will Anyone Listen?” [https://slate.com/news-and-politics/2024/06/ro-khanna-presidential-hopes-democrats-biden.html]

Here’s the truth: over 40 years of disastrous economic policy have hollowed out the manufacturing sector and devastated working families. For many people, life today isn’t better than it was for their parents. We need to change that.

President Biden has made incredible progress in the past three years.

* He's lowered [https://www.kff.org/policy-watch/the-facts-about-the-35-insulin-copay-cap-in-medicare/] the cost of prescription drugs;
* He's helped create [https://www.politico.com/news/2024/01/19/biden-manufacturing-factory-jobs-00136473] 800,000 new manufacturing jobs;
* He invested billions in building new factories; and
* He’s forgiven over $160 billion in student loan debt [https://www.cbsnews.com/news/student-loan-forgiveness-6-1-billion-art-institutes-who-qualifies/] for 4.6 million borrowers.

But it’s going to take more than one term to reverse 40-plus years of bad policy.

Will you show President Biden you have his back by splitting a donation between our campaigns today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-2024-split?refcode=20240623-slate-biden-lift]

Fighting to re-elect Biden isn’t just about preventing another disastrous Trump presidency. It’s about revitalizing the American Dream for future generations. It’s not the last step, it’s the first.

Thank you for your activism and all that you do.

In solidarity,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden-2024-split?refcode=20240623-slate-biden-lift]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

Paid for by Ro for Congress

name: Carole King
subject: Reaching out about Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Rubén's journey, from the son of immigrants to a Marine Corps veteran and dedicated father, is a testament to his commitment to serving others.
#

[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-2-160&refcode2=2508.734936.H-UGdf&t=1&akid=2508%2E734936%2EH-UGdf)
---
Hi Peter, it’s Carole King 🎶 and I personally wrote this email.
It can be easy to forget that there are a lot of caring, courageous people in government. I’m writing today to ask you to join me in support of one of those people.
[**Will you donate $5 right now to send Arizona Congressman Rubén Gallego to the U.S. Senate? This race is going to be one of the closest in the country, so anything you can give makes a major difference to his campaign.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-2-160&t=2&akid=2508%2E734936%2EH-UGdf)
Rubén’s journey from the son of immigrants to a Marine Corps veteran, a dedicated father, and a current member of Congress is a testament to his commitment to serving others. He understands the struggles of hardworking families firsthand. He’s fought in Congress to support small businesses, lower prices, and advocate for our veterans.
Rubén’s record of fighting for our rights and freedoms is **Reason 1** why we need him in the Senate.
**Reason 2** is that we cannot lose this seat to a Republican.
**Reason 3** is that Rubén’s opponent is Kari Lake.
[**If you already know why Kari Lake should NEVER hold any elected office, please donate $5 or whatever you can afford right now to help Rubén Gallego win his Senate election.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june24.NmHAEe&refcode=em240623-2-160&t=3&akid=2508%2E734936%2EH-UGdf)
Kari Lake and the truth live in different countries. Another court just denied her baseless claim that she won the governor’s race in 2022. And she’s an acolyte of the cult leader who says he wants to be a dictator and seeks revenge against those he deems disloyal.
**We cannot give the party of retribution and cruelty control of the Senate. Will you join me in donating $5 or whatever you can afford right now?**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-june24.5QiiEK&amount=5%3Brefcode%3Dem240623-2-160&t=22&akid=2508%2E734936%2EH-UGdf)**

clean_body: Rubén's journey, from the son of immigrants to a Marine Corps veteran and dedicated father, is a testament to his commitment to serving others. Hi Peter, it’s Carole King 🎶 and I personally wrote this email. It can be easy to forget that there are a lot of caring, courageous people in government. I’m writing today to ask you to join me in support of one of those people. Rubén’s journey from the son of immigrants to a Marine Corps veteran, a dedicated father, and a current member of Congress is a testament to his commitment to serving others. He understands the struggles of hardworking families firsthand. He’s fought in Congress to support small businesses, lower prices, and advocate for our veterans. Rubén’s record of fighting for our rights and freedoms is Reason 1 why we need him in the Senate. Reason 2 is that we cannot lose this seat to a Republican. Reason 3 is that Rubén’s opponent is Kari Lake. Kari Lake and the truth live in different countries. Another court just denied her baseless claim that she won the governor’s race in 2022. And she’s an acolyte of the cult leader who says he wants to be a dictator and seeks revenge against those he deems disloyal. We cannot give the party of retribution and cruelty control of the Senate. Will you join me in donating $5 or whatever you can afford right now? body:
That is the donation we’re asking you to make to the DNC today. Let us explain why: | |
---
**$50 million.** That is the amount ONE PERSON contributed to a pro-Trump super PAC after his guilty verdict. It’s outrageous. **$141 million.** That is how much Donald Trump and the Republican National Committee raised in the month of May -- out-raising us significantly. They are now using that money to launch a massive ad campaign starting the day of the first presidential debate. **$7.** That is the donation Joe Biden and Democrats running for office everywhere are hoping you’ll make to the Democratic National Committee today. Yes, we know $7 feels small in comparison to the amount one person gave to Trump and the total he raised. But if every Democrat and person who wants to beat Trump in this election donated $7 today, we’d out-raise the Republicans by the time the sun comes up tomorrow. Unfortunately, not everyone does give. So we’re counting on people who understand the importance of this moment to chip in today. We’re counting on you, Derek. [Please contribute $7 to the Democratic National Committee today if you know the stakes of this election and how important it is that we don't fall far behind heading into the debate and clean_body: That is the donation we’re asking you to make to the DNC today. Let us explain why: | | $50 million. That is the amount ONE PERSON contributed to a pro-Trump super PAC after his guilty verdict. It’s outrageous. $141 million. That is how much Donald Trump and the Republican National Committee raised in the month of May -- out-raising us significantly. They are now using that money to launch a massive ad campaign starting the day of the first presidential debate. $7. That is the donation Joe Biden and Democrats running for office everywhere are hoping you’ll make to the Democratic National Committee today. Yes, we know $7 feels small in comparison to the amount one person gave to Trump and the total he raised. But if every Democrat and person who wants to beat Trump in this election donated $7 today, we’d out-raise the Republicans by the time the sun comes up tomorrow. Unfortunately, not everyone does give. So we’re counting on people who understand the importance of this moment to chip in today. We’re counting on you, Derek. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | ---|--- | | Thank you. We’ll look back at this moment as a turning point in this election. The Democratic Party Text JOIN to 43367 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: Jill Stein for President
subject: Update: These 8 Democrats…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024
body:
...have taken millions

| | | [ ](https://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_8_dems&n=1)
---
Peter,

Last week we shared some disturbing details about those 8 Democrats in Congress publicly supporting a **SUPER PAC** called _“Citizens To Save Our Republic”_ trying to pressure Jill off the ballot.

Since our last email even more information has come to light about who is propping up these anti-Democratic members of the Congress.
---
[ ](www.jillstein2024.com/donate)
---
**_The Israeli lobby led by AIPAC has dropped nearly 4 million dollars into the campaign coffers of 7 of the 8 Democrats_**.

It’s not hard to see why these corruptible members of congress would be eager to endorse an effort to keep Jill Stein off the ballot.

They know that Jill is the only candidate for president who will be on the ballot across the country willing to end this genocide and work towards a permanent and a lasting peace with justice.

A real alternative on the ballot not endorsed by AIPAC and other _pro-empire SUPER PACs_ scares the DC elite and especially scares these members of congress.

Unfortunately for these DNC attack dogs in congress Jill will NEVER be pressured off **any** ballot. She will keep fighting every day to make sure we have a pro-worker, anti-war, anti-genocide, climate action agenda on the ballot across the nation.
---
**_Peter, will you help Jill fight back against DNC attack dogs in Congress by making a contribution of any amount right now?_****_
_**
---
| [](http://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_8_dems&n=2 "Support Jill Today!") Thank you for being part of the movement for people, planet, and peace. With gratitude, The Jill Stein 2024 Team P.S. - Don’t forget the Jill Stein campaign has reached its goals to secure Federal Public Matching Funds approval. That means every dollar of your grassroots support up to $250 will be matched!
---
| [](http://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_8_dems&n=3 "MATCH FOR JILL") [MATCH FOR JILL](http://www.jillstein2024.com/donate?e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_8_dems&n=3)
---
* * *
---
Peter,

We have a question for you: Have you heard these names before?

1\. Former House Majority Leader Steny Hoyer (D) MD-5
2\. Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger (D) VA-7
3\. Congressman Brad Schneider (D) IL-10
4\. Congressman Don Beyer (D) VA-8
5\. Congresswoman Nikema Williams (D) GA-5
6\. Congresswoman Debbie Dingell (D) MI-6
7\. Congressman Eric Swalwell (D) CA-14
8\. Congressman Seth Moulton (D) MA-6

We’re asking because we’ve discovered something pretty disturbing.

These 8 Democrats in Congress are publicly supporting a **SUPER PAC** called “Citizens To Save Our Republic” that has one mission - get Joe Biden reelected.

They think they can do that by trying to pressure Jill off the ballot in Arizona, Georgia, Nevada (_where Democrats are suing us_), Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin.
---
[ ](www.jillstein2024.com/donate)
---
Biden is leaning hard on the DNC, Super PACs, and these elected officials _(two who have previously run for president)_ to give you less choices for president come November. **
****
[We can’t let them win](https://www.jillstein2024.com/r?u=Qj32F8ZTIcBOzthgR25-gAvkYhzfYdFFirPiGZztCb0&e=e813143e1dc0d3b0ffcb007ffe357333&utm_source=jillsteinforpresident&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=these_8_dems&n=4)**

The good news is Jill will NEVER be pressured off **any** ballot. She is fighting every day to get and keep our pro-worker, anti-war, anti-genocide, climate action agenda on the ballot across the nation.
---
**_Peter, will you help Jill fight back against the DNC dirty tricks and their lap dogs in Congress by making a contribution of any amount right now?_**

With gratitude, The Jill Stein 2024 Team

subject: Dark money groups are trying to buy this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Our current campaign finance system is actively paving the way for dark money PACs to gouge their donors and buy our elections.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240623-4021-footer&t=1&akid=4021%2E420207%2EeKwVeW)
Peter,
**We need to address dark money PACs in our elections.**
**Our current campaign finance system is actively paving the way for dark money PACs to get their donors to buy our elections. And as long as it continues like this, the GOP will continue to exploit our democracy. Enough is enough.**
**Republican-aligned and billionaire-funded dark money groups are in the throes of trying to unseat bold and outspoken candidates like Jamaal Bowman, Cori Bush, and Pramila.**We need to keep up our momentum if we want to protect our hard-earned progress.****
**Pramila knows how crucial it is to get dark money out of our politics if we want to protect our democracy. But she needs our support now to ensure she can stay in Congress to keep fighting for our values.**
[**Please consider chipping in $5, $10, $20, or whatever makes sense to you right now to fuel our fight to keep Pramila in Congress.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240623.xuZG49&refcode=em20240623-4021&t=2&akid=4021%2E420207%2EeKwVeW)

name: COURIER
subject: Here's how many lies Donald Trump tells every minute
body:
The media matters when a presidential nominee refuses to tell the truth

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87447178/481177055/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjkyMTdlN2UtOGEzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XRNgH7S2FTXdufQ5z4wIEAKxfdayF0iHsNRTkccmlwE=&emci=60217e7e-8a31-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=69217e7e-8a31-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=14016711)
Peter,
Trump held another campaign rally last Wednesday in Wisconsin, and boy was it... something 😳
CNN’s fact-checkers reported on his speech and found that he told more than 30 lies— **That’s one lie _every three minutes_.**
Here’s a few of the most egregious highlights:
* Trump lied about winning Wisconsin in 2020. He lost by more than 20,000 votes.
* He claimed the world was “at peace” in 2020 despite there being numerous ongoing armed conflicts during that time.
* He said inflation under Joe Biden has gone up to 50%, nearly 2.5 times the actual number.
* Bizarrely, he claimed that “hundreds of thousands of dollars of cocaine” was found at the White House.
* And, of course, he lied again by saying that he lost in 2020 because Democrats “rigged” the election

[**We’ll talk about how COURIER can help combat Trump’s constant lies in a moment, but if you’re ready to support our mission and safeguard our elections with good, factual journalism, can you chip in $20?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87447179/481177056/-593472309?refcode=20240623-EM-TrumpFactCheck&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjkyMTdlN2UtOGEzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=XRNgH7S2FTXdufQ5z4wIEAKxfdayF0iHsNRTkccmlwE=)
**Here’s the thing Peter:** CNN and other fact-checkers did important work reporting on Trump’s lies and telling the truth about his Wisconsin speech. **Unfortunately, the vast majority of Americans may never see that work.**
As newsrooms around the country get bought up by right-wing companies like Sinclair, lay off their staff, or close their doors entirely, more and more Americans find themselves in news deserts without access to reliable reporting.
In many cases, that means the only available news sources are right-wing media outlets or social media feeds. So instead of seeing the fact-checked version of Trump’s speech, they’re getting Trump unfiltered (or worse, amplified by conspiracy theorists and hyper-partisans) – and they have nowhere to turn for the truth.
**That’s where COURIER comes in.** Our research-backed approach allows us to meet people on their social media feeds and stop right-wing misinformation in its tracks.
We provide free, factual local news in eleven battleground states where quality local news is hard to come by. And we’re not afraid to call out Trump, _Fox News_ , and other Republicans when they lie or spread conspiracy theories to win.

clean_body: The media matters when a presidential nominee refuses to tell the truth Peter, Trump held another campaign rally last Wednesday in Wisconsin, and boy was it... something 😳 CNN’s fact-checkers reported on his speech and found that he told more than 30 lies— That’s one lie every three minutes. Here’s a few of the most egregious highlights: Trump lied about winning Wisconsin in 2020. He lost by more than 20,000 votes. He claimed the world was “at peace” in 2020 despite there being numerous ongoing armed conflicts during that time. He said inflation under Joe Biden has gone up to 50%, nearly 2.5 times the actual number. Bizarrely, he claimed that “hundreds of thousands of dollars of cocaine” was found at the White House. And, of course, he lied again by saying that he lost in 2020 because Democrats “rigged” the election = Here’s the thing Peter: CNN and other fact-checkers did important work reporting on Trump’s lies and telling the truth about his Wisconsin speech. Unfortunately, the vast majority of Americans may never see that work. As newsrooms around the country get bought up by right-wing companies like Sinclair, lay off their staff, or close their doors entirely, more and more Americans find themselves in news deserts without access to reliable reporting. In many cases, that means the only available news sources are right-wing media outlets or social media feeds. So instead of seeing the fact-checked version of Trump’s speech, they’re getting Trump unfiltered (or worse, amplified by conspiracy theorists and hyper-partisans) – and they have nowhere to turn for the truth. That’s where COURIER comes in. Our research-backed approach allows us to meet people on their social media feeds and stop right-wing misinformation in its tracks. We provide free, factual local news in eleven battleground states where quality local news is hard to come by. And we’re not afraid to call out Trump, Fox News , and other Republicans when they lie or spread conspiracy theories to win. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you, COURIER Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

We’re happy to have you on our side, Peter
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87447399/481177719/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzYjMyMGU3LThhMzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jnlMrx-exVcRbEc-CVG1gROy38HrKreehEZPyc4SDz8=&emci=dc89eacf-c629-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=23b320e7-8a31-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, **I’m grateful you’ve decided to join me and the National Democratic Redistricting Committee (NDRC) in the fight for a fairer democracy, Peter. Because there is so much on the line right now.** As a country, we have faced our fair share of challenges before. But this one’s different: **our democracy itself is under attack.** Right now, extreme, anti-democratic forces are using every tool they can to undermine the integrity of our elections. And that includes extreme partisan gerrymandering. **That’s why your support couldn’t have come at a better time. We’re in an all-out push to secure fair maps and protect our democracy by winning key elections this year. And we need help from folks like you to propel us to victory.** [**Peter, I need to ask: Will you join me in this fight by making a donation of $3 or any amount today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87447400/481177720/556566862?refcode=don_ndrc_react_email_welcome_email_2024-NDRC-React-Welcome-3_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=2024-NDRC-React-Welcome-3_&utm_campaign=welcome&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzYjMyMGU3LThhMzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jnlMrx-exVcRbEc-CVG1gROy38HrKreehEZPyc4SDz8=) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87447401/481177721/556566862?refcode=don_ndrc_react_email_welcome_email_2024-NDRC-React-Welcome-3_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=2024-NDRC-React-Welcome-3_&utm_campaign=welcome&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzYjMyMGU3LThhMzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jnlMrx-exVcRbEc-CVG1gROy38HrKreehEZPyc4SDz8=)
---
Make no mistake: if we lose this fight to defend our democracy, the attacks on our elections will only get worse. And the attempts by extreme, anti-democratic forces to tilt the system in their favor — to effectively drown out the American people’s voices — will only get more brazen.
But here’s why I’m optimistic: **their path to power is determined by people like you. And if enough of us do our part to protect our democracy, they will fail.**
The NDRC is fighting all across the country to defeat GOP gerrymandering and win the races most crucial to a fair redistricting process — so everyone’s voice can be heard. But we need your help to get the job done.
[**Our freedoms depend on a strong democracy. Let’s do everything we can to protect it. The NDRC is leading that charge, so I’m asking you to pitch in to this fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87447402/481177722/556566862?refcode=don_ndrc_react_email_welcome_email_2024-NDRC-React-Welcome-3_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=2024-NDRC-React-Welcome-3_&utm_campaign=welcome&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzYjMyMGU3LThhMzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jnlMrx-exVcRbEc-CVG1gROy38HrKreehEZPyc4SDz8=)
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87447403/481177723/556566862?refcode=don_ndrc_react_email_welcome_email_2024-NDRC-React-Welcome-3_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=2024-NDRC-React-Welcome-3_&utm_campaign=welcome&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIzYjMyMGU3LThhMzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=jnlMrx-exVcRbEc-CVG1gROy38HrKreehEZPyc4SDz8=)
Though we’ve already scored several major victories for a fairer democracy, this is far from over.
Our democracy is at its strongest when ordinary Americans come together, get engaged, and make their voices heard. With our democracy at risk, that’s never been more urgent. So I’m giving my all to this fight. And I’m glad to have you by my side.
More soon — thank you,
Barack Obama

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: re: setting our kids up for success
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
As Governor, I will work to address the teacher shortage, contend with learning loss, and make effective investments in Virginia’s public schools.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87447633/481178486/1037833720?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-06-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTQzZTU2MTYtOGIzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=k3CKFOGPHXHqgRQFabMRY_SyOxaqRLBPdMF210GYauI=)
---
| Peter,

As a mom of three school-aged children here in Virginia and a proud product of Virginia public schools, I know that our public education system is one of the most important tools we have to set our kids up for success.

We need to make sure our public schools have the resources they need — and we need to recognize the value of teachers' hard work, focus on strengthening our workforce training programs, and support Virginia's extraordinary higher education institutions. And we need to stop creating divides that distract from our top priority: building a stronger Virginia for the next generation.

As Governor, I will work to address the teacher shortage, contend with learning loss, and make effective investments in Virginia’s public schools.

**The success of every child in Virginia — as well as the success of our workforce and entire economy — depends on the success of our schools. The stakes are high, and[ _I hope I can count on your support with a contribution to my campaign today:_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87447634/481178489/-735451230?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2024-06-23_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTQzZTU2MTYtOGIzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=k3CKFOGPHXHqgRQFabMRY_SyOxaqRLBPdMF210GYauI=)**

clean_body: As Governor, I will work to address the teacher shortage, contend with learning loss, and make effective investments in Virginia’s public schools. | = | Peter, As a mom of three school-aged children here in Virginia and a proud product of Virginia public schools, I know that our public education system is one of the most important tools we have to set our kids up for success. We need to make sure our public schools have the resources they need — and we need to recognize the value of teachers' hard work, focus on strengthening our workforce training programs, and support Virginia's extraordinary higher education institutions. And we need to stop creating divides that distract from our top priority: building a stronger Virginia for the next generation. As Governor, I will work to address the teacher shortage, contend with learning loss, and make effective investments in Virginia’s public schools. The success of every child in Virginia — as well as the success of our workforce and entire economy — depends on the success of our schools. The stakes are high, and= | | = | = | = | | = | = | = | = Thanks, Abigail * | | = Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. body:
We're running out of time to close the gap, friend.
| | |
---
Friend, this is serious:

Our race in Ohio _will_ determine control of the Senate.**That’s why the GOP is spending more money on TV ads in Ohio than in any other Senate race in the country.**
They’re going ALL IN to defeat Sherrod, and even worse? **Their efforts could be making an impact: The latest polls show Sherrod is _statistically tied_ with our Trump-backed opponent, Bernie Moreno.**
Sherrod is a champion for workers and families – and we need his voice in the Senate fighting for the Dignity of Work. And with the end-of-quarter FEC deadline right around the corner, we need a surge of grassroots support so we can show Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and Bernie Moreno that we're in this race to win.
But here’s the bad news: **We're still 3,426 Team Sherrod members short of our goal – and we're running out of time to close the gap.**

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87448514/481181523/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWUyMjE3ZC04YzMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lEj6vrBXXgRO3BG9geN0RBccy28PHBl4rc0oZGOTU-I=&emci=5d75fe7d-d530-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&emdi=75e2217d-8c31-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Earlier this week, I wrote to you about how Republicans think their path to victory in the House runs through multiple seats in Oregon. **First-term Congresswoman Val Hoyle in the 4th District is one of their biggest targets, and I'm hoping you can support her before the end-of-quarter deadline on June 30.** Last election cycle, the Republican Establishment and its wealthy donors threw everything they had into this race, hoping to flip the district red. This year will be no different, because they know they can't win running on an agenda that is wildly out of step with Oregon values. [**Let's show the GOP and its mega-donors that they can't buy OR-04. Will you join me in standing with Val before her end-of-quarter deadline?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87448515/481181524/1154459446?refcode=2024-06-23-hoyle&recurring=&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=75e2217d-8c31-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWUyMjE3ZC04YzMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lEj6vrBXXgRO3BG9geN0RBccy28PHBl4rc0oZGOTU-I=) [Donate Today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87448516/481181525/1154459446?refcode=2024-06-23-hoyle&recurring=&amount=19&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=75e2217d-8c31-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NWUyMjE3ZC04YzMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lEj6vrBXXgRO3BG9geN0RBccy28PHBl4rc0oZGOTU-I=) **Val Hoyle is the real deal, and she will always fight for Oregon.** Val has a proven track record of standing up for equal rights, small businesses, and the future of the planet. She's never afraid to speak truth to power, and in her short time in Congress, Val has proven herself to be an ally for working families, not special interests. All of that is _exactly_ why MAGA Republicans want her gone. **They know that they can count on their rubber-stamp candidate to undo progress on the causes that Val and I believe in.** So that's why we need to send a clear message: **right-wing outside money isn't going to fool Oregonians when it comes to a leader like Val Hoyle.** [**I'm proudly all-in on Val. clean_body: | | | | Earlier this week, I wrote to you about how Republicans think their path to victory in the House runs through multiple seats in Oregon. First-term Congresswoman Val Hoyle in the 4th District is one of their biggest targets, and I'm hoping you can support her before the end-of-quarter deadline on June 30. Last election cycle, the Republican Establishment and its wealthy donors threw everything they had into this race, hoping to flip the district red. This year will be no different, because they know they can't win running on an agenda that is wildly out of step with Oregon values. = = Val Hoyle is the real deal, and she will always fight for Oregon. Val has a proven track record of standing up for equal rights, small businesses, and the future of the planet. She's never afraid to speak truth to power, and in her short time in Congress, Val has proven herself to be an ally for working families, not special interests. All of that is exactly why MAGA Republicans want her gone. They know that they can count on their rubber-stamp candidate to undo progress on the causes that Val and I believe in. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: We need to make sure this radical pet project never sees the light of day
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240623-2?refcode=em20240623-2&refcode2=3345_552475_snguCw&akid=3345%2E552475%2EsnguCw)
Peter, as you read this, anti-abortion political groups are working on a plan to rescind abortion rights in every way possible — and they’ll hand that plan to President Trump on Day 1 of his presidency.
These groups advise leveraging new rules at agencies like the FTC, FDA, and EPA, as well as using executive orders to slash abortion access nationwide — without needing to receive Congressional approval.
They’re calling it the Heritage Foundation’s 2025 Presidential Transition Project. It’s almost 1,000 pages long, and its authors include members of the first Trump administration, Students for Life, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America and other anti-abortion organizations. They've also been collecting resumes from conservative activists who are interested in becoming political appointees of these agencies to carry out these new anti-abortion measures themselves.
This will enable the Trump administration to have everything and everyone it needs to carry out its goal of rescinding abortion rights everywhere nationwide — no matter where you live.
Peter, as these groups work on their plan, I’ve got a plan too. To fight like hell to keep Trump out of the White House, work to re-elect President Biden, flip the House, and expand the Senate with more pro-choice Democrats. That way, we’ll have the votes we need to codify abortion rights into federal law.
**[Splitting a donation to our campaign and Bob Casey today is one of the best ways to make sure that the Heritage Foundation’s 2025 Presidential Transition Project remains just a radical little pet project and never sees the light of day. Will you please pitch in $5 or anything you can to power our work to protect abortion rights at the federal level?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240623-2?refcode=em20240623-2&refcode2=3345_552475_snguCw&akid=3345%2E552475%2EsnguCw)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Elizabeth

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=3345%2E552475%2EsnguCw)

name: Adam Schiff
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
Friend — We are just days from our June fundraising deadline. Before I explain why this deadline is so important, will you chip in a split donation of $20 between Seth Moulton and my campaign today to support my campaign? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

June is just 5 months from November, which means that we don’t have time to fall behind on our fundraising goals.

Hitting each fundraising goal, or falling short, will produce one of two possible narratives — that grassroots Democrats are doing everything possible to defeat Trump, or if we’re leaving the door cracked open for his return.

I’m going to be honest with you — we are a bit behind on our goal this month.

But I’m not worried because I know I can rely on this team to always show up. From the beginning of my campaign, I’ve counted on our team to fuel our efforts to fight back against MAGA extremists and build the biggest grassroots movement California has ever seen.

This team has gotten me this far, and I know they can carry me through the election.

With all of this being said, will you rush a split donation today between Seth Moulton and my campaign to get us back on track to reach our June fundraising goal? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

We can’t give the GOP any leverage to say that this campaign is weak or losing momentum. With your help, we won’t. Thank you for everything.

— Adam

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/m23-schiff]

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: Why I voted against the Farm Bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
Our community deserves better than partisan politics |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87449296/481183746/-822722586?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240623_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTM3M2FjYS04ZTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVx2IdCA7ufRxMBZcM9OYiN24IWBj9vtnK23V3tuyOw=)
---
Folks, late last month, a Farm Bill proposal passed out of committee and is on its way to the House floor. **I voted against this bill, and I wanted you to hear directly from me why.** Every day I head to Washington, I strive to bargain in good faith with my Democratic colleagues and my colleagues across the aisle, because I know that the real work happens when we’re able to come together to find common ground. However, the Farm Bill that the GOP rammed through the House Agriculture Committee lacks the common sense safety nets that our communities need. This bill guts SNAP benefits, deepens regional disparities in the farmer safety net and removes critical climate guardrails for conservation funds. Folks, we need a Farm Bill that doesn’t leave the Midwest behind — this bill is NOT that. Instead of serving their constituents, Republicans used this opportunity to play partisan games. This bill fails to meet the moment and leaves millions of folks in the dust. [**The only way we can get a good Farm Bill across the finish line is by flipping the House majority and building our Democratic coalition in the House Agriculture Committee. Will you pitch in to help us protect this critical frontline seat?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87449297/481183747/102294830?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240623_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTM3M2FjYS04ZTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVx2IdCA7ufRxMBZcM9OYiN24IWBj9vtnK23V3tuyOw=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87449298/481183748/102294830?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240623_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTM3M2FjYS04ZTMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nVx2IdCA7ufRxMBZcM9OYiN24IWBj9vtnK23V3tuyOw=)

## Vanguard vs. Fidelity vs. Schwab

---
| _Who are you partnered with?_ It’s no secret that Vanguard, Fidelity and Charles Schwab could be considered three of the most popular and well-known brokerage firms. Each offers a wide range of products and services, from banking and investment products to financial advisors and financial planning services.

However, there are some important differences, from fees to financial services to research resources, each of which could impact your customer experience. [Learn how these firms compare so you can decide on the fit for you.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/0h4j59n5spKi9G5cGTRd7g~~/AARclAA~~)

Ready to kickstart your retirement? Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy retirement plan. But with thousands of options available, knowing where to start can seem daunting. That’s why SmartAsset created a [no-cost tool](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/wQ4Z2uVU_g5t_ht5xDJDEg~~/AARclAA~~) to help match you with up to three financial advisors serving your area. All advisors on the platform are rigorously screened through a proprietary due diligence process and legally bound to work in your best interest.

While your advisor matches may not necessarily be associated with the above institutions, research suggests people who work with a financial advisor:
* feel more at ease about their finances
* could end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.1

It's never too late to plan to work toward a comfortable retirement.

name: Mike Lee
subject: Illegal immigrants are being registered to vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
ONE CITIZEN. ONE VOTE.

| Friend,

I introduced the SAVE ACT - which will protect American voters and prevent illegal aliens from voting in federal elections.

But across the country -- illegal immigrants are being registered to vote. ONE CITIZEN. ONE VOTE.

That's the way it's been and that's what federal law requires.

The SAVE ACT would stop this and it should pass unanimously -- by both Republicans AND Democrats who believe in democracy and FAIR ELECTIONS.

In fact, the only reason to oppose this that I can think of is if you're comfortable with or want non-citizens to vote. Or want non-citizens to influence the outcome of our elections.

There are estimates putting non-citizens in this country somewhere approaching 30 MILLION.

This is a major threat to our democracy and the SAVE ACT is our last chance to protect our elections.

**[Will you chip in just $1 so I can prove there is support behind my efforts: leeforsenate.com/save-act](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1585e5f3396a4eed8f2c68a73d9430e1&_e=CgpQTolJRHqNtr0r6-BmodXr1WUUFG1idAacNUY4sSfDuKVZNI8pzGlKmcRB9wsSYwvSh4xwSDvL3ZhZDr6Z6dwGf3yfA7p7YHW-021ZWDc3hI9m566FMihzy3iroRZRZbFUCTQGA2z9xyLV2XCoa-lFhUsr0wIWKjIaPOXahOeO55rhwF4RNTHFNp9EwMNyDWU6L1bdBhSN06emttCRnKcoL2WWd8ojfFZPMypqOKGCihO-XqXyIIP5ovWnS2i9DGpswGZL2Uj8wZctrcVflf-nTbkGhLsEKAPrO_hhlcaAh2vbv9yQoXk-tD5b9no-48Wf2bJirf-vlVhAesuEgXzT03Pqo78YaCN60UmkomVbLitN_swq1WzqzMELqhg9EHw7JutY0rxQUDw0PG9Vzg%3D%3D)**

$1: PASS THE SAVE ACT: **[leeforsenate.com/save-act](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1585e5f3396a4eed8f2c68a73d9430e1&_e=CgpQTolJRHqNtr0r6-BmodXr1WUUFG1idAacNUY4sSfDuKVZNI8pzGlKmcRB9wsSYwvSh4xwSDvL3ZhZDr6Z6dwGf3yfA7p7YHW-021ZWDc3hI9m566FMihzy3iroRZRZbFUCTQGA2z9xyLV2XCoa-lFhUsr0wIWKjIaPOXahOeO55rhwF4RNTHFNp9EwMNyDWU6L1bdBhSN06emttCRnKcoL2WWd8ojfFZPMypqOKGCihO-XqXyIIP5ovWnS2i9LiXr1gjXQ7mo4GqAmStem-I4kxeXZrTzlvTqDafhE7xXc-qm9AcJQD7ISn5kmdx0JLr5hC2AVcgnuJ0woxK8EpTAXBtqz5vtsoo27IKHuB6LnFUk_swhg0pwkrao8t1qpfJz9nWFO_rKd6jnlAXXeA%3D%3D)**

I'm fighting for YOU, I'm fighting for our Democracy, and I'm fighting to prevent non-citizens from dictating our elections.

This should have unanimous support. But I'm sure we'll face opposition.

Chip in just $1 and stand with me today: **[leeforsenate.com/save-act](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1585e5f3396a4eed8f2c68a73d9430e1&_e=CgpQTolJRHqNtr0r6-BmodXr1WUUFG1idAacNUY4sSfDuKVZNI8pzGlKmcRB9wsSYwvSh4xwSDvL3ZhZDr6Z6dwGf3yfA7p7YHW-021ZWDc3hI9m566FMihzy3iroRZRZbFUCTQGA2z9xyLV2XCoa-lFhUsr0wIWKjIaPOXahOeO55rhwF4RNTHFNp9EwMNyDWU6L1bdBhSN06emttCRnKcoL2WWd8ojfFZPMypqOKGCihO-XqXyIIP5ovWnS2i9ArS7O3UcrbYPepMdkdHsndD3SiXSGjvKK7Q-zobNuxQobhwjlgXUd_DUa9hEgu5SfDztTeoHw8rARw9G-yZ-zKh-x4ZsruxnZ2soZG55d04O4JgEzRE2NuR3FOPmkatYNOrIB9jrZlt5dUO-IvSgmQ%3D%3D)**

Thanks,

[](http://links.primaryupdate.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=1585e5f3396a4eed8f2c68a73d9430e1&_e=CgpQTolJRHqNtr0r6-BmodXr1WUUFG1idAacNUY4sSfDuKVZNI8pzGlKmcRB9wsSYwvSh4xwSDvL3ZhZDr6Z6dwGf3yfA7p7YHW-021ZWDc3hI9m566FMihzy3iroRZRZbFUCTQGA2z9xyLV2XCoa-lFhUsr0wIWKjIaPOXahOeO55rhwF4RNTHFNp9EwMNyDWU6L1bdBhSN06emttCRnKcoL2WWd8ojfFZPMypqOKGCihO-XqXyIIP5ovWnS2i9pSRi1L3TK1-1SFVsObVKje_lOh9_UkuEHgzz00kzh1Zcly9VXBLGp1qcYrEUOuPefAaZMzEGhGShIihoGjgIms8G5p6FwRHwuCvaDsWw1voGLxScHv8gDOOCCOJM1Xs-Q8_BN5Ezly6Cis87Zt9Krw%3D%3D)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: An urgent phone bank tonight for Jamaal!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Jamaal’s primary election is in just two days. We don’t want to wake up on
Wednesday wondering if there was anything else we could have done to help
him defeat his AIPAC-backed opponent.

We are at real risk of losing progressive incumbent Jamaal Bowman to a
racist, corrupt, career politician. But if we all come together and use
our grassroots people-power to boost Jamaal ahead of this election, we
know he can win!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140455?t=1001&akid=35431%2E1203867%2EVhKtTs ]With only two days to go, will you join Jamaal, Alexandria, Rashida,
Ayanna, and Summer for an emergency phone bank event tonight at 7 PM ET?

This primary could come down to the wire so we need as much grassroots
support as possible to connect with the voters who will decide the outcome
of this election.

We’ve been with Jamaal from the very beginning and now we need to have his
back in the final days before his primary election on Tuesday.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140455?t=1002&akid=35431%2E1203867%2EVhKtTs ]We’re running out of time to fight back and get out the vote for
Jamaal, so please consider joining our efforts to reject AIPAC and
re-elect Jamaal by joining this phone bank tonight at 7 PM ET →

Sign Up

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240623-35431-footer&t=1003&refcode2=35431_1203867_VhKtTs&akid=35431%2E1203867%2EVhKtTs

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1004&akid=35431%2E1203867%2EVhKtTs

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87449935/481185978/-1561725702?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240623_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI5Yzk2M2YtOTIzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f1HEHPuaqbfwZqoHS32_9Q6VVxD68LO2-tEGFpdk-0I=) Peter — We’re exactly one week away from our critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline, and I wanted to give you an update on where things stand. **We’re still $48,476 short with just seven days to go, so[if you’re able, please consider chipping in before midnight to help us make up for lost ground.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87449936/481185979/-1561725702?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240623_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI5Yzk2M2YtOTIzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f1HEHPuaqbfwZqoHS32_9Q6VVxD68LO2-tEGFpdk-0I=)** As I’ve said before: I’ll never come up with some false deadline to ask for your support. **I respect you and the hard-earned dollars you’re chipping in to fuel this campaign, and you deserve the truth. Scout’s honor.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87449937/481185980/-1561725702?refcode=AU_AHC_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240623_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDUwMDAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGI5Yzk2M2YtOTIzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=f1HEHPuaqbfwZqoHS32_9Q6VVxD68LO2-tEGFpdk-0I=) I want you to have confidence in me as a candidate for Congress and as a member of the House of Representatives. That’s why, from the very beginning, our campaign has been built on the idea of trust. **So when I say my June 30 deadline is real and the most important deadline our campaign has faced so far, I hope you can believe me — and when I say we’re behind, I hope you know it’s the truth.** _FiveThirtyEight_ ranks Arizona as the **closest** battleground state in America, which means Democrats have **zero** margin for error. name: Hillsdale College via Conservative Direct
subject: Get “The Great Principles of Chemistry” on DVD
body:
What is true about the world?

| | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=48168a9acd6a41c1aa41a26a1e512ea0&_t=IHblBuXR0Mo5LNmJe7UmMvnPTZHo6_IZpvDull_miLxkJ5mUtP4GxM84XN9VYTiJKbazk78iwgNfP6dq4IgwiNh9x6p2ru4ylU-3aJiIT9snnNBuRSp1ycmXoTN59Hmo)_
---
| | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=48168a9acd6a41c1aa41a26a1e512ea0&_e=wRlTl9rMZ98c0IPgiwpz4vwBP3OggLgsS-56zCKjh8A6SnxlAl3cfzb5m1SmxQ_HkV13NklQbHVpvNMb6XQYnELe73NIBJ5sHVFE3BTwZKWvmjsMLpsCmZHR95EdUukz7e3hjs-DCdJM-cKfgENBL7-2-NJWcFOTuuue2iCF8NQwDL-P8HPUMPvcnvvas7PCLS-EWRsN_xMvR3111MyQYCR6CP04J8pbuTx-m2z5Ysgcs5Vb5Dm07MTjEmFSxMuGHKtY9qHWNDCQ-eRYTDo3fOApUPh91etIIsxy923kpFVAqqeK8XhAW0R1pC1je7cdeKNSEr1RY1vWw2d1MmpNmTzxBumrNpg6rCz9jWRrF0V7482GB3l_FpQ9n6fFQNiNYSs9GzByG1QZfcoaCEzTSF4k_oQvih5Z7wsU9G0DG-Y%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=48168a9acd6a41c1aa41a26a1e512ea0&_e=wRlTl9rMZ98c0IPgiwpz4vwBP3OggLgsS-56zCKjh8A6SnxlAl3cfzb5m1SmxQ_HkV13NklQbHVpvNMb6XQYnELe73NIBJ5sHVFE3BTwZKWvmjsMLpsCmZHR95EdUukz7e3hjs-DCdJM-cKfgENBL7-2-NJWcFOTuuue2iCF8NQwDL-P8HPUMPvcnvvas7PCLS-EWRsN_xMvR3111MyQYCR6CP04J8pbuTx-m2z5Ysgcs5Vb5Dm07MTjEmFSxMuGA-1SViiYKOD0hVmA3fj4PxPOm6R1lUy682NRKG8iyX0F9Jw20q4h-QVzSgL40PtkGdupdf2o95N4g01FRm9cGLuHVT9PVbIraLU4E4fyMZPtI7bVt1bqBMP0xVEXYEL_tf1VZiNTubEuS-oELZSdbs9-FxfFOxjD6KIc8KQ0EyA%3D) Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=48168a9acd6a41c1aa41a26a1e512ea0&_e=wRlTl9rMZ98c0IPgiwpz4vwBP3OggLgsS-56zCKjh8A6SnxlAl3cfzb5m1SmxQ_HkV13NklQbHVpvNMb6XQYnELe73NIBJ5sHVFE3BTwZKWvmjsMLpsCmZHR95EdUukz7e3hjs-DCdJM-cKfgENBL7-2-NJWcFOTuuue2iCF8NQwDL-P8HPUMPvcnvvas7PCLS-EWRsN_xMvR3111MyQYCR6CP04J8pbuTx-m2z5Ysgcs5Vb5Dm07MTjEmFSxMuGN5G7C68ifjFh9WATkf_AFdhsTj5GfZQKIeJFpV_va52bNIoCtIUUZeBZ2oj98VKhUc0yZuYyqYse7RQIJH763XUa52toYGK8dtlywjFSRo-Z7hoJvOt1zJ2W2Y5jyFhNC-y2t8ZoJ3Xus_wbDFT8jZe9jsgAsZpXvMDEzZnBL7g%3D)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by Hillsdale College.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_s=48168a9acd6a41c1aa41a26a1e512ea0&_t=IHblBuXR0Mo5LNmJe7UmMvnPTZHo6_IZpvDull_miLxkJ5mUtP4GxM84XN9VYTiJKbazk78iwgNfP6dq4IgwiId8e8dWbxIL4ZbfFPIPRWONUuJDxwVRqvURz54Huvk93ji6KwHenokJOqcOLApn5IGEfoL8YAcGrcjF3gRh0ZM%3D)

| |

body:
Jack Smith could be REMOVED from this case
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=21591%2E4449941%2E-DFxMO)
---
**Look, we’re FURIOUS:** [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade-SCOTUS?source=FFR_20240623_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=21591%2E4449941%2E-DFxMO) Cannon has repeatedly shown that she’s incapable of being unbiased, but her latest move is clearly meant to remove Jack Smith and save Donald Trump.

So we’re not surprised that millions of Americans are _FURIOUS_ with Judge Cannon’s handling of this case.

**But we must know what local Democrats think. So we’re conducting an urgent poll:** **[_[CONFIRM] How would you grade Judge Aileen Cannon’s handling of Trump’s classified documents case?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade-SCOTUS?source=FFR_20240623_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=21591%2E4449941%2E-DFxMO)** | [F – THE WORST! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade-SCOTUS?source=FFR_20240623_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=21591%2E4449941%2E-DFxMO)
---

[C – AVERAGE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade-SCOTUS?source=FFR_20240623_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=11&akid=21591%2E4449941%2E-DFxMO)
[B – PRETTY GOOD »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade-SCOTUS?source=FFR_20240623_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=12&akid=21591%2E4449941%2E-DFxMO)
[A – INCREDIBLE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/grade-SCOTUS?source=FFR_20240623_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=13&akid=21591%2E4449941%2E-DFxMO)
We look forward to reading your responses,

Fight for Reform

So we’re conducting an urgent poll: [[CONFIRM] How would you grade Judge Aileen Cannon’s handling of Trump’s classified documents case?]() | We look forward to reading your responses, Fight for Reform | | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: "How would you describe yourself?"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Alexandria is often asked, “Are you becoming more establishment, or less progressive? How would you describe yourself?”
Take a look at how she answered in _New York_ magazine, and [if you can, make a $5 contribution to power her fight for transformative change.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240623.k3JFME&refcode=em20240623-6688-P_FND_CTR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=6688%2E2526796%2EJy-WdO)
* * *
For me, it’s about reading the moment, seeing the conditions that are evolving in the country for political reasons, but also social, economic, technological, etc, and reading those conditions and responding according to — for how I navigate — one’s core values and commitments.
I am progressive, but I also think that being a Democratic Socialist... that means something. It has a very defined perspective about **who we believe the fruits of our economy and labor should primarily serve and belong to**. It has baked in definitions about labor rights, and what our goals and aims are.
Progressive is the same thing. It’s a definition that evolves with the times.
I’m in my third term, I know my way around this place more. I felt this way about tending bar for seven or eight years.
Your first day, you don’t know what a speed well is. You don’t know what to grab.
And so some of the stuff you do is good, some of the stuff you do is ineffective. You mess things up. You do things that other people didn’t think of.
Now that I’m several years in, on one hand, I am more skilled and I’m able to do things.
**But it’s also true that the coverage and media interpretation about me has been wrong from the beginning** — this totally reactionary, “ _The sky is falling, this lady is nuts, she’s here to destroy everything_ ” narrative. I made a very clear determination that the narrative about me was so big, and so overwhelming, that I was not going to waste my time trying to say, “You’re all getting me wrong, you don’t understand me,” etc.
I just knew that it was going to take years of me _being myself_ for my actions to accumulate into a body of analysis. **At the end of the day, I haven’t changed a single policy position that I originally ran on**. I have all of the same exact convictions, values, policy commitments — I’ve just gotten better at executing on them.
And I understand that my role is in inside-outside political strategy. The left has built an increasingly sophisticated outside, but we have an anemic inside.
I feel like right now **my role is to build a juggernaut of momentum**.
And honestly: if we can get to a place where a regular old Democrat believes in trust-busting, and a regular old Democrat believes in a full path to citizenship, Medicare for All, combating climate change, and a Green New Deal — **_f*ck yeah_. That’s literally what my goal was from the beginning**.
My goal has always been to bring the mainstream to me, and in the process, have my progressive beliefs be mainstream.
Our grassroots movement is pushing for bold, new ideas and accountability because **our futures are worth fighting for**. Our healthcare, our education, and our families are worth fighting for — and together, there is nothing we can’t win.
[Will you make a $5 contribution today so that we can keep building momentum for our movement pushing for a brighter future for all? ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240623.k3JFME&refcode=em20240623-6688-P_FND_CTR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=6688%2E2526796%2EJy-WdO)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20240623.k3JFME&refcode=em20240623-6688-P_FND_CTR_GOL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=6688%2E2526796%2EJy-WdO)**
In solidarity,
Team AOC

_Read the full interview with Kara Swisher here:[AOC on AI, Gaza, Insults, and Whether Trump Will Lock Her Up._](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/28718?t=22&akid=6688%2E2526796%2EJy-WdO)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20240623?refcode=em20240623-6688-P_FND_CTR_GOL&t=23&refcode2=6688_2526796_Jy-WdO&akid=6688%2E2526796%2EJy-WdO)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20240623-6688-P_FND_CTR_GOL&t=24&akid=6688%2E2526796%2EJy-WdO)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=6688%2E2526796%2EJy-WdO) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=6688%2E2526796%2EJy-WdO) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=6688%2E2526796%2EJy-WdO)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=28&akid=6688%2E2526796%2EJy-WdO)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=6688%2E2526796%2EJy-WdO)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

clean_body: Missing our fundraising goals could leave our party scrambling to make up the difference in the weeks before Election Day, when some voters have already cast their ballots. | | | | | ---|--- Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is fast approaching, and after missing our goal the past two months, we can’t afford to fall short again for a third time. We have just seven days to raise $300,000. That’s seven days to raise the funds that will help: 🗳️ Mobilize voters 📋 Train volunteers 📲 Run digital ads 🎯 Invest in our target states 🤝Strategize with candidates ...and so much more. Missing our fundraising goals could leave our party scrambling to make up the difference in the weeks before Election Day, when some voters have already cast their ballots. Political experts just identified six of our target chambers as potential toss-ups – so we need to be fully equipped to take on every race. The GOP is watching closely for any sign of weakness, and missing our fundraising goal for the third month in a row could leave our candidates outspent and overshadowed by MAGA Republicans. But here’s the good news: A generous group of donors is offering to match every donation to our movement five times until midnight on the 30th. Your $7, $25, or even $50 donation will have five times the impact, giving our candidates the support they need. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We can’t back down. name: Lila Rose, Live Action
subject: Pro-Abortion diapers?!
body:
Did you know that America’s most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion?

| [ ](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/y9zQ1_oCyt_ogUMS3mwVuw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWwHgP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLmxpdmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnL3NlbmQtYS1ib3gtb2YtZGlhcGVycy10by1hLW1vbS1pbi1uZWVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRpYXBlcl9wYWNrX2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lbTJfQUUtT0dUNTA1ODhXA3NwY0IKZnUHcnhmFb9UPVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
#
Friend of Life,

Did you know that America's most popular diaper brands, including Huggies, Pampers, Hello Bello, and Honest Co., all support abortion?

This is peak irony. Brands that provide a necessity for babies also financially and/or publicly support an act that intentionally kills innocent children in the womb.

As pro-life people, we can do something to put a stop to this.

**Live Action is hosting a diaper drive with EveryLife -- the first pro-life diaper company -- to help mothers and their babies in need.**

If you're tired of supporting brands that don't align with your pro-life values, you can do something now to help women AND support a pro-life business.

**Your gift of just $50 will provide six packs of EveryLife diapers to a mom who is considering abortion or is facing a crisis and help her embrace life. We are searching for 100 people who can give before midnight so we can get diapers to local pro-life pregnancy centers nationwide. **
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/y9zQ1_oCyt_ogUMS3mwVuw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWwHgP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLmxpdmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnL3NlbmQtYS1ib3gtb2YtZGlhcGVycy10by1hLW1vbS1pbi1uZWVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRpYXBlcl9wYWNrX2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lbTJfQUUtT0dUNTA1ODhXA3NwY0IKZnUHcnhmFb9UPVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
Is this something you can do? Here's your secure link to give: **[https://give.liveaction.org/send-a-box-of-diapers-to-a-mom-in-need/](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/y9zQ1_oCyt_ogUMS3mwVuw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWwHgP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLmxpdmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnL3NlbmQtYS1ib3gtb2YtZGlhcGVycy10by1hLW1vbS1pbi1uZWVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRpYXBlcl9wYWNrX2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lbTJfQUUtT0dUNTA1ODhXA3NwY0IKZnUHcnhmFb9UPVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

EveryLife prides itself in being a pro-life company that uses premium materials for their diapers-- and better yet, EveryLife promotes the message that every baby is a miracle from God who deserves to be loved, protected, and supported.

Your gift will send a box of diapers to a local pro-life pregnancy clinic so that moms days away from a potentially life-ending decision can receive the practical support they need to choose life.

There's only a few hours to go and we haven't been able to reach our goal of 100 partners before midnight. Please consider **[donating right now before this opportunity expires.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/y9zQ1_oCyt_ogUMS3mwVuw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWwHgP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLmxpdmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnL3NlbmQtYS1ib3gtb2YtZGlhcGVycy10by1hLW1vbS1pbi1uZWVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRpYXBlcl9wYWNrX2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lbTJfQUUtT0dUNTA1ODhXA3NwY0IKZnUHcnhmFb9UPVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)**

Thank you in advance for standing with us against big abortion and equipping moms to choose life.

For Life,

Lila Rose
**President and Founder**

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/y9zQ1_oCyt_ogUMS3mwVuw~~/AARclAA~/RgRoWwHgP0SnaHR0cHM6Ly9naXZlLmxpdmVhY3Rpb24ub3JnL3NlbmQtYS1ib3gtb2YtZGlhcGVycy10by1hLW1vbS1pbi1uZWVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWRpYXBlcl9wYWNrX2FwcGVhbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1lbTJfQUUtT0dUNTA1ODhXA3NwY0IKZnUHcnhmFb9UPVIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

2200 Wilson Blvd, Suite 102, PMB 111 Arlington, VA 22201

Old Glory Today
---

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: I'm just going to state the obvious:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
Split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List >> |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87450847/481189373/-1601421226?refcode=WTEFHR55_20240623_WarrenSplit_ND_v1s2&sourceid=1054067&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTlkOGYzYy05NDMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDuChhddQPYmmjT_MsJrAhwQEiwTbeRlgynGlmgAE6g=) Peter,

I want to make this abundantly clear: _There is no acceptable middle road or compromise when it comes to abortion rights._

The vast majority of Americans agree that the government shouldn't interfere with people's personal decisions on abortion. The GOP and anti-abortion extremists know this, so they worked for years to force their unpopular agenda through the courts — and away from the ballot box.

But now that they've gotten their wish and overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , voters are fighting back. In election after election — in Kansas, Michigan, Ohio, and Virginia — voters keep reminding anti-abortion extremists how out of touch their agenda really is.

The GOP can try to soften their anti-abortion stances all they want ahead of the 2024 election, but _voters support abortion access_. _Period_. And their presidential nominee, Donald Trump, can't outrun his extreme anti-abortion record:
* He appointed the anti-choice Supreme Court justices responsible for overturning _Roe v. Wade_

* He's _boasted_ about being the president who "got rid of _Roe v. Wade_ "

* He said there should be "some form of punishment" for women who get abortions

* He's even said he would let states monitor women's pregnancies so they can know if they've gotten an abortion

When asked point-blank if he would veto a bill that imposes a nationwide ban, Trump refused to answer.

**I won't stop calling out the GOP's extremism and fighting for the right to an abortion nationwide. That means electing Democratic pro-choice candidates and ending the filibuster so we can codify _Roe v. Wade_ into federal law. And that means supporting candidates and ballot measures that will defend abortion rights at the state level.** **[If you're with me, please split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List so we can keep growing this pro-choice movement ahead of the 2024 election.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87450848/481189375/-1601421226?refcode=WTEFHR55_20240623_WarrenSplit_ND_v1s2&sourceid=1054067&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTlkOGYzYy05NDMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDuChhddQPYmmjT_MsJrAhwQEiwTbeRlgynGlmgAE6g=)** _If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately._ | [DONATE $5](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87450851/481189376/-1601421226?expresslane=true&amount=5&refcode=WTEFHR55_20240623_WarrenSplit_ND_v1s2&sourceid=1054067&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTlkOGYzYy05NDMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDuChhddQPYmmjT_MsJrAhwQEiwTbeRlgynGlmgAE6g=) | [DONATE $25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87450852/481189379/-1601421226?expresslane=true&amount=25&refcode=WTEFHR55_20240623_WarrenSplit_ND_v1s2&sourceid=1054067&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTlkOGYzYy05NDMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qDuChhddQPYmmjT_MsJrAhwQEiwTbeRlgynGlmgAE6g=)

clean_body: Split a donation between my campaign and EMILYs List >> | = Peter, I want to make this abundantly clear: There is no acceptable middle road or compromise when it comes to abortion rights. The vast majority of Americans agree that the government shouldn't interfere with people's personal decisions on abortion. The GOP and anti-abortion extremists know this, so they worked for years to force their unpopular agenda through the courts — and away from the ballot box. But now that they've gotten their wish and overturned Roe v. Wade , voters are fighting back. In election after election — in Kansas, Michigan, Ohio, and Virginia — voters keep reminding anti-abortion extremists how out of touch their agenda really is. The GOP can try to soften their anti-abortion stances all they want ahead of the 2024 election, but voters support abortion access. Period. And their presidential nominee, Donald Trump, can't outrun his extreme anti-abortion record: He appointed the anti-choice Supreme Court justices responsible for overturning Roe v. Wade He's boasted about being the president who "got rid of Roe v. Wade " He said there should be "some form of punishment" for women who get abortions He's even said he would let states monitor women's pregnancies so they can know if they've gotten an abortion When asked point-blank if he would veto a bill that imposes a nationwide ban, Trump refused to answer. I won't stop calling out the GOP's extremism and fighting for the right to an abortion nationwide. That means electing Democratic pro-choice candidates and ending the filibuster so we can codify Roe v. Wade into federal law. And that means supporting candidates and ballot measures that will defend abortion rights at the state level. = If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth Sen. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: the most expensive race in the country
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend, I just got off the phone with my campaign manager, and she broke some tough news: **Believe it or not, more money has been spent on TV ads for our race heading into November than in the presidential race.**
I know, friend, I almost spit out my coffee when she told me.
But here's the deal:**The GOP is zeroing in on our race because they know control of the Senate hinges on what happens here in Ohio.** That's why they've named me a top target for defeat, and why they're making record-breaking investments to defeat me.
Let me make one thing clear, friend: The GOP might outspend us in this race, but they will not outwork us. If we can keep reaching voters with our pro-worker message, we'll win.
**To make sure we have what it takes to win this race, my team and I have set an ambitious $75,000 daily fundraising goal to hit before _midnight tonight_. And I'm counting on top supporters like you to help me reach it.**
[**So please, friend, will you split $5, $25, or more now between my campaign and Jacky Rosen’s to help me raise the resources I need to win Ohio and defend our Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87450866/481189397/511749388?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4002-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDhkZmEyZi05NDMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Lvfcals3tTKMwHIlNvm0G-jFnCMFhVmEvvWM5hiAqBQ=)

name: Jim Banks
subject: I am just going to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Banks for Senate
body:
concern for the state of America

|
---
Friends,

I wanted to reach out and express my concern about the state of our race against the Radical Left. I am going to be brutally honest with you. **The Left and its elites are raising millions of dollars for all Democrats to defeat America First Republicans. They are beating us in the fundraising game, and I am officially worried.**

Because they **DOMINATE** in the fundraising game, my EOQ deadline has to be way higher than I originally thought. Your grassroots support will get the job done and get America back on track. I feel it. There is serious power in numbers. The Democrats may have a few billionaire donors, but we have the **MASSES.**

clean_body: concern for the state of America | Friends, I wanted to reach out and express my concern about the state of our race against the Radical Left. I am going to be brutally honest with you. The Left and its elites are raising millions of dollars for all Democrats to defeat America First Republicans. They are beating us in the fundraising game, and I am officially worried. Because they DOMINATE in the fundraising game, my EOQ deadline has to be way higher than I originally thought. Here’s how we will do this: Your grassroots support will get the job done and get America back on track. I feel it. There is serious power in numbers. The Democrats may have a few billionaire donors, but we have the MASSES. Thank you for all your time and support. You are truly appreciated. I know we can knock this deadline out of the park with your generosity. Jim Banks | Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2024 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

Friend,

“The best-looking United States Senator?”

“Who is... John N. Kennedy.”
