It’s going to take more than Double Jeopardy for us to win – it’s going to take the whole team’s support– but even just a few bucks will help. Thank you, Senator John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Paid for by John Kennedy for Us John Kennedy for Us P.O. Box 80418 Baton Rouge, LA 70808 If you would like to send donation by mail, Don't want to receive our emails anymore?**

name: Lucas Kunce
subject: Josh Hawley attacked Jon Hamm...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
#
Peter — my friend Jon Hamm is supporting my campaign for U.S. Senate.
And Josh Hawley is not happy about it.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52943?refcode=em20240623-5824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=5824%2E614464%2ErZLr_a)
**[FIGHT BACK NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52943?refcode=em20240623-5824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=5824%2E614464%2ErZLr_a)**
**Let me be clear: I am proud to have Jon’s support in this race.** Jon is a born-and-raised Missourian. He grew up through real struggle. He’s worked for minimum wage. He’s lived paycheck-to-paycheck. And he’s only fake for the movies. He truly cares about working people in Missouri.
**Josh Hawley can’t say any of those things about himself.** And by attacking Jon for being a "millionaire," Josh is attacking probably the only thing the two of them have in common.
Instead of campaigning on the ways he’s helped our state (he hasn’t) or how he plans to invest in our future (he won’t), Josh is obsessed with using every out-of-touch culture war he can think of to distract us from the fact that he’s enriched himself while failing to deliver for Missourians in the U.S. Senate.
**Here’s why Jon is supporting my campaign to replace Josh Hawley:** He knows I’ll fight to bring home every penny I can for Missouri, to invest in our communities and to secure our future for generations to come.
That’s the message my campaign urgently needs to deliver to Missourians — and I’m counting on your support to help us do it, Peter.
**[So will you please rush a donation of $10 or just whatever works best for you today so we can reach voters with our election-winning message every day between now and November 5th? I’m not taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so I mean it when I say anything you can give today makes a big impact on our grassroots campaign.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52943?refcode=em20240623-5824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=5824%2E614464%2ErZLr_a)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52944?refcode=em20240623-5824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=5824%2E614464%2ErZLr_a) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52944?refcode=em20240623-5824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=5824%2E614464%2ErZLr_a) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52944?refcode=em20240623-5824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=5824%2E614464%2ErZLr_a) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52944?refcode=em20240623-5824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=5824%2E614464%2ErZLr_a) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52944?refcode=em20240623-5824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=5824%2E614464%2ErZLr_a) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52944?refcode=em20240623-5824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=5824%2E614464%2ErZLr_a) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/52943?refcode=em20240623-5824&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=5824%2E614464%2ErZLr_a)

I’m proud to have Jon on this team, just like I’m proud to have hundreds of thousands of everyday people like you as part of this movement.
Together, we can defeat Hawely and take back this Senate seat in November.
Thanks for helping me get it done, Peter.
Now let’s get back to work,
Lucas

name: Mark Pukita, GFI Ohio
subject: 🆘 Immediate Attention Required: Resist Forced Masking
body:
Join us in our urgent mission to challenge government mask mandates! | | | [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d76e9e030f&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| This week's 3 most important things you need to know or actions you need to take to help us recapture our cities, state, and nation.

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed!

**BE SURE TO HAVE YOUR FAMILY & FRIENDS "JOIN US":**

---
| [Join Us!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fc08d4a3d3&e=5c740fa3e2 "Join Us!")
---
| | | **
CITIZEN TESTIMONY ALERT!
NEVER BE FORCED TO MASK AGAIN!
WE NEED 10 MINS. OF YOUR TIME!
SIMPLE INSTRUCTIONS HERE!**

---
|
Ohio House Bill (HB) 617 is explained as "Protect individuals from being compelled to wear a mask." on the State of Ohio, House of Representatives, web pages. It is important legislation to ensure we NEVER have to face government mandates forcing Ohioans to wear masks ever again. We need as many written testimonies as possible! Testimonies can be a short paragraph or up to two pages! Just make your VOICE HEARD! To see the bill & register to track it on the Ohio House website, click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=99151912b0&e=5c740fa3e2).

Go [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=22fab514f8&e=5c740fa3e2) for simple instructions on what to do to give your personal testimony in support of this bill, or click on the image below. It can be done in 10 mins. or less!
######
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=59bdc77650&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**THE OHIO PRECINCT STRATEGY
UNDERSTAND IT!
EMBRACE IT!
BECOME PART OF IT!**

---
|
If you haven't heard of the "Precinct Strategy" it is imperative you learn what it is and how it can be a big part of taking back our country, state, and communities from corrupt political insiders.

Ohio's political parties have an organization, codified in the Ohio Revised Code (ORC), that provides for 88 county parties and 1 state party for each of the 2 major political parties (Republican & Democrat).

Every precinct (or in some counties every ward & township) has an elected, unpaid, representative on their County Central Committee (CCC). These are the lowest-level elected offices in America, and a great way for average Americans to have an impact on how we are governed. All politics truly is local, right down to the precinct level. And the time commitment is typically no more than a few hours a calendar quarter.

The Ohio Precinct Strategy was formed to help Ohioans understand Ohio's political structure and identify grassroots candidates to run for these seats. The only qualification you need is to be an Ohio registered voter.

May 2026, about 2 years from now, is when more than half of Ohio's counties will have central committee elections.

If you have even a single spark of interest (or know someone else who might) please go to (or have them go to):

[**https://www.ohioprecinctstrategy.org**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b2f189c630&e=5c740fa3e2)

Or, click on the image below!

There, you (or they) can register, find more information on filing to run, how to run and win, and what you can do once in office. We also have people across the state who can provide any help & information you might need.

If you have any questions, feel free to call or text **Mark Pukita** at **614-499-0599 (c)** and have a chat. You can email him too: [**mark@mark4ohio.com**](mailto:mark@mark4ohio.com)

THANK YOU!
---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=05f1f8d293&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
|
---
| |
**KEEP AMERICA FOR AMERICANS!
CHINA'S SILENT WAR ON AMERICA!
WEEK 4 • LESSON 4**

---
|
In May we sent out a one-time special message about a new initiative called "[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6285a1e7e7&e=5c740fa3e2)" designed to wake up more Ohioans to the threat China poses to our communities, state, and nation. If you haven't seen that message, you can access a copy of it on the web [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=2060b82953&e=5c740fa3e2).

Part of this initiative is an Ohio-developed, 10-week "course" titled “**China’s Silent War on America** ”. A lesson will be released every week for 10 weeks. To remind you, we'll highlight new lessons in this email. Last week we highlighted [**Lesson 4**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0590915b45&e=5c740fa3e2). This week, we're highlighting [**Lesson 5**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=aa1ab88ff2&e=5c740fa3e2): **China’s Drug War on America[.](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b35dda5f63&e=5c740fa3e2)**

[**America for Americans**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e97ce667e0&e=5c740fa3e2) will provide a short lesson, one a week for ten weeks, to educate us on the many strategies China is using to undermine America’s power at home and abroad, while enriching its own homeland. The reader will also be guided towards action items to help reduce China’s influence in the state of Ohio.

Click [**HERE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=a62b89b56a&e=5c740fa3e2) or on the image below to access **Lesson 5** of “**China’s Silent War on America** ” called "[**China’s Drug War on America**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=771203592d&e=5c740fa3e2)".

_Next week's lesson, Lesson 6, will be the third of 5 lessons providing examples of China’s United Front's work in America and show how each of these initiatives undermines America’s national security._

THANK YOU!

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=75731820a6&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
| |
**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

---
| [June 16, 2024 - ⚠️ CRITICAL: ELECTION INTEGRITY IS AT STAKE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=893f6abbda&e=5c740fa3e2)

[June 9, 2024 - 💪 Ready for a property tax relief?](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=64ab99a08a&e=5c740fa3e2)

[June 2, 2024 - 😫 Tired of the Same Old Faces in DC?](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d0afc87363&e=5c740fa3e2)

[May 26, 2024 - ⏰ Crucial Info Awaits You This Week](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=de561cbed5&e=5c740fa3e2)

[May 19, 2024 - 📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=758e890736&e=5c740fa3e2 "📢 Your Voice Needed for Election Integrity TODAY!")

[April 28, 2024 - ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d11e80feae&e=5c740fa3e2)[👥 ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=0ebf7d24fc&e=5c740fa3e2 "👥 Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!")[Urgent: Safeguard our Kids, Elections, and Party!](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e3fa8762ca&e=5c740fa3e2)

[April 21, 2024 - 📣 Breaking: Election Integrity Lawsuit](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=158da19be9&e=5c740fa3e2)

[**CLICK HERE for access to all past issues!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=3b05587662&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|

Best regards,

**Mark Pukita

mark@gfiohio.com

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: Allow Me To Introduce Myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
If you’re going to be on Team Hunt, there are a few things you need to know about me first.

| [](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=ecc61e7b898c43ca8cbb377d0e4306be&_e=fkynhBoAJkIjU2ELIwNfiW2Up8AbBcvvhzSDuztOP4RS-7zWzGqz0t5DcoD0z_ASviCVnMAleY7vGQifQhsnuF2HLwjbyjSPt1Vvrh3awRCB9OEs76SIxBeNWZ1F7FyCf-W3MHz8xQRFLI-vWygqYEiYR5h2LmH1J4cPQdq07LXNMhH1EUuFH6Xc4_SlBIAxM0CKANuVUSNGtiFvPS6zSFF1cF-zMM4Y0tkZqEortggRhwRxN2KtwIZyHi4HZ-8s3wEnz9H4eC-DtDVLTfqCKFOLkHq20z0FdeB9NBZAEAPQtWxhDZG1H6-eP3gjxAvW)
---
Fellow American,
[](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=ecc61e7b898c43ca8cbb377d0e4306be&_e=fkynhBoAJkIjU2ELIwNfiW2Up8AbBcvvhzSDuztOP4RS-7zWzGqz0t5DcoD0z_ASviCVnMAleY7vGQifQhsnuF2HLwjbyjSPt1Vvrh3awRA36iGZ9bLnDcjhygtEq_a6WmweSFS5m4VLy4KmHCjNtJ9HHZyvCmlwjtKuMNKQMzrHtfYdugoIQgj2FQoIJysX5KHvq-AUxqRnwx1UyJVPYBmzi3oxdvLAHvCs1iq7eX979T3rIo4lCECH5olIwGzBTZYh1U-lztPg-CMPdcOnYVLX5dCFGrzLg1e_WyQvgOc%3D)
_Wesley Hunt here._

As we head into another election year, I want to ensure that the generous people supporting my reelection know why I'm running.

I was born and raised in Houston, Texas.

After graduating from high school, I felt the call to serve our nation in the military, like my father and sister before me, and I accepted an appointment to the United States Military Academy at West Point.
[](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=ecc61e7b898c43ca8cbb377d0e4306be&_e=fkynhBoAJkIjU2ELIwNfiW2Up8AbBcvvhzSDuztOP4RS-7zWzGqz0t5DcoD0z_ASviCVnMAleY7vGQifQhsnuF2HLwjbyjSPt1Vvrh3awRA36iGZ9bLnDcjhygtEq_a6WmweSFS5m4VLy4KmHCjNtPODNwYWMRJRgWgWiwJdbn2ZpoqPrFMBd-kpO9Ztgch3gcXjokm-n18ACdL2c4I66GWCs-F89uBwYiNlOqa5vHiYueJUmCJkTFYKGL74MYCRJAsh5euoL4sx7PWfR-pKG_NZIB1-znj7ezcz7FY0FwA%3D)_
(Me with my brother and sister, who also attended West Point)_
My service included one combat deployment to Iraq and two to Saudi Arabia, where I served as a Diplomatic Liaison Officer. While in Saudi Arabia, I represented the U.S. government in missions involving the Royal Saudi Land Forces Aviation Corps.

After completing my military service, I attended Cornell University, where I earned a Master of Business Administration (M.B.A.), a Master of Public Administration (M.P.A.), and a Master of Industrial and Labor Relations (M.I.L.R.).

I never thought I would get involved in politics, but after seeing the dysfunction and destruction wrought by liberal elites in the Democrat party, I was once again called to serve our great nation, by running for the United States Congress.

I knew that challenging the DC Washington elite wouldn't be easy, but after flying Apache helicopters over Iraq, I knew I was prepared to take on the tough fights.

****Join me in the fight to save the future of America.****

[](http://links.wesleyhunttx.com/u/click?_t=6aa969a792e549699e2a6024aa3e4ace&_m=ecc61e7b898c43ca8cbb377d0e4306be&_e=fkynhBoAJkIjU2ELIwNfiW2Up8AbBcvvhzSDuztOP4RS-7zWzGqz0t5DcoD0z_ASviCVnMAleY7vGQifQhsnuF2HLwjbyjSPt1Vvrh3awRA36iGZ9bLnDcjhygtEq_a6WmweSFS5m4VLy4KmHCjNtDbev0XyRxDvl8EHBYGkZpYYPtlBjZ7K6u1nII6KYD2-_RTOgDvTPVV_E6_N5kgkfS_LYLoZOXt1RJmpQ8VbRx0_DmXONrd9-1bELcAZF1KUPz1v8KmMm46v9A6TrApmlb_stg7D00Jd5PldFW8YvHU%3D)
**This picture** is my number one reason for serving Texans in Congress. Being a husband and a father has taught me selflessness and dedication and has instilled in me a desire to better our country for the next generation.

Now, here we are in one of the most consequential election years of our lifetime. The majority we fought so hard for in 2022 hangs in the balance, and conservative ideals are under fire every day.

**Nothing is more worth fighting for than our great country and community here at home.

Almost two years ago exactly, Republicans on the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_. Since then, Republicans in Congress, including our opponent, have been working hard to attack reproductive rights and restrict abortion access. And if the Republican nominee, Donald Trump, wins the presidency this November, his administration will allow states to monitor women’s pregnancies and will push to ban abortion nationwide. **We can’t let this anti-choice agenda win.** Republicans know they have to hang on to this seat to protect their House majority — that’s why Mike Johnson’s super PAC is spending more in our district than in almost any other city in the country. **If we hit our quarterly fundraising goal, we’ll have the resources we need to fight back.** [**Kirsten is unapologetically pro-choice. clean_body: | | | | | Hi Peter, Our end-of-quarter deadline is just a week away. This is the last chance we have to show the strength of our campaign until September, when our fundraising numbers will be made public once again. = = Almost two years ago exactly, Republicans on the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. Since then, Republicans in Congress, including our opponent, have been working hard to attack reproductive rights and restrict abortion access. And if the Republican nominee, Donald Trump, wins the presidency this November, his administration will allow states to monitor women’s pregnancies and will push to ban abortion nationwide. We can’t let this anti-choice agenda win. Republicans know they have to hang on to this seat to protect their House majority — that’s why Mike Johnson’s super PAC is spending more in our district than in almost any other city in the country. If we hit our quarterly fundraising goal, we’ll have the resources we need to fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = = = | = = = | | = = = | = = = | | Thank you so much. Engel HQ | | | = Kirsten is a mom, an environmental attorney, and a former State Legislator who has spent the past six years fighting to restore funding to public schools, protect Arizona's natural resources, and make our communities safer. name: Joe Pereles
subject: A flat-out sprint starting right now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pereles for Missouri, Rhonda West, Treasurer
body:
https://www.perelesformissouri.com/ [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/]
Peter,
This month is a crucial time for my campaign. All of the hard work and the long hours that my team and I have been putting in since I announced my candidacy last summer has set us up for this moment: a flat-out sprint from now until November 5 th that will put this campaign in a position to win on Election Day!
Some very serious issues are on the ballot this election—including restoring basic reproductive rights, defending public education from corrupt attempts to defund it, and preventing further attempts to erode majority rule and strip away peoples’ right to have their voices heard through ballot propositions.
This is going to require a lot of hard work, commitment, and strategic planning if we are going to flip this seat red to blue and win this fight.
That’s why I want to ask you as directly as I can if you can help me break the supermajority in the Missouri State Senate by supporting our effort to win this seat. Can you donate $15, $50, or anything you can do right now to help me and my team flip SD-15 and restore some sense of decency, sanity, and compassion to Missouri? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=eoq2-1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $15 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=eoq2-1_express_lane_15] DONATE $25 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=eoq2-1_express_lane_25]
DONATE $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=eoq2-1_express_lane_50] DONATE $100 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=eoq2-1_express_lane_100]
DONATE $250 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=eoq2-1_express_lane_250] DONATE $500 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?express_lane=true&amount=500&refcode=eoq2-1_express_lane_500]
DONATE Other Amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=eoq2-1]
With so much on the line, I am more determined than ever to make this a campaign that we will all be proud of—one with energy, enthusiasm, and an optimistic vision of the future and what we can achieve together.
I appreciate everything you do to support me and other Democrats running up and down the ballot to make our world a better place.
- Joe
https://www.perelesformissouri.com/ [https://www.perelesformissouri.com/]
PS: I really dislike sending end of the quarter fundraising asks, but this race is too important not to pull out all of the stops to win and that includes this kind of email! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/perelesformissouri24?refcode=eoq2-1_ps]

body:
But only a few Senators actually did something | | |

|

Fellow Conservative: In the wake of Donald Trump's corrupt persecution by Democrat prosecutors in New York, every Republican Senator _said_ something.

Press releases flew out of Capitol Hill. Social media platforms twittered. Cable news filled with righteous indignation.

**But only a few Senators actually _did_ something.**

The day after Trump's phony “verdict” came down, Senator **Mike Lee**(R-UT) pledged to end business as usual for the Biden Administration. He was immediately joined by these Senate conservatives: **✓ J.D. Vance** (R-OH) **✓ Tommy Tuberville** (R-AL) **✓ Eric Schmitt** (R-MO) **✓ Rick Scott** (R-FL) **✓ Josh Hawley** (R-MO) **✓ Ron Johnson** (R-WI) **✓ Rand Paul** (R-KY)
---
Their **Pledge Letter** promises to _oppose_ : ❌ Any new funding bills for Joe Biden's weaponized Administration;

❌ Any new political or judicial appointments; and,

❌ Any expedited consideration of Democrat legislation not related to national security.

Thanks to a groundswell of grassroots support, more Senators have joined the letter since it was originally released, bringing the total number to 14. And the pressure continues to mount. There is no reason Republican Senators should fund Joe Biden's law-fare or confirm the dangerous political nominees wielding it. **SENATE CONSERVATIVES**

Words aren't enough. In a fight like this, words are almost meaningless! That's why the Pledge Letter is so important — it forces Republican Senators to put their votes where their mouths are. **[**The outspoken Senate Conservatives fighting back against the Left need your urgent support, so please rush a split contribution to them right now.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=5e723b8f4cb84e639f40f5fe629346b5&_e=BsP4lraWknDbVYY0ovqmN53_3-Dvc-1jQIzR4GBNvfVLpfK0JJfP2urbV_iVIE0vktJ_Ls50D1GSadQaSUdJcqFmFITCPSkHn6axP0Fg_9snbArxZDGwCWoHjryLAkKVUjcfJsCCBWjo94WpC0vUWfG7NKUNqWmIfw9z79d0Vi2e1Rlx_XX7g1PkzzwKK3FwFSXFUnZBKA3KLbQcTsaafuU3_YgvcYh1npWQzW0lNsQVjA4zgWkItm4Ehf9i1FKJRHb014x4-bHjx4vT0KhVyw%3D%3D)** We will pay all fundraising expenses and transfer 100% of your contributions directly to their committees.

subject: I need your help

Peter, it’s Eugene Vindman. My race was called, and **I’m honored to accept the Democratic nomination to represent Virginia’s 7th district in Congress!**

**Now, the real work begins — and it’s only going to get harder.** This is likely going to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country.

As we head into the general election, I am counting on this team to show our MAGA opponent that we are determined and prepared to take them on. But I can't do that and win this battleground district without you by my side, Peter.

[Please, can you split a $15 contribution between Defeat Republicans and my campaign to help me start the general election off on the right foot? Every single dollar will help power our pro-democracy movement through Election Day and help us take back the House majority from the extremist GOP.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87451886/481193044/237677137?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240623_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5ZjM0NTdkLTk5MzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JNloEpyBTry4YIvcpi2NkoU8EwlBJX5sGlUv8g0Y9fw=)

The people of Virginia’s 7th district spoke up loud and clear to say that they want a representative with integrity — one who preserves our fundamental values and principles and not extremists who want to ban abortions and books.

But truthfully, this race is much bigger than Virginia’s 7th district, or you and me, Peter.

It’s a fight to end the hateful MAGA regime that wants to control our lives, play politics with our classrooms, ban reproductive freedom, and serve their party over the people who elected them.

It’s a fight to return true leadership, integrity, and commitment to our country back to the People’s House.

It’s a fight to defend the very future of our democracy, and the stakes have never been higher.

So as we begin this next stage of our pro-democracy movement, I am hoping you will stand firmly by my side — because I cannot fend off attacks from Trump, wealthy MAGA mega-donors, and GOP super PACs without your support.

[Can you please split a $15 contribution between Defeat Republicans and my campaign for Congress today? Every day from now until November 5th, I’ll be fighting to keep this seat out of extremist hands. ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/87451891/481193049/237677137?refcode=DR_SPLIT_FR_90DO_240623_1_2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg1ODM1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5ZjM0NTdkLTk5MzEtZWYxMS04NmQyLTYwNDViZGQ5ZTA5NiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JNloEpyBTry4YIvcpi2NkoU8EwlBJX5sGlUv8g0Y9fw=)

Peter, we are at a critical juncture in American history, where our choices will determine whether we uphold democracy or fall to autocratic control.

As your Democratic nominee for VA-07, I will work tirelessly to hold this seat and ensure we can take back the house and continue to preserve this fragile experiment that is our democracy.

Let’s do this,

Eugene Vindman

clean_body: | Peter, it’s Eugene Vindman. My race was called, and I’m honored to accept the Democratic nomination to represent Virginia’s 7th district in Congress! Now, the real work begins — and it’s only going to get harder. This is likely going to be one of the most competitive and expensive races in the country. As we head into the general election, I am counting on this team to show our MAGA opponent that we are determined and prepared to take them on. But I can't do that and win this battleground district without you by my side, Peter. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately by clicking a button below. | = = = = The people of Virginia’s 7th district spoke up loud and clear to say that they want a representative with integrity — one who preserves our fundamental values and principles and not extremists who want to ban abortions and books. But truthfully, this race is much bigger than Virginia’s 7th district, or you and me, Peter. It’s a fight to end the hateful MAGA regime that wants to control our lives, play politics with our classrooms, ban reproductive freedom, and serve their party over the people who elected them. It’s a fight to return true leadership, integrity, and commitment to our country back to the People’s House. It’s a fight to defend the very future of our democracy, and the stakes have never been higher. So as we begin this next stage of our pro-democracy movement, I am hoping you will stand firmly by my side — because I cannot fend off attacks from Trump, wealthy MAGA mega-donors, and GOP super PACs without your support. = = Peter, we are at a critical juncture in American history, where our choices will determine whether we uphold democracy or fall to autocratic control. As your Democratic nominee for VA-07, I will work tirelessly to hold this seat and ensure we can take back the house and continue to preserve this fragile experiment that is our democracy. name: Debbie for Florida 2024
subject: Have you seen what Rick Scott's been up to?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Debbie for Florida
body:
JUNE: Rick Scott's no good, very bad month
| | |
---
Friend: Have you seen all the _horrible_ things Rick Scott has been up to?

There's been a lot. But here's a quick summary for you:
* **Scott proudly supported the abortion ban in Florida,** which went into effect on May 1.
* He skipped a crucial FAA reauthorization vote to support his good friend Donald Trump in court, **even going as far as attacking Judge Merchan’s daughter in front of the courthouse.**
* After overseeing one of the largest Medicare frauds in history, stealing **MILLIONS** of dollars from Medicare and using that same money to buy his way into the Senate seat he currently occupies — _**he's playing the victim**. _
* And just days after he accompanied Trump in court, he announced that he's officially running to be the next Senate Republican leader.** This means my race to retire Rick Scott could decide BOTH the Senate majority and the majority leader.**

But enough is enough. **_Ya no más_**. Scott’s time of wasting taxpayer money in the Senate ends now. Floridians deserve a real leader, friend, not someone who's only interested in winning Trump's approval by being his mouthpiece while he's under a gag order.
Unlike Rick, I got into public service because I truly care about people**.** After years of seeing the harm he's done in Florida, and how it’s only getting worse, I knew it was time to fight back and stand up for Floridians. **That's why I'm promising to use my voice in the Senate to fight for affordable health care, protect the critical government programs and benefits that Rick Scott wants to gut, and defend reproductive freedom nationwide.**
Right now, polling shows me **neck and neck** with Rick Scott — meaning this is our best chance to retire him for good. But to truly compete, pull ahead, and win, I need the help of grassroots supporters like you:
**We still need to raise $500,000 by midnight tonight to meet my weekly fundraising goal, but my team says we're still 19% short, and I'm counting on you to help close the gap.[So please, friend, will you chip in $5 or anything you can spare by 11:59 pm tonight to send Rick Scott packing and help me flip Florida blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87451962/481193240/1820369458?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1420-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWQ0NzI3YzUtOTkzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ir2cN-d8ohs50a1z-APUrC24qySOjxCmMIK5tm6noDg=)**

clean_body: JUNE: Rick Scott's no good, very bad month | | | Friend: Have you seen all the horrible things Rick Scott has been up to? There's been a lot. But here's a quick summary for you: Scott proudly supported the abortion ban in Florida, which went into effect on May 1. He skipped a crucial FAA reauthorization vote to support his good friend Donald Trump in court, even going as far as attacking Judge Merchan’s daughter in front of the courthouse. After overseeing one of the largest Medicare frauds in history, stealing MILLIONS of dollars from Medicare and using that same money to buy his way into the Senate seat he currently occupies — he's playing the victim. And just days after he accompanied Trump in court, he announced that he's officially running to be the next Senate Republican leader. This means my race to retire Rick Scott could decide BOTH the Senate majority and the majority leader. But enough is enough. Ya no más. Scott’s time of wasting taxpayer money in the Senate ends now. body:

Peter,

The team wanted to be sure that you saw our most recent ballot access map update.

---
[ ](www.jillstein2024.com/donate)
---
This update is important because we have some good news and some bad news we want to share with you.

The Bad News: Our map is not entirely green - **_yet_** _
__
_**The Good News: We’re on the ballot in 22 states plus D.C. with many more on the way!**

As you know Jill and countless volunteers on the ground are working tirelessly every day to put a pro-worker, anti-war, anti-genocide, climate action agenda front and center in this election.

However, the truth is they can’t do it alone. We need your grassroots support to turn this map green and give people a way to challenge empire on the ballot across the nation this November.

Here’s the question: **_Will you donate $3 or any amount right now to help us fund our ballot access efforts and put more green on our map?_**

clean_body: Have you seen our ballot access map update? | | | Peter, The team wanted to be sure that you saw our most recent ballot access map update. www.jillstein2024.com/donate This update is important because we have some good news and some bad news we want to share with you. The Bad News: Our map is not entirely green - yet The Good News: We’re on the ballot in 22 states plus D.C. with many more on the way! As you know Jill and countless volunteers on the ground are working tirelessly every day to put a pro-worker, anti-war, anti-genocide, climate action agenda front and center in this election. However, the truth is they can’t do it alone. We need your grassroots support to turn this map green and give people a way to challenge empire on the ballot across the nation this November. Here’s the question: Will you donate $3 or any amount right now to help us fund our ballot access efforts and put more green on our map? | "Support Jill Today!" Thank you for being part of the movement for people, planet, and peace. With gratitude, The Jill Stein 2024 Team P.S. - Don’t forget that our campaign gives all proceeds after cost when you purchase our ceasefire bumper sticker and Gaza rally sign to United Nations Relief and Works Agency (UNRWA). | "Wear Your Support" Jill Stein for President, www.jillstein2024.com P.O. Box 4359, Fall River, MA 02723-0415 Paid for by Jill Stein for President 2024

Can I be real with you for a moment? I know these emails are getting old, and believe me, asking for money is never easy. But there's just too much at stake to let up now, and I hope you'll take a moment to understand why this is so important. **Our campaign has a critical FEC filing deadline coming up next weekend, and we need to hit our $270,000 end-of-quarter goal to make a strong impact in this race.** See, right after we wrap up the month, our fundraising numbers go public. We need these numbers to signal to Marsha Blackburn, her wealthy cronies, and everyone watching that our grassroots momentum is strong and our supporters are fired up. **_[I believe in us, but I need your help to meet this challenge. Can you chip in $1 today to help us crush this goal and stay on track to defeat Marsha? >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87452281/481194493/269302204?amount=1&refcode=ea.e8233575-9b31-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&ms=ea.e8233575-9b31-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlODIzMzU3NS05YjMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iF-GATeMqq8Jsw_bBR_zuZkN-iaBeTqW1GtkvGcQ2ZI=)_** I’ve promised to run this campaign without a dime of corporate PAC money. That means no secret funds from Big Oil, no checks from the gun lobby, no backing from Big Pharma. Just us, the people, powering forward. When we ask for your support, we don’t expect every person to give. We know times are tough and everyone is doing their best to get by. But we also know that when you can support our campaign, you will. That's how this transformative movement works — it's a whole lot of people doing their part to make something great. This is our moment to prove the pundits wrong, to show our opponent that we’re a force to be reckoned with, and to remind our allies that we’re in it to win it. We're more than ready to make a big impact this quarter and power our momentum. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = With gratitude, Gloria Johnson = | = Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Send donations via check to: Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

name: Nancy Dahlstrom for Alaska
subject: Dahlstrom Dispatch
body:
| | | [](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=30dba1efa1&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=748c06be62&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
Did you hear the great news? I am thrilled to have received President Donald J. Trump's endorsement this week! I'm thankful for his endorsement and look forward to working with him in Washington to Make America Great Again. We've all felt the effects of Democrat mismanagement under the Biden/Peltola agenda. Our southern border is in disarray, our dollars don't go as far as they used to, and our adversaries are emboldened across the globe. Now more than ever, we need real conservative leadership in Washington to right the ship. It's time to defeat Mary Peltola and ensure Alaska has a true leader in Congress once more. Your support is crucial in this fight for our future. Thank you for standing with me. Together, we can live up to our state’s promise – _**North to the Future.**_ Warm regards,
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=7a75ea6d0e&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
**Nancy Dahlstrom** _Candidate for Congress, Alaska At-Large_
---
|
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=6bd1dae94d&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
I am honored to have received support from leaders across Alaska and our country, especially from former President and Republican Presidential nominee, Donald J. Trump! We must rebuild our country and work together to do it.
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=1bfbfbe19b&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
| | |
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=da9d04018a&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
**President Trump Endorses My Campaign**
---
This week, President Donald J. Trump endorsed my run for the at-large congressional seat currently occupied by Mary Peltola.
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=7291b8bc02&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
_ "Nancy is a proven fighter! In Congress, she will work to Secure the Border, Create Jobs, Lower Taxes, Promote American Energy Independence, Support our Incredible Military and Police Officers, and Defend our always under siege Second Amendment."_ _-_**President Donald J. Trump**
---
|
---
**My Interview with Fox & Friends** Last week, I joined my fellow Elevate PAC (E-PAC) candidates for a panel discussion on Fox & Friends to discuss my campaign and the importance of electing conservative women leaders into office. Republican women are in the middle of a political Renaissance and are defying the liberal media’s stereotype that women always fall in line with the Democratic Party. I spoke on the wide-open southern border, Joe Biden’s executive orders targeting Alaska, and more.
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=6e1035cf6a&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
[**📺 Watch Now**](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=0dfb2f1e11&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
_“We’re an oil and gas state, we’re a mining state, we have all kind of minerals and things here that the entire country needs, and we need those things for many reasons, not just production but also for national security. If we don’t have those things in our country, we have to rely on other countries. And so we have to have a change in D.C. We have got to have President Trump back in office. We need to get the course reversed that we are on.”_ You can watch the full Fox & Friends interview by [here](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=a4acd51628&e=a20d8ad2ed).
---
|
---
**My Opinion Piece With Townhall**
---
In case you missed it, I penned an [opinion piece with Townhall](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=b9ae9410fa&e=a20d8ad2ed) on my recent visit to the wide-open southern border in Yuma, Arizona. As the Biden-Peltola border crisis rages on with no end in sight and a lackluster border order coming out of the White House, it has become clear that the Democrats are derelict in their duty to secure America. The open border has turned every state into a border state, including Alaska, and is allowing the flow of fentanyl into the nation via cartel smugglers. In my piece, noted that U.S. national security is in jeopardy under the backwards policies of Joe Biden and Mary Peltola, the brazenness of hundreds of illegal migrants crossing over unfettered, and the food security crisis that can arise from the border disaster.
---
[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=46ddf386a9&e=a20d8ad2ed)
---
_“Everything I witnessed made it clear that Joe Biden and his Democrat lackeys, like Mary Peltola, are failing our nation and Alaska by leaving our border open. The chaos and lack of leadership has led to 85,000 migrant children unaccounted for, with fears they are currently being trafficked. We are simply not equipped to handle this disaster, yet Democrats continue to support policies that encourage illegal immigration and welcome these criminals with open arms.”_ Read the full piece in Townhall [here](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=2199029436&e=a20d8ad2ed) _._

Mary Peltola was recently asked if she agreed with the Trump trial verdict. _**Her answer?
⬇️
"I gotta go."**_ Her response is a stark contrast to the outrage felt by Alaskans who see through this politically motivated facade. The American people are tired of the left's use of our legal system as a political weapon. We need representatives who will stand up against these injustices, and not shy away from tough questions. Alaska deserves better. It's time for Mary Peltola to go. _**[](https://nancyforalaska.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1b2d5cc6ac5f5c7539b4b1d46&id=83c8c8768d&e=a20d8ad2ed)**__**Follow the link below to check out the AKGOP Peltola Files and stay up-to-date on the fight to restore conservative values to Alaska's congressional seat.**_

I'm thankful for his endorsement and look forward to working with him in Washington to Make America Great Again. We've all felt the effects of Democrat mismanagement under the Biden/Peltola agenda. Our southern border is in disarray, our dollars don't go as far as they used to, and our adversaries are emboldened across the globe. Now more than ever, we need real conservative leadership in Washington to right the ship. It's time to defeat Mary Peltola and ensure Alaska has a true leader in Congress once more. clean_body: Not great, Peter. | | | Peter -- We were honestly hoping for better before our most important FEC deadline to date. Please look at this chart. Blue is the amount raised by day. The line is the number of donations by day. You can see the rise and the drop-off that happened. Not great. We need to close the gap, and the President is counting on people like you who understand the stakes of this election and how important June's FEC deadline is to get it done. Because if we don't have the resources to win, we won't. It'll be another four years of Trump. It's honestly that simple. That may seem like a lot of pressure, but the good news is you are not alone. Lots of people are donating today -- and they’re hoping you will too. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Thank you in advance for chipping in. Especially today. Biden HQ

Fellow American,

**_I would be honored if you could spare just one minute to read this heartfelt memo in its entirety. I guarantee it will be well worth your time._ **

**My parents taught me that when you're in trouble, the best thing to do is to tell the truth.**

So here's the unfiltered truth of serving in New York City:

* I'm the last NYC Republican in Congress
* My fundraising numbers are drastically declining
* My district is under attack by radical protests and antisemitism
* More migrants than ever are moving to NYC and can legally squat in our homes

**My friend, I said I'd give you the unfiltered truth.**

**_I'm scared. I'm sad. I'm run down._** But I refuse to give up the hope that led me to serve you in our government in the first place.

I've been wracking my brain for ways to make concrete change in a country where it seems as though one step forward triggers twelve steps back.

Let's return to the principles upon which this once-great nation was founded.**Life. Liberty. Happiness. Representation.**

**So please allow me to share my vision:**

* I want open communication with _**ALL Americans**_ , on both sides of the aisle, to encourage fruitful policy change and rational laws in this nation. You have my email– don't be afraid to say hi.
* I wish to inform _**ALL Americans**_ of the truth of the mayhem in our cities and the radical ideas that are pushed upon our youth against their will.

I mentioned before that my fundraising is in the gutter. While the media and woke institutions try to silence traditional, rational voices in this country, it's impossible to do so if we gain enough support.

clean_body: Our primary is right around the corner George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, I'm going to be upfront: This is the final weekend our team has to reach voters across NY-16 and get them ready to vote for George before Tuesday's primary election. Our primary is right around the corner, and midnight is the end-all-be-all for what we can raise, and what we can spend in time to make a difference come Tuesday. = | = Here’s the game plan: from now until Tuesday, it’s all hands on deck. Our team of volunteers are going to be out on the doors, talking to voters, and pulling all the strings to win this thing on Tuesday. Together, we can make sure that the People’s House reflects the diversity that makes our country great – and ensure that every voice has a seat at the table.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87453685/481199078/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.06.23_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDEwYjExYTAtOWYzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v9aXmzv9N1nh9erzhGy2Ql5Lsyn5TAkOgneHwkimMbc=) Friend – it’s Janelle. When I launched my campaign for Congress, I knew that we could make history. I haven’t lost sight of the significance of this race, and I'm working every day to make sure we win in November. **[So before I go on, can I ask you to chip in now to help power my grassroots campaign? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87453686/481199079/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.06.23_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDEwYjExYTAtOWYzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v9aXmzv9N1nh9erzhGy2Ql5Lsyn5TAkOgneHwkimMbc=)** You see, growing up, there weren’t a lot of leaders who looked like me in government. When I look back at my younger self, I also think of all of the other young Black girls across our country who are looking for role models, just like I was.

**Everyone should see themselves reflected in the people who represent them** – and I hope that through my service to my community, I've been able to give that to someone. When we see ourselves reflected in leadership positions, it sends an important message that our voices are heard. **If I’m elected to Congress, we'd reach a milestone in our state's history: I'm running to become the first Black person to represent Oregon in Congress. We’re running a historic campaign together!** It’s not lost on me that I stand on the shoulders of so many Black leaders, educators, and revolutionaries who came before me and as a nation, we’ve come a long way. But representation is a work in progress, and we can continue to do better. **Here’s the bottom line: Our government should reflect the diversity of the people it represents. ** Together, we can make sure that the People’s House reflects the diversity that makes our country great – and ensure that every voice has a seat at the table. **[I'm ready to defeat Lori Chavez-DeRemer this November and give our community the leadership it deserves, but I can’t do it without you. Will you contribute any amount you can today to help our campaign win in November?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87453687/481199080/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.06.23_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDEwYjExYTAtOWYzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v9aXmzv9N1nh9erzhGy2Ql5Lsyn5TAkOgneHwkimMbc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87453688/481199081/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.06.23_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=5&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDEwYjExYTAtOWYzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v9aXmzv9N1nh9erzhGy2Ql5Lsyn5TAkOgneHwkimMbc=) | [$25 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87453689/481199082/476240567?refcode=em_fr_2024.06.23_b1_jb_all-nd&amount=25&express_lane=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDEwYjExYTAtOWYzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=v9aXmzv9N1nh9erzhGy2Ql5Lsyn5TAkOgneHwkimMbc=)

Happy Sunday. Several of you sent in thought-provoking reactions to recent posts I'm still processing -- thank you. Positive comments are, of course, always welcome. Criticism is even more welcome. That's what makes me better.
Unsurprisingly, [my opposition to the Bragg conviction](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cea07a7f-e185-406d-a408-d127888046d2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) earned the most positive responses and the most heated critiques. But [the love letter to Caitlin Clark](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/c8ce5d72-bbb6-48e4-afef-94a79c2bad28?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) wasn't far behind. Some thoughts below.
| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d78cea29-8c5e-4a39-bd65-d55387e2273c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(Credit: Barry Williams)
**Prosecutorial discretion**
There's a crucial concept in the American legal system without which none of the discourse about the Trump trials makes any sense: _Prosecutorial Discretion_.
There is no such thing as The LawTM without human application. The words in criminal statutes and the common law mean nothing without people - flawed, imperfect, fallible _people_ \- enforcing them.
**Indeed, there is typically no obligation for American prosecutors to prosecute someone they** _**know**_**committed a crime, even a very serious one.** There is often no obligation to prosecute unlawful conduct as a felony, rather than knocking it down to a misdemeanor (much less serious). A prosecutor's discretion is just that -- discretionary. Alvin Bragg didn't _have to_ do this. So why did he?
**Don 't Brag, Bragg**
Bragg says he was "just doing his job." That is not an answer. His job entails deciding _whether_ to prosecute. Even if he declined to charge Trump, he'd be doing his job.
Bragg ran on his record of suing the Trump administration "over 100 times" and promised to "hold Trump accountable."1 That helped him get elected because 86% percent of his voters oppose Trump.2 Soon after, he tried to define resisting arrest as a nonviolent crime -- a complete absurdity.3 He chose to prosecute some armed robberies as misdemeanors. 4 And yet, he found a novel way to prosecute Trump's fraudulent checks as 34 felonies, even though, under NY state law, these are misdemeanors.5
That's a really bad look for Bragg and the rule of law.
It doesn't make us a banana republic. It just makes us stupid for electing prosecutors and then assuming that political factors won't affect legal outcomes.
The judge and jury did their jobs and did them well. But this case should have never been brought in the first place. The person who fucked up here was Alvin Bragg.
**Law and politics**
Here's the truth for those willing to face it: **At the highest levels of political power, there is no such thing as law; there is only what there is** _**political will**_**to do.** 6
* There was no political will to criminally prosecute Bill Clinton for perjury and obstruction of justice, even though he was impeached for just that.7
* There was no political will to prosecute George W. Bush and Dick Cheney for war crimes post-9/11, despite a good argument both engaged in them.8
* Obama - another politician for whom I have great affection - killed American citizens in drone strikes without due process and faced zero legal consequences.9

Presidents commit crimes sometimes. It happens. Trump is prosecuted where others are not because there is _political will_ to do it: a lot of people really, really hate Trump and want to see him go down. And they don't care for what, exactly, or how, because as I've heard from many Democratic friends, "he deserves it."
Maybe. But so did Clinton, Bush, and Obama. None of them were even charged.
That is politics, plain and simple -- not law.
**Sex and basketball**
My defense of Caitlin Clark led to some responses that I think _" men are always physically better"_ than women at sports, and that this is a sexist position which renders my essay an _" incredibly bad, useless, poorly written take." _
Fair enough.
If you enter any gym, you' ll immediately see that not all men are more physically capable than all women - which is why I wrote nothing of the sort.
Yet the _most_ physically gifted man is bigger, taller, stronger, and faster than the _most_ physically gifted woman. As a consequence, the best male basketball player is _always_ going to be better at basketball than the best __ female. That is not anyone's fault; it is just fact, regardless of feeling.
I would lose in a 1-on-1 match up against Diana Taurasi - badly.
Lebron James would crush her.
What's unique about Caitlin is that, at the very least, it is _not clear_ she would lose in a 3-point shooting contest to Steph Curry.10 That parity is why the WNBA is now enjoying a record surge in ratings and attendance.11
**She 's a business, man**
Basketball is a sport. There's an attractive purity to making basketball about, well, basketball.
It is also naive.
Basketball is a damn business - a spectacle - in which revenue is directly tied to eyeballs. Eyeballs follow elite performance. Caitlin is elite at something - shooting - on par with the men. That's why she is famous. And if it weren't for her, I would have never even heard of [Diana Taurasi](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/9f2d7adc-99dc-4e29-a25a-d59773721164?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). That sucks for Taurasi. But the entire WNBA should get over that, and get behind Clark.
I don't think they will.
In a spectacular act of self-sabotage, the WNBA rejected Clark for Team USA.12 That team has been wildly successful, winning 9 of the last 11 Olympics, four in a row, for an overall record of 70-3.13 With or without Clark, they are at no risk of losing.
But without Clark, they remain at great risk of people not watching and not caring. Both the league and the country are worse off for it.
--
To call me sexist or white supremacist for noticing all of this, as some have, is not an argument. It is an insult. And not a very good one.
A better one would be that I seem to have a crush on Caitlin Clark, even though she would never date me.
I do, and she wouldn't.
1
[Here's what Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg said about Donald Trump during his DA campaign](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/4dcb53d0-f240-4cfb-9db1-74e30378272e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (PolitiFact, April 12 2023).
2
[Electing prosecutors is a terrible idea. Trump's conviction shows why.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/af78dc1c-8cb2-413b-987f-3d4c3dffafa7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (George Will, June 12 2024).
3
[Manhattan district attorney announces he won't prosecute certain crimes](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/dbb6ce9b-d533-4aa3-97db-c42004118823?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (CNN, Jan 6 2022).
4
[Robbery Charge Reduced Under New Manhattan DA's Reform Policies](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/f44acaae-6eeb-4c8d-8843-ac585a2183f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (NBC New York, Jan 12 2022).
5
[Prosecutors Got Trump -- But They Contorted the Law](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/8c7e7276-9b35-4588-8210-345b49363760?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Elie Honig, May 31 2024).
6
Thanks a lot to libertarian comedian Dave Smith for this insight.
7
[Clinton fined $90,000 for court sex lie](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/ba9e0fe5-5e06-4570-8fe8-7512b68d84ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (The Guardian, July 29 1999; [Should President Clinton Have Been Convicted?: An Analysis of the Impeachment Charges](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/1a04095c-12f9-4a77-9401-980a32a985a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Prof. Douglas O. Linder, UMKC School of Law)
8
"Yet compared to Dick Cheney's crimes against democracy, Trump is an amateur. Cheney reduced nations to rubble, shredded the Bill of Rights, and enacted programs of surveillance, abduction, detention, and torture more in line with the state terrorism of military dictatorships than the norms of liberal democracy." [Dick Cheney should be in jail, not praised as a hero by Democrats,](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5e3fc421-9eb1-4ad5-b6a9-9f1b7120a39d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Jacobin, 2021).
9
[ACLU & CCR Lawsuit: American Boy Killed By U.S. Drone Strike](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/13ef78a8-13d8-4eb0-8c95-c3a6a4c75bb8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (ACLU).
10
Even here, my male friends have pointed out that the WNBA ball is one inch smaller and 2 ounces lighter than the NBA version. OK. But at least the ability levels are close.
11
[WNBA draws record ratings and raucous crowds in first month of season](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cc532968-9cfe-4d6a-8772-b5c26d096b42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Associated Press, June 11 2024).
12
[Stephen A.'s strong response to Team USA's decision to omit Caitlin Clark 🍿 | First Take](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/b866b6f0-3453-44ac-bde6-856604c7d131?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (ESPN, June 10, 2024).
13
[U.S. Women's National Basketball Team](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/5692bce8-e19c-4de3-ba64-06e6092afab1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) (Wikipedia).

clean_body: Prosecutorial discretion, sexual indiscretion, and responses to reader comments. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Prosecutorial discretion, sexual indiscretion, and responses to reader comments. | | | Jun 23 | | | | | | | | | | | | Happy Sunday. Several of you sent in thought-provoking reactions to recent posts I'm still processing -- thank you. Positive comments are, of course, always welcome. Criticism is even more welcome. That's what makes me better. Unsurprisingly, earned the most positive responses and the most heated critiques. But wasn't far behind. Some thoughts below. | | ---|---|--- (Credit: Barry Williams) Prosecutorial discretion There's a crucial concept in the American legal system without which none of the discourse about the Trump trials makes any sense: Prosecutorial Discretion. There is no such thing as The LawTM without human application. The words in criminal statutes and the common law mean nothing without people - flawed, imperfect, fallible people \- enforcing them. Indeed, there is typically no obligation for American prosecutors to prosecute someone they knowcommitted a crime, even a very serious one. There is often no obligation to prosecute unlawful conduct as a felony, rather than knocking it down to a misdemeanor (much less serious). A prosecutor's discretion is just that -- discretionary. Alvin Bragg didn't have to do this. So why did he? Don 't Brag, Bragg Bragg says he was "just doing his job." That is not an answer. His job entails deciding whether to prosecute. Even if he declined to charge Trump, he'd be doing his job. Bragg ran on his record of suing the Trump administration "over 100 times" and promised to "hold Trump accountable."1 That helped him get elected because 86% percent of his voters oppose Trump.2 Soon after, he tried to define resisting arrest as a nonviolent crime -- a complete absurdity.3 He chose to prosecute some armed robberies as misdemeanors. 4 And yet, he found a novel way to prosecute Trump's fraudulent checks as 34 felonies, even though, under NY state law, these are misdemeanors.5 That's a really bad look for Bragg and the rule of law. It doesn't make us a banana republic. It just makes us stupid for electing prosecutors and then assuming that political factors won't affect legal outcomes. The judge and jury did their jobs and did them well. But this case should have never been brought in the first place. The person who fucked up here was Alvin Bragg. Law and politics Here's the truth for those willing to face it: At the highest levels of political power, there is no such thing as law; there is only what there is political willto do. 6 There was no political will to criminally prosecute Bill Clinton for perjury and obstruction of justice, even though he was impeached for just that.7 There was no political will to prosecute George W. Bush and Dick Cheney for war crimes post-9/11, despite a good argument both engaged in them.8 Obama - another politician for whom I have great affection - killed American citizens in drone strikes without due process and faced zero legal consequences.9 Presidents commit crimes sometimes. It happens. Trump is prosecuted where others are not because there is political will to do it: a lot of people really, really hate Trump and want to see him go down. And they don't care for what, exactly, or how, because as I've heard from many Democratic friends, "he deserves it." Maybe. But so did Clinton, Bush, and Obama. None of them were even charged. That is politics, plain and simple -- not law. Sex and basketball My defense of Caitlin Clark led to some responses that I think " men are always physically better" than women at sports, and that this is a sexist position which renders my essay an " incredibly bad, useless, poorly written take." Fair enough. If you enter any gym, you' ll immediately see that not all men are more physically capable than all women - which is why I wrote nothing of the sort. Yet the most physically gifted man is bigger, taller, stronger, and faster than the most physically gifted woman. As a consequence, the best male basketball player is always going to be better at basketball than the best female. That is not anyone's fault; it is just fact, regardless of feeling. I would lose in a 1-on-1 match up against Diana Taurasi - badly. Lebron James would crush her. What's unique about Caitlin is that, at the very least, it is not clear she would lose in a 3-point shooting contest to Steph Curry.10 That parity is why the WNBA is now enjoying a record surge in ratings and attendance.11 She 's a business, man** Basketball is a sport. There's an attractive purity to making basketball about, well, basketball. It is also naive. Basketball is a damn business - a spectacle - in which revenue is directly tied to eyeballs. Eyeballs follow elite performance. Caitlin is elite at something - shooting - on par with the men. That's why she is famous. And if it weren't for her, I would have never even heard of . That sucks for Taurasi. But the entire WNBA should get over that, and get behind Clark. I don't think they will. In a spectacular act of self-sabotage, the WNBA rejected Clark for Team USA.12 That team has been wildly successful, winning 9 of the last 11 Olympics, four in a row, for an overall record of 70-3.13 With or without Clark, they are at no risk of losing. But without Clark, they remain at great risk of people not watching and not caring. Both the league and the country are worse off for it. -- To call me sexist or white supremacist for noticing all of this, as some have, is not an argument. It is an insult. And not a very good one. A better one would be that I seem to have a crush on Caitlin Clark, even though she would never date me. I do, and she wouldn't. 1 (PolitiFact, April 12 2023). 2 (George Will, June 12 2024). 3 (CNN, Jan 6 2022). 4 (NBC New York, Jan 12 2022). 5 (Elie Honig, May 31 2024). 6 Thanks a lot to libertarian comedian Dave Smith for this insight. 7 (The Guardian, July 29 1999; (Prof. Douglas O. Linder, UMKC School of Law) 8 "Yet compared to Dick Cheney's crimes against democracy, Trump is an amateur. Cheney reduced nations to rubble, shredded the Bill of Rights, and enacted programs of surveillance, abduction, detention, and torture more in line with the state terrorism of military dictatorships than the norms of liberal democracy." (Jacobin, 2021). 9 (ACLU). 10 Even here, my male friends have pointed out that the WNBA ball is one inch smaller and 2 ounces lighter than the NBA version. OK. But at least the ability levels are close. 11 (Associated Press, June 11 2024). 12 (ESPN, June 10, 2024). 13 (Wikipedia). | | | | | | | (C) 2024 Aditya Pai 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

name: Jacky Rosen (via Mazie Hirono)
subject: It’s official: I’m facing off against MAGA extremist Sam Brown in battleground Nevada
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
_Aloha Peter, this is Mazie. Please take a moment to read this message from my friend Jacky Rosen's campaign in Nevada — and chip in a donation between our campaigns if you can. Thank you._
* * *
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87453815/481199778/615972423?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20240623_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MmQxYjc5Yy1hMDMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3D9cwRZIT-pfYg6zhuIYkvmBoaPNW53a2qfou536Lqk=) We did it, Peter: **Because of this grassroots team, I'm officially the Democratic nominee here in Nevada – bringing us one step closer to keeping this seat and the Senate blue!** It has been the honor of my life to fight for Nevada families in the Senate – but I know there is still so much work ahead and so much progress left to be made. That's why, as the race to the general election begins, I couldn't be more ready to hit the ground running. **But the truth is, it’s only getting harder from here.****I’m officially facing off against Trump-endorsed candidate Sam Brown - and I need you right by my side to defeat him. ** _The Cook Political Report_ says that Nevada is the “most perilous” battleground for Democrats, and I’m one of the GOP's top targets for defeat. Now, dark-money groups like the Koch network are flooding this race with MILLIONS of dollars to elect MAGA extremist Sam Brown and flip Nevada red. **To fight back and win in November, we need to build up our grassroots resources right here, right now. clean_body: | Aloha Peter, this is Mazie. Please take a moment to read this message from my friend Jacky Rosen's campaign in Nevada — and chip in a donation between our campaigns if you can. Thank you. = We did it, Peter: Because of this grassroots team, I'm officially the Democratic nominee here in Nevada – bringing us one step closer to keeping this seat and the Senate blue! It has been the honor of my life to fight for Nevada families in the Senate – but I know there is still so much work ahead and so much progress left to be made. That's why, as the race to the general election begins, I couldn't be more ready to hit the ground running. But the truth is, it’s only getting harder from here.**I’m officially facing off against Trump-endorsed candidate Sam Brown - and I need you right by my side to defeat him. The Cook Political Report says that Nevada is the “most perilous” battleground for Democrats, and I’m one of the GOP's top targets for defeat. Now, dark-money groups like the Koch network are flooding this race with MILLIONS of dollars to elect MAGA extremist Sam Brown and flip Nevada red. To fight back and win in November, we need to build up our grassroots resources right here, right now. That's why I'm counting on your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split contribution will go through to Mazie Hirono and Jacky Rosen immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you. Jacky Friends of Mazie Hirono 335 Merchant Street #677 Honolulu, HI 96809 United States mailto:info@mazieforhawaii.com | Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii

body:
I want the best for my country.

| [ ](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a1404949847d44f9b5bdf170fa3dc0fc&_e=R7uwPtgoqMFkRSVOsW-oEbPn4blRWno244f6rFAWgNHzrGXe88XY_okoaH8NsVluMLsmKCPlB9-slbN-zmiTzaPN_YYwoLoG748j24M5UUPBN88jFwpmr5Q70PQq-8pDPARPGWDxXcR4SJgxXrMhRCOIRKuSzkGZDwiza3Dmfw4S5uDZ8FkTbJQ90VLYOOiE5w7P-nNfmOEVbO-WaG8Vsg68z86fCb23trMqC3DclCTK9f-Xj5Tmodh9_fmhkNeVmuujyZkYbORavK1eaij1mPPc-jkOF51GO5UHKeME18OzJ0ix57c0CdmXql6y-IAflBnaR-zegmKvrydBiFFRawaoU29xBUYodLqfLlOa3OTS4AT2do1lhzTUkcVEh2iai1maajVgQAp7mBUfO5lCQA%3D%3D)
---
Fellow American,

I'm not a D.C. Establishment politician, I'm a combat veteran who wants the best for my country that I nearly lost my life for.

That's why I decided to run for Congress back in 2022. I won thanks to my amazing team of supporters. I've done a lot in Congress since then, but the work is far from over. That's why I'm running again.

Our House Republican majority is SLIM...and our country can't afford Democrats taking full control this year.

Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily.

**[That's why I'm reaching out today and humbly asking you for support.](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a1404949847d44f9b5bdf170fa3dc0fc&_e=R7uwPtgoqMFkRSVOsW-oEbPn4blRWno244f6rFAWgNHzrGXe88XY_okoaH8NsVluMLsmKCPlB9-slbN-zmiTzaPN_YYwoLoG748j24M5UUPBN88jFwpmr5Q70PQq-8pDPARPGWDxXcR4SJgxXrMhRCOIRKuSzkGZDwiza3Dmfw4S5uDZ8FkTbJQ90VLYOOiE5w7P-nNfmOEVbO-WaG8VsiETDfFAB7J1HuzeiCUrl8sYTD2EQKat-kC71BQgD3B_EhcHdpRYRD2lQD3G2IYV0H73fkI202L5NgM_nAIkB08SQQD-cbQdpXeL2up612IYScwCopp3F8jlTCyrMPxHTntDQhVpf8yTpnCd_53dSgYVpPVPMJG3xFy6G9ANJ-IJ6QJ7mXM92_EJ6aOzuHHxbN3lJT9jan96oKpnp3977Mc%3D)**

I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way we can make it on our own.

The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride.

**So please help me out today, Friend:
** | [**CONTRIBUTE $15**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a1404949847d44f9b5bdf170fa3dc0fc&_e=R7uwPtgoqMFkRSVOsW-oEbPn4blRWno244f6rFAWgNHzrGXe88XY_okoaH8NsVluMLsmKCPlB9-slbN-zmiTzaPN_YYwoLoG748j24M5UUPBN88jFwpmr5Q70PQq-8pDPARPGWDxXcR4SJgxXrMhRCOIRKuSzkGZDwiza3Dmfw4S5uDZ8FkTbJQ90VLYOOiE5w7P-nNfmOEVbO-WaG8VsqjagR5cwxELoC_sIbWi6XNfGI2OBl6NjBnUKWr6euCuiz_L0qmRd1W6VOJRZBFrVl4Q1zUf_-zjJnDqZp0EPF-fcQl7_TpJsk7iA1LYphRFiSD1wqxrFUkNvHTAk805epA0gd5sgaTHX2_R_vzBNLx3ULII2t3ZfuxqARq11NWCIQNBPctipob-jtkvdGHAQybkuU-6xxkOHFVnJfiKUb4%3D)

Friend, once again, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a conservative combat veteran who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today.

I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will continue fighting to restore our conservative values in our government and put the American people before political agendas.

God Bless,
[](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=a1404949847d44f9b5bdf170fa3dc0fc&_e=R7uwPtgoqMFkRSVOsW-oEbPn4blRWno244f6rFAWgNHzrGXe88XY_okoaH8NsVluMLsmKCPlB9-slbN-zmiTzaPN_YYwoLoG748j24M5UUPBN88jFwpmr5Q70PQq-8pDPARPGWDxXcR4SJgxXrMhRCOIRKuSzkGZDwiza3Dmfw4S5uDZ8FkTbJQ90VLYOOiE5w7P-nNfmOEVbO-WaG8Vsg68z86fCb23trMqC3DclCTK9f-Xj5Tmodh9_fmhkNeV0gpEu76hw9w1henbFtVM9WSiRr2kZXaVwMFQnN82Q8NAyHaPesTlBMeTRAtQKeaVnf5bfRC0tqa-Qq3eEb7kk1Qa14LA9ca1b4WfwYAsSo96uFgDx1ZSxsy_7dJMPpCOilEN5PnvAsxyHAIpetIvbw%3D%3D)

clean_body: I want the best for my country. | Fellow American, I'm not a D.C. Establishment politician, I'm a combat veteran who wants the best for my country that I nearly lost my life for. That's why I decided to run for Congress back in 2022. I won thanks to my amazing team of supporters. I've done a lot in Congress since then, but the work is far from over. That's why I'm running again. Our House Republican majority is SLIM...and our country can't afford Democrats taking full control this year. Joe Biden and his Leftist collaborators are pouring millions into key races across the country in an effort to wipe out GOP candidates. But I won't let them win so easily. I'm not usually the type of person to ask for help, but there's no way we can make it on our own. The Democrats are attacking us from ALL angles because they hate what we stand for: freedom and American pride. So please help me out today, Friend: | Friend, once again, I'm not an establishment politician who will play games with the American people. I am a conservative combat veteran who wants to save America for the next generation. That's why I'm being so candid with you today. I'm not going to make false promises and tell you I can fix our country overnight. But I can promise you that I will continue fighting to restore our conservative values in our government and put the American people before political agendas. God Bless, Morgan Luttrell | | | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR MORGAN LUTTRELL Morgan Luttrell is a retired member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Texans for Morgan Luttrell · PO Box 1245 · Magnolia, TX 77353 · USA
