name: John Avlon
subject: The Final Push: The politics of addition, not division
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Friends,

With just a few days to go until Election Day, I want to give you an update.

I’ve always believed in the combination of hard work and having fun - and the enthusiasm around our campaign is inspiring people to give it their all as we run through the tape.
This weekend we are canvassing across the district and calling and texting every potential primary voter. It’s safe to say this is the largest effort any Democrat has made in our district in years – and it’s showing. We are seeing enthusiasm and momentum that you just can’t buy.

The message we keep hearing over and over again? Yes, we have to defend abortion rights and strengthen the middle class. But none of that happens if we can’t win.
Democrats are just sick and tired of losing this seat. They’ve seen what happens when a self-funder goes negative on fellow Democrats and then loses by ten points. You get a MAGA-fied House run by Trump flunkies.

It’s time to take back this seat and take back the House.

And remember: before I got in this race, NY-01 wasn’t considered a real battleground. Now it is - IF we win the primary. Those are the stakes: either NY-01 is one of the topic pickup opportunities to make Hakeem Jeffries the next Speaker - or Suffolk County gets written off by national Democrats: because when you lose by ten, there’s no reason to do it again.
That’s why we’ve seen an unprecedented number of early endorsements in this primary from Tom Suozzi and the New Democrat Coalition to 6 local Democratic Town Committees to three members of the Assembly and several major labor unions (including my opponent’s own union!) Now, former three-term Suffolk County Executive Steve Bellone has joined Team Avlon - and we’ll be out knocking on doors this weekend. They all know that Democrats can’t afford to lose this fight.

If you missed last week’s final debate on News 12, the contrast could not be clearer. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlon-openingstatement]

This primary election is a test between the politics of addition and the politics of division. Winning this swing district requires building a broad coalition and to do that you have to inspire and unite. We know what we have to do. Every primary voter needs to hear from us between now and Election Day. We’ve got the team to do it.

This is the final push. Every dollar from now through Tuesday is going to help us get out every last vote. Please pitch in one last time before the primary, and let’s go win this thing. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlonfinalpush1?refcode=0623]

Thank you for fighting the good fight with me.
-John

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/avlonfinalpush1?refcode=0623]
PAID FOR BY JOHN AVLON FOR CONGRESS
John Avlon for Congress
PO Box 1200
Sag Harbor, NY 11963
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/IS8qlw_Po0mWPR_Ga3fvNQ2?unsubscribedata=%2B9WryYjthWIhIEqbSq6n5C4yLRU6JmR90Tp1%2B1%2FbVXKoKaI5DnDfIVuqIFdSf9e3TEVj3htzxjvITrs55LyBHfaAaMXiMvCcIBhuDLPL2sEwcK7RuKaE512cBDoEtaDZdX612TAGshT9acWVvMNkSRc2wQdlJGm7kvqvFq2E%2BTWc3QyzKlSygqexgFY9mGb2jcIEV8r895%2BDx2EBqrwgwHZTlxYLxoaIZdZH%2FVgtNZHiHyZLrNgU8PwlA08j3%2FiVh1gO58pDA0kztRx5NRIMLstlsb7%2Fzgg%2FrOv%2Bm4zgzrIgPd9%2FAI5CtB9qPcBb%2FEDa4xM8cDORi%2BYVbk3%2BRzcsDVgAGSCucyW%2FpQFXiPJAJdF7mjx%2FFxRKTkECu6eX%2FS9KqN%2Bzjl6XndQBYV0lQJ%2Bfw6un1Jz8Id1L98cIgIu%2FEPJFoMb3bg%2F7B%2BDXxjYz7bOG .

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=3346%2E552475%2EiyrWOv)
What do Bob Casey and Steve Kornacki have in common, Peter?
They both enjoy breaking down elections in front of a map.
Steve Kornacki went on MSNBC to break down the 2024 election map, and here's what he had to say about Pennsylvania:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240623-3?refcode=em20240623-3&recurring=1&refcode2=3346_552475_iyrWOv&akid=3346%2E552475%2EiyrWOv)
**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240623-3?refcode=em20240623-3&recurring=1&refcode2=3346_552475_iyrWOv&akid=3346%2E552475%2EiyrWOv)**
Political experts, from Steve Kornacki to Nate Silver at FiveThirtyEight, agree that Pennsylvania is _the_ tipping point. If the GOP flips PA, they'll flip both the Senate and the White House.
**[So can you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help re-elect Bob Casey and keep PA blue?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240623-3?refcode=em20240623-3&recurring=1&refcode2=3346_552475_iyrWOv&akid=3346%2E552475%2EiyrWOv)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240623-3?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240623-3-el&refcode2=3346_552475_iyrWOv&akid=3346%2E552475%2EiyrWOv) [Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240623-3?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240623-3-el&refcode2=3346_552475_iyrWOv&akid=3346%2E552475%2EiyrWOv) [Donate $50 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240623-3?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240623-3-el&refcode2=3346_552475_iyrWOv&akid=3346%2E552475%2EiyrWOv) [Donate $100 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240623-3?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240623-3-el&refcode2=3346_552475_iyrWOv&akid=3346%2E552475%2EiyrWOv) [Donate $250 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240623-3?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240623-3-el&refcode2=3346_552475_iyrWOv&akid=3346%2E552475%2EiyrWOv) [Other amount »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240623-3?recurring=1&refcode=em20240623-3&refcode2=3346_552475_iyrWOv&akid=3346%2E552475%2EiyrWOv)

|

Hunter Biden was just found GUILTY on three federal weapons charges.

Peter,

It’s official — it’s yard sign time!

Yard signs are a great way to both get Joyce’s name out there and for folks to show their support.

[**_We’ve set a goal of raising $5,000 to print as many yard signs as possible. Can you chip in $10 to our Yard Sign Fund today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87456117/481207544/41188070?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.06.23_yard-sign_B1_F1_S1_C1_u1_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmVhN2Y3Yy1hYzMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EqD1mnhJoEn_rw7xSS1QO3puon_oWEPlmkpY016PvZY=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87456118/481207545/41188070?amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2024.06.23_yard-sign_B1_F1_S1_C1_u1_N&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzgwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NmVhN2Y3Yy1hYzMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EqD1mnhJoEn_rw7xSS1QO3puon_oWEPlmkpY016PvZY=) Yard signs might seem like a small thing, but they play an important role in any campaign.

Remember, Joyce is in a dead heat against MAGA-favorite Kelly Ayotte. Ayotte has high name recognition thanks to her time as a US Senator, so we need to do everything we can to spread the message of Joyce’s grassroots campaign.

Unlike her opponent, Joyce isn’t funded by billionaires or out-of-state special interests. Instead, she counts on the support of regular folks chipping in what they can.

**That’s why your donation is so important.** $5, $10, even $25 will go a long way to purchasing yard signs and ensuring Joyce can compete with her MAGA opponent.

clean_body: | = Peter, It’s official — it’s yard sign time! Yard signs are a great way to both get Joyce’s name out there and for folks to show their support. = = Yard signs might seem like a small thing, but they play an important role in any campaign. Remember, Joyce is in a dead heat against MAGA-favorite Kelly Ayotte. Ayotte has high name recognition thanks to her time as a US Senator, so we need to do everything we can to spread the message of Joyce’s grassroots campaign. Unlike her opponent, Joyce isn’t funded by billionaires or out-of-state special interests. Instead, she counts on the support of regular folks chipping in what they can. That’s why your donation is so important. $5, $10, even $25 will go a long way to purchasing yard signs and ensuring Joyce can compete with her MAGA opponent. = | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you for your support. Team Craig | = | = = Joyce Craig for NH PO Box 3893 Manchester, NH 03105 United States | mailto:info@joycecraig.org Paid for by Joyce Craig for NH. Patricia Cornell, Treasurer. P.O. Box 3893, Manchester NH, 03105

The LA Times headline was bold:
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_president_6_23_24_nd1&n=3)
Here is what they said:
_Robert F. Kennedy Jr. told an Orange County audience Wednesday night that America faces an existential threat because of its insistence on behaving like an imperial power rather than the moral leader it should be in the world._
_The independent presidential candidate said he would reverse the nation's "decay" by cutting the U.S. military budget by half in his first three years in office — with additional reductions in the future — and using the savings to bolster domestic programs and the economy._
Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s position requires courage, boldness, and a new way of thinking.
RFK Jr.’s instincts are exactly what we need in a President. As you know, making hard calls is an hourly requirement from our Commander in Chief, and Bobby Kennedy is that leader!
[Inspirational leadership, courage, and unity are the way forward, and we invite you to invest in the future of America now with your gift.](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=peace_president_6_23_24_nd1&n=4)

name: Rosen, Jacky
subject: re: Our recent historic win

body:
We've entered the most pivotal months of Nevada's must-win Senate race.
| | |
---
Friend, I wanted to send you a quick email about this month's historic win.
We've now officially entered the most pivotal months of Nevada's must-win Senate race. It's a race that will decide control of the Senate, but it's also a race that is deeply personal to me.
Serving you and your family in the Senate has been the honor of my lifetime – but there is still so much work left to do and so much progress left to be made. **That's why I need your support in this moment to ensure I can continue fighting for the issues that matter most to you.**

Because right now, _The Cook Political Report_ is calling Nevada the “most perilous” battleground for Democrats – and dark money groups like the Koch network are pouring millions into this battleground to defeat me.
**The fact of the matter is that I can't fight back and win without your help, friend:[_So please, now that the general election has begun, will you rush $5 or more to make sure we can hit the ground running? Every dollar will go a long way toward defending my seat in Nevada and our Democratic Senate majority._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87456256/481208058/-1278658170?&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&amount=5&refcode=jtk4051-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDExMTQ1My1hZDMxLWVmMTEtODZkMi02MDQ1YmRkOWUwOTYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K44xAuW-W0BWQQmYlBCAGUpiypfd_OuVNsvNKcC_ZtE=)**

name: Yassamin Ansari
subject: Why I'm in this race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=wrpr_hdr [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=wrpr_hdr] Peter, our primary is in just over a month. Anything could happen on July 30th. It could be the end of our campaign — or a major victory in our fight for community-focused, progressive representation in Washington. And with such a big test approaching, I'm thinking a lot about why I got in this race. Peter, As the youngest woman ever elected to the Phoenix City Council and as the Vice Mayor of our city, I ran because I believed I could continue to make a difference for our community. https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=240623_ya_why_img [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=240623_ya_why_img] I've dedicated my life to public service, working to reverse the climate crisis, protect reproductive rights, and build a more equitable world. I've seen the way our Phoenix community — my lifelong home — has been impacted by these challenges and more. As we've built this campaign from the ground up, I've had the chance to meet and work with so many incredible people. Friends and neighbors, college students and community leaders, all united in a progressive vision for Phoenix and Glendale. And I believe more deeply than ever that our country is ready for a new generation of leadership. We need representatives who actually listen to us, who are accountable to ordinary people and not special interest groups. We need leaders who will champion bold solutions to our most urgent problems, and get them done. I'm running to be that kind of Congresswoman, Peter. I'm running to keep delivering for the community that raised me. It means the world to have your support Volunteer with our team → [https://yassaminforcongress.com/] Chip in → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=240623_ya_why] Onward, — Yass Yassamin Ansari is the former Vice Mayor of Phoenix and the youngest woman ever elected to the Phoenix City Council. From helping deliver the historic Paris Climate Agreement at the United Nations to her time serving Phoenix, she has championed housing and healthcare affordability, reproductive freedom, education, and workers' rights. Yassamin is a trailblazer who has dedicated her life to serving her community. She's now running to bring a new generation of leadership to Congress and needs your help. Will you support her campaign? Contribute Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?refcode=emailfooter&refcode2=d31aa689-b031-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096] GIVE Monthly [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/yassaminansari_em?recurring=true&refcode=footermonthly&refcode2=d31aa689-b031-ef11-86d2-6045bdd9e096] PAID FOR BY YASSAMIN ANSARI FOR CONGRESS
Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so here [https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/amUvV7y1OUuv63ZcQ0rAzg2?unsubscribedata=E04xzWRgxtj%2FczI9zGaklW5yb8Zi6XIDZnrcY9fzY4LiKy0%2B%2FZXhw8IcUWopIC%2FyUPQj30yB3UXv8Nne7isuW9VAbY9uyGOc%2BGmdKE5HUr77KIWntQTGbLAtHIqM5pFbsI8XpdfORDeUNtRShQj5h5aydpYjAETty5B8UjMb%2FUuXk1WgwrcDjGxQOGX7j7CuGZMD%2FdX%2BfVtnG%2FhTMBtzTJcoyW0TRVOcJag%2F1Fl4yFXb0qIfmESDem3dKArlmwJ8MdxDj9VUn1Tqc3%2B4CHcrLyov8Zx%2FyRNW0qEHZUWZQ3cO4MnFGMqOuiyqbRSu8hw6g1hxrNIOB8tQAxHkROdf6eRBC11Wkklw3jnII6OEfOtwsTAuzGy5DK8meZfU1gP8W9uc72P0VpjDeH8VSyk1nUaJ3zO9Y0J39yKZVgi%2BzY7McXaDzTzPwP5Lx%2BDnvsNy] . Yassamin Ansari for Congress PO Box 13524 Phoenix, AZ 85002 United States

name: PA Senate Alert
subject: URGENT: Super PAC announces $30 million ad buy against Bob Casey
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

This is bad, Peter:
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-casey-split.V1z6EP&refcode=em240623-3-160&t=1&akid=2520%2E734936%2EsWJIwj)

As you read this, David McCormick’s billionaire backers are preparing to pour tens of millions of dollars into Pennsylvania to defeat Bob Casey and flip the Senate red. This is one of the largest GOP ad buys in THE COUNTRY.

— Team Casey

name: The Democratic Party
subject: You deserve to know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
Earlier this week, the Trump campaign and the Republican National Committee filed an FEC report showing they out-raised us by a significant amount of money last month... | |
---
Hello, Derek. In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a donation to the Democratic National Committee. Please give us a chance to explain why this request -- especially today -- is so important. Here is the truth, and you deserve to know it: Earlier this week, the Trump campaign and the Republican National Committee filed an FEC report showing they out-raised us by a significant amount of money last month ... much of the money coming in the days after Trump's guilty verdict. With next week's presidential debate, Trump's sentencing, and the Republican conventions shortly after, we expect their fundraising will only climb. That puts us in a very difficult position. Because not only will that money be used to attack President Biden, but to elect MAGA candidates running against Democrats in races up and down the ballot. No one person could donate the amount we came up short. The ONLY chance we have is if lots and lots of Democrats who understand the importance of this moment step up to help us close the gap. Remember: the results of the last four presidential elections show there are more of us than there are of them. And if we all do our part in this moment, we're going to win again this November. So please: [**Can Joe Biden and Democrats everywhere count on you to contribute $7 directly to the Democratic National Committee? We will put your donation right to work beating Trump and electing Democrats everywhere this fall.**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvpOShxPWr9mFhJMw1S-wTtvhltHWfNwNtDIaYBJbNv2OiYGsvOb7Ojyb0iUS8Qi3SwRIc_dGiKuYbm8Fm5_6rWh6AxyamTx3SU2kjWOT0bmAwpcrICucAZ8msDbbB9rcmdIN1SwBgqyxxVPbADpiT5QCvamsJb1cjofXXHKlt0OZJrjkrkufjlBUCq8dDah38RP4cJyTNPAssbjh8rViPg8xdHGNMtvtMkkaXbM6K3gyX5d3iv8xg6MZYUN2zwUghE24Y003RHltrOrMyJmerfWsi67otRe19aqJ7JY7Pl8VtCdU1fTyL0JCx_-qMlYgYkHKbjIUhONnq7WEzjzquY0zeHCWi7uIpARvm1l1Az-Lp1cUHgJtvPwVBI1sBkn7w/47g/AevutOjMRU2FEUmFyTXflg/h0/h001.igoCBLtM3xKTrFreDGmss-JebxWpGqVsTe1uQbHoiEY)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www

If we allow a MAGA-funded super PAC to win this election, we're setting a dangerous precedent.

If they win, we're basically telling every single billionaire that all they have to do is cut a massive check and they can prop up any politician they want.

_**Billionaires, super PACs, MAGA–extremists, they shouldn't decide our elections. Voters should.**_

But right now, I'm being outspent by a wide margin and their efforts to just throw cash at my opponent and hope he wins, could work.

name: John James
subject: Nothing else matters?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for Michigan
body:
| | | Friend, There’s not much anymore that surprises me when it comes to how out of touch Democrats are with the issues that people in this country _actually_ _care_ about: (the cost-of-living crisis, border crisis, crime crisis...the list goes on). There are times when we get a clear reminder that not only are these elitist Democrats completely out of touch, but **they are also completely deranged by their hatred of Trump**. A few days ago, Democrats even published proof that encapsulates this delusion. In an Op Ed, a mouth piece for the progressive moment wrote what Democrats should focus on: _“We must make our single focus keeping the barbarians outside the gate, not figuring out how to lessen the damage once they are on the inside.”_ _“That is why second-term resistance strategies only divert resources from the more pressing imperative at hand: keeping Trump from winning a second term. That's the top priority — in fact, the only real priority — we should focus on. Nothing else matters.”_ We knew the Democrats would do _everything_ they could to stop the American people from re-electing President Trump. We’ve seen lawfare in the court system, vicious lies in the media, and hysterics from Democrat leadership. **But if this is truly the only issue that matters for Democrats, they are farther gone than I thought.** You heard it from the horse's mouth: Democrats are getting ready and willing to do whatever it takes to keep our country in ruins—as long as they beat Trump. **_Friend, it’s more important than ever that we not just re-elect President Trump, but hold onto our majority in the House._****__** The Left will keep their grip on this country by any means necessary, even while the American people are suffering. **[**We need to stand strong against the socialist Left now more than ever with a House majority that will BACK UP President Trump and FIX our great country! clean_body: | | | Friend, There’s not much anymore that surprises me when it comes to how out of touch Democrats are with the issues that people in this country actually care about: (the cost-of-living crisis, border crisis, crime crisis...the list goes on). There are times when we get a clear reminder that not only are these elitist Democrats completely out of touch, but they are also completely deranged by their hatred of Trump. A few days ago, Democrats even published proof that encapsulates this delusion. In an Op Ed, a mouth piece for the progressive moment wrote what Democrats should focus on: “We must make our single focus keeping the barbarians outside the gate, not figuring out how to lessen the damage once they are on the inside.” “That is why second-term resistance strategies only divert resources from the more pressing imperative at hand: keeping Trump from winning a second term. That's the top priority — in fact, the only real priority — we should focus on. Nothing else matters.” We knew the Democrats would do everything they could to stop the American people from re-electing President Trump. We’ve seen lawfare in the court system, vicious lies in the media, and hysterics from Democrat leadership. But if this is truly the only issue that matters for Democrats, they are farther gone than I thought. You heard it from the horse's mouth: Democrats are getting ready and willing to do whatever it takes to keep our country in ruins—as long as they beat Trump. Friend, it’s more important than ever that we not just re-elect President Trump, but hold onto our majority in the House. clean_body: We need to remember overturning it was only the beginning. | = Hi Peter, Two years ago tomorrow, the Supreme Court that Donald Trump created overturned Roe v. Wade and set freedom for women across America back fifty years. Within a year, Republicans here in North Carolina passed a 12-week statewide abortion ban. I’ll cut straight to the point:= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We need to remember that overturning Roe v. Wade was only the beginning. Last year’s 12-week abortion ban was just Raleigh Republicans’ trial balloon. In Mark Robinson, NC Republicans have nominated a man for governor who has openly flirted with a total abortion ban — one that would come without exceptions even for rape and incest. In Washington DC, Republicans recently blocked bills that would’ve protected contraception and IVF from being outlawed next. But there’s still good news and hope. Since Trump’s Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , the side that supports choice and freedom — that’s us — has won every single time reproductive rights were on the ballot = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = I’ll do everything I can to make sure my daughter, and yours, grow up with the same freedom that our generation once enjoyed. Your support is what allows me to keep going. body:
We’re facing hundreds of elections across the map this November, and Republicans have already dumped huge sums of money into battleground states this year. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**22,000.** That’s how many grassroots Democrats have committed to defending our democracy against Republican voter suppression. **22,000** Democrats have taken a meaningful step to elect leaders who will protect abortion access in our statehouses. **22,000** Democrats have joined a movement larger than themselves to fight against Republican extremism. **Grassroots supporters from every state in the country have donated to our movement to elect state Dems. But you still haven’t joined them.** We’re facing hundreds of elections across the map this November, and Republicans have already dumped over _$47 million_ into battleground states this year. If we fall behind in our fundraising, we won’t be able to compete against Republican spending – we could _lose_ ground in our target chambers. [That’s why we’re counting on you to join the 22,000 Official DLCC Members who have already chipped in and rush a 5X-matched gift of $7 today. clean_body: We’re facing hundreds of elections across the map this November, and Republicans have already dumped huge sums of money into battleground states this year. | | | | | ---|--- 22,000. That’s how many grassroots Democrats have committed to defending our democracy against Republican voter suppression. 22,000 Democrats have taken a meaningful step to elect leaders who will protect abortion access in our statehouses. 22,000 Democrats have joined a movement larger than themselves to fight against Republican extremism. Grassroots supporters from every state in the country have donated to our movement to elect state Dems. But you still haven’t joined them. We’re facing hundreds of elections across the map this November, and Republicans have already dumped over $47 million into battleground states this year. If we fall behind in our fundraising, we won’t be able to compete against Republican spending – we could lose ground in our target chambers. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thanks for stepping up. subject: How do you vote?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mullen for Secretary of State
body:
Folks, Now that our primary election is behind us, we’ve got our sights fixed squarely on Election Day in November. name: Josh Harder
subject: It’s been two years since Roe v. Wade was overturned and I’m still just as outraged
body:
The fight is more important now than ever.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87457692/481213375/-1463099547?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYzYzFlODAtYjgzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cNop81GnufI7s_A1brtQ2Jh6p8U_VeAUpbZUpEnwgr4=) | Peter, As we approach the second anniversary of the devastating Dobbs decision, I’m reminded of the intense emotions and profound sadness we felt when the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade. Since that moment, it has been an extremely dark chapter in our fight for women’s and reproductive rights. As the father of two daughters, I am more committed to this battle than ever. I have always championed women’s rights - whether it be in Congress by voting to codify Roe v. Wade or on the campaign trail where I’ve spoken to some of you about this very topic - and _I promise you that will never change_. Now Republicans want to pass a national abortion ban, which would eliminate abortion rights including here in California. This is a direct assault on women’s freedoms, and it’s absolutely shameful. But just like we never thought they would overturn Roe, we can’t pull the wool over our eyes that women’s rights are safe here in California. We cannot be duped again. **My opponent Kevin Lincoln is a Republican who wants to take away women’s right to an abortion. We can’t let him get elected. He could be the final vote they need to criminalize abortion nationwide.** **[If you’re still just outraged as the day this decision was announced, I hope you will chip in to my competitive race and help us win the fight to protect women’s reproductive rights in this country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87457693/481213376/-728259640?&refcode=E9113-20240623-DobbsAnniversary-SL-AbortionReproRights&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYzYzFlODAtYjgzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cNop81GnufI7s_A1brtQ2Jh6p8U_VeAUpbZUpEnwgr4=)** _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | **[**DONATE $5 →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87457694/481213377/1287215685?refcode=E9113-20240623-DobbsAnniversary-EG-AbortionReproRights&amount=5&express=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYzYzFlODAtYjgzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cNop81GnufI7s_A1brtQ2Jh6p8U_VeAUpbZUpEnwgr4=)** | **[DONATE $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/87457695/481213378/1287215685?refcode=E9113-20240623-DobbsAnniversary-EG-AbortionReproRights&amount=10&express=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODYzYzFlODAtYjgzMS1lZjExLTg2ZDItNjA0NWJkZDllMDk2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cNop81GnufI7s_A1brtQ2Jh6p8U_VeAUpbZUpEnwgr4=)**

But just like we never thought they would overturn Roe, we can’t pull the wool over our eyes that women’s rights are safe here in California. We cannot be duped again. My opponent Kevin Lincoln is a Republican who wants to take away women’s right to an abortion. We can’t let him get elected. He could be the final vote they need to criminalize abortion nationwide. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- This race is one way that we fight back. \- Josh *

name: Ken Burns
subject: Asking you to support Elissa Slotkin ...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1575%2E135344%2EKrp0qC)

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-june24.nyVfY7&refcode=em240620-2-t1&t=2&akid=1575%2E135344%2EKrp0qC)
---
Hello. Ken Burns here.
I've spent five decades making films that tell the stories of America’s greatest challenges -- from the Civil War to the Dust Bowl, from the Second World War to the Vietnam War.
In each of these historic moments, we were challenged to live up to the essential promise of our nation: preserving a democratic system of government that respects the rights and addresses the needs of all its citizens.
Today, challenges to our republic are rampant once again. The democratic values that make up the very fabric of our nation are under assault and at risk of unraveling. It’s never been more important to safeguard our fragile democracy: as Benjamin Franklin so wisely put it, "A Republic, if you can keep it."
But this election is not just about keeping Donald Trump out. It's about coming together to protect our shared American values and restoring integrity to our government. That's why electing leaders to the Senate that we can be proud of is so important – and why we have to help Elissa Slotkin hold Michigan's Senate seat for Democrats this fall.
There is also a personal connection in this race for me. Like Elissa, I grew up in Michigan. And she’s a student of history, which I so appreciate in an elected official.
I'd really like to make sure she wins her Senate race this November. So I am asking:
[**Can I count on you to contribute $5, $20 or whatever feels right to you today directly to Elissa Slotkin's Senate campaign in Michigan? I would not be reaching out were it not so important.**](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-june24.nyVfY7&refcode=em240620-2-t1&t=3&akid=1575%2E135344%2EKrp0qC)

---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-june24.bF_B1o&refcode=em240620-2-t1&t=23&akid=1575%2E135344%2EKrp0qC)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/122?c0=ebs-em-june24.nFCAUo&refcode=em240620-2-t1&t=24&akid=1575%2E135344%2EKrp0qC)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-june24.KtZUXe&refcode=em240620-2-t1&t=25&akid=1575%2E135344%2EKrp0qC)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-june24.pLxOQF&refcode=em240620-2-t1&t=26&akid=1575%2E135344%2EKrp0qC)**

****
Democrats cannot keep control of the Senate if they lose in Michigan. Thank you for helping Elissa with your donation today.
Ken Burns
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-june24.nyVfY7&refcode=em240620-2-t1&t=28&akid=1575%2E135344%2EKrp0qC)**

P.O. Box 4145
East Lansing, MI 48826

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: re: Abortion rights in Missouri
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Missourians need our help to protect access to abortion

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2233%2E4032634%2EN6OLOs)
---
Abortion is on the ballot this year. Not just in the presidential election — but in elections down the ballot across the country. The good news with that is that every time abortion rights have been left up to voters in the two years since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, abortion rights have won. Every single time. Not by a little bit, not by a squeaker, but by a big margin. But also since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, the consequences have been horrendous. Women and girls have been forced to carry pregnancies against their will. People have been forced to travel thousands of miles away and cross state lines for a chance at life-saving health care. And doctors have been forced to deny emergency abortions for fear of being arrested and thrown in jail. In Missouri, Republican legislators took it to the extreme. They implemented a near-total ban on abortions — one of the strictest in the country — with no exception for rape or incest. **Missourians are fighting back — they are fighting to pass a ballot initiative in November that would end Missouri's abortion ban and put medical decisions into the hands of patients. And Missourians for Constitutional Freedom have been at the forefront of that fight.** [**This is another chance for abortion rights to win in the states, but we’ve got to fight hard for this. So can you please make a contribution of $28 or anything you can right now to support Missourians for Constitutional Freedom? Your full donation will go toward this critical organization.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2256?refcode=EMZ21B_TAN_E_20240623_V1S1%3Famount%3D28&t=8&akid=2233%2E4032634%2EN6OLOs)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2257?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2233%2E4032634%2EN6OLOs)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2257?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2233%2E4032634%2EN6OLOs)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2257?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2233%2E4032634%2EN6OLOs)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2257?t=28&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2233%2E4032634%2EN6OLOs)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2257?t=18&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2233%2E4032634%2EN6OLOs)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2257?t=20&express_lane=true&akid=2233%2E4032634%2EN6OLOs)
---

---
Now, when Missourians for Constitutional Freedom first proposed this ballot initiative, they faced all kinds of obstacles. From disputes over the description of the ballot measure, to public pushback, to Republicans in the state trying to make it harder to amend the state’s constitution altogether. This will be an uphill battle, but this movement is no stranger to winning righteous fights. When abortion also got on the ballot in Kansas, in Ohio, in Michigan, and in Florida, **this community helped raise almost $200,000 to support the organizations working to secure abortion rights in those states — and now we need to come together again to support abortion rights in Missouri.** [**Right-wing judges don’t get the final say. The people do. On the two-year anniversary of the Supreme Court overturning _Roe v. Wade_ tomorrow, please make a contribution of $28 or anything you can to support Missourians for Constitutional Freedom and ensure we can protect abortion rights in Missouri.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2256?refcode=EMZ21B_TAN_E_20240623_V1S1%3Famount%3D28&t=14&akid=2233%2E4032634%2EN6OLOs) I’m going to keep fighting for Democrats to get a majority in the House, a majority in the Senate, and for Joe Biden to win the White House so we can pass national abortion protections and prevent Republicans from passing a national abortion ban. Along the way, we also need to keep supporting abortion initiatives in states across the country — if it makes a difference for just one patient, that would be enough. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/2257?t=12&akid=2233%2E4032634%2EN6OLOs)
---

name: Adam Schiff
subject: What happened to the House of Representatives?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Folks, it’s an understatement to say that the House of Representatives under Republican control is a _disaster._

Bills don’t get passed to help citizens as they struggle with inflation and the cost of living. Reproductive freedom is eroded day after day. The Supreme Court green-lights the gun lobby again and again and Americans pay with their lives.

Respect for government is at an all-time low as Republican members like Majorie Taylor Greene degrade our institutions like never before.

Vile performance art has substituted for law-making as the GOP battle for who can appease Donald Trump the most with varying acts of fealty — from suggesting he serve as Speaker of the House to suggesting the House expunge his impeachment.

Folks, if there’s anyone who knows to what level Republicans will stoop to, **it’s me.**

Every single day, I face personal attacks from MAGA Republicans calling me “shifty” “watermelon head” “pencil neck” and anything else they’ve heard from the mouth of their criminal leader.

But even worse than the personal attacks, which I will gladly accept if that’s the price for defending our democracy, was what happened just one year ago.

**My censure.**

What was originally reserved for flagrant violations of the law or personal behavior unbefitting of a member of Congress is now frequently being used by Republicans to attack people they disagree with.

I will never regret my work to investigate the former president for his efforts to destroy our democracy. While Republicans under Donald Trump’s command attack me for holding him accountable, I will not back down. Not now. Not ever.

[If you’re still standing with me from our censure fight last year or maybe have just joined us now, will you chip in a split donation of $10 between Voter Protection Project and my campaign to help me take my efforts to the United States Senate?](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70552?t=6&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Adam Schiff and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70553?t=7&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70554?t=8&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70555?t=9&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70556?t=10&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/70552?t=11&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr)
The GOP’s attacks will never stop me as long as I have the support of millions of grassroots supporters like you standing strongly by my side.

Thank you,

— Adam
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=12&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=15221%2E878179%2EM_Sszr)

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Hillary Clinton endorsed AIPAC-backed George Latimer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Hillary Clinton officially endorsed AIPAC-backed, conservative career
politician George Latimer over progressive incumbent Rep. Jamaal Bowman in
New York’s 16th district:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240623.XxFUES&refcode=em20240623-35432&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1001&akid=35432%2E1203867%2Ex0E962 ]Tweet from Hillary Clinton: With Trump on the ballot, we need strong,
principled Democrats in Congress more than ever. In Congress,
@LatimerforNY will protect abortion rights, stand up to the NRA, and fight
for President Biden’s agenda—just like he’s always done. Make a plan to
vote by June 25th!

If Clinton really cared about protecting abortion rights and supporting
President Biden’s agenda, she wouldn’t endorse the candidate in this race
taking millions from Donald Trump donors and opposing Biden’s proposal to
raise taxes on the wealthiest few.

What can we say? We’re disappointed, but not surprised. Clinton received
$4.1 million from AIPAC’s network over the course of her political career,
so it’s not shocking that she’s supporting their hand-picked challenger
running against a true, progressive champion for the people.

What it does show is the establishment knows our people-powered movement
is stronger than their rich mega-donors. That’s why they’re putting every
inch of power they can into unseating Jamaal — this is literally the most
expensive U.S. House primary in history because of AIPAC’s corporate,
Republican-fueled war chest.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240623.XxFUES&refcode=em20240623-35432&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1002&akid=35432%2E1203867%2Ex0E962 ]With just two days until this primary election, it’s URGENT that we do
everything we can to fight back and defend this seat. So please, rush a
donation to Justice Democrats now to help us re-elect Jamaal →

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240623.XxFUES&refcode=em20240623-35432&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1021&akid=35432%2E1203867%2Ex0E962 ]Contribute $5

Every single donation, no matter the amount, will support our collective
fight against AIPAC, its right-wing millionaire and billionaire donors,
and the corporate-friendly establishment desperately trying to set our
movement back.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240623-35432-footer&t=1022&refcode2=35432_1203867_x0E962&akid=35432%2E1203867%2Ex0E962

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=35432%2E1203867%2Ex0E962

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Scott, Tammy Baldwin for Senate
subject: The polls are tightening in Wisconsin
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| Eric Hovde is running one of the most competitive Senate campaigns in the country.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=2885%2E35263%2E675emk)
Hi Peter, Scott here from Tammy Baldwin’s campaign. I wish we could treat Eric Hovde’s campaign like the laughing matter it may look like at times... Hovde was caught skipping out on a weekend meeting Wisconsinites to retreat to his California mansion, he mistakenly told Fox News he’s _“never been a resident of Wisconsin,”_ and he released a campaign ad where he cast _employees on his payroll_ to act as everyday Wisconsinites... And that was just from the last few weeks. We can’t let these slip-ups distract us from the fact that Hovde is running one of the most competitive Senate campaigns in the entire nation. **I’m serious when I say Eric Hovde is running a campaign that can flip this seat.** I see the poll numbers tightening — just this week, Emerson College released a new poll showing our race statistically tied. I see the eye-popping spending from right-wing super PACs and dark money groups. I see ads attacking Tammy whenever I turn on the TV. Hovde moved back to Wisconsin with a plan to buy our Senate seat, and his strategy looks like it’s working. We need your help to fight back and keep Wisconsin blue. **[Will you chip in to help Tammy Baldwin defend this Senate seat from Eric Hovde? This race is going to get even more expensive, so we need to be prepared with the resources to fight back.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jun24.Hijekx&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240623_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=2885%2E35263%2E675emk)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3663?c0=tbe-em-jun24.xQpXoA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20240623_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=2885%2E35263%2E675emk)

body:
If Liberals can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we’re doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY!

| |

---
| | | | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=70cfbf498e7a4a75a011c7d24653a056&_e=PJkDhQN2ocbgOMdJKfE_bbge6uwGS75FYAP0qHxli0214Y4w0NHgsAjHEDLlgo_FEPMCARbrHWbiu-DPEvAYXvhve9YEFSjaBmhWXghhzC64v9Bl2Md77eZfc-PgVKvGjkgEHJRfCOdAk0EGorXVb5HAxA9czkfCA6T73SFcu40-KTQ_RQwrq_yBOMZs25lGos5SMMEOwop-yRAbsSZqptr86fjl0bT58AmCFgaiX5HkZw0YSXOl0SclJBbHUP9oOGn-07pF3SsYHeKf4vSx5p63Tb5TkTGJ3AnYPJBWhv3EkPWJzaJA-D58Oyj2lCLLNaQVsJZROLq4g-npLefvCpE93nrrzE59iD_fH-KYqFjnUs4JmqtMthMwUCMgYqYSfdmLPOhx6krUoUxjS38YXQ%3D%3D "Byron Donalds")
---

Hey - my name is Byron Donalds.

As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we're doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY!

_**[A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen- so bear with me for a minute:](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=70cfbf498e7a4a75a011c7d24653a056&_e=PJkDhQN2ocbgOMdJKfE_bbge6uwGS75FYAP0qHxli0214Y4w0NHgsAjHEDLlgo_FEPMCARbrHWbiu-DPEvAYXvhve9YEFSjaBmhWXghhzC64v9Bl2Md77eZfc-PgVKvGjkgEHJRfCOdAk0EGorXVb5HAxA9czkfCA6T73SFcu40-KTQ_RQwrq_yBOMZs25lGos5SMMEOwop-yRAbsSZqptr86fjl0bT58AmCFgaiX5HkZw0YSXOl0SclJBbHUP9okUJjjzvzF4T9c8NkNEpfP8AJZYLmCxO4UiFVYr5tG-J0Ppu-aTO5shZEmBPewFxbQ8NCY6M_8EbkAt7CHpehWOEVqPkykxaQA8yKL77gTDuJawZDMXF0VEUdh_v0eV9p4ZY5TqbVoT0UpPKT4gfl8A%3D%3D "A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen – so bear with me for a minute:")**_

-> If the Democrat Legal Machine tries any shenanigans, we'll be there to stop them
-> If Liberals can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
-> If they're sending poll watchers, we should send an army of our own
-> We're not pandering to minority voters, we're building relationships with them
-> We're expanding GOTV efforts to get young Conservatives to the ballot box
-> We're fighting bad election laws to make it easier to vote but harder to cheat

These are the nuts and bolts of winning campaigns up and down the ballot. And I'm proud to help lead these efforts.

As Conservatives, we have the issues on our side. We are the only commonsense Party. **If we get these campaign operations right, the Democrats are in serious trouble come election day.**

_But I have to be honest with you: building this level of infrastructure is very expensive._ We're running ads in costly swing-state markets, printing campaign literature, filling up gas tanks to knock doors, recruiting volunteers, and scaling up our voter contact programs.

And unlike the Democrats, we don't rely on Liberal billionaires and rich celebrities for funding.

I'm perfectly okay with that. But it means if we want to WIN BIG, the burden falls on all of us to step up. _**[That's why I'm coming to you now - would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it's 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=70cfbf498e7a4a75a011c7d24653a056&_e=PJkDhQN2ocbgOMdJKfE_bbge6uwGS75FYAP0qHxli0214Y4w0NHgsAjHEDLlgo_FEPMCARbrHWbiu-DPEvAYXvhve9YEFSjaBmhWXghhzC64v9Bl2Md77eZfc-PgVKvGjkgEHJRfCOdAk0EGorXVb5HAxA9czkfCA6T73SFcu40-KTQ_RQwrq_yBOMZs25lGos5SMMEOwop-yRAbsSZqptr86fjl0bT58AmCFgaiX5HkZw0YSXOl0SclJBbHUP9ofDOwE4MFsZRMGEoBtzpcFSbGGd1eAQBRIRb9qovftKGt2vzCxrjiv6BuBcaCXDnojm-8Q2AB4S3ESKG_HN1mhkn5Aqks7ANZegw6NIFEODMzXWns04p8EpauBbPemwgfxPRJfqt2U8krRSf4-Z4Cew%3D%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you now – would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it’s 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING.")**_

Look,

**I know it 's a lot to ask but I GUARANTEE it'll all be worth it when we expand our Conservative Majority, take back control of the Senate, and win the White House.**

I don't know about you but the thought of unified Republican control fires me up! If that doesn't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?
---

Before I go, I'll just say this:

The Democrat Party is spending more money - and spending it earlier - than we've ever seen before. They know they are LOSING on the issues.

That's why they're compensating by raising astronomical sums of money, plastering social media with Liberal propaganda, and unleashing the powers of our Federal Government to attack Conservatives.

**But make no mistake: there are a lot more of US than there are of THEM!_[So if every Conservative in America steps up, there is nothing we can't do. So will you do your part when we need you the most?](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=70cfbf498e7a4a75a011c7d24653a056&_e=PJkDhQN2ocbgOMdJKfE_bbge6uwGS75FYAP0qHxli0214Y4w0NHgsAjHEDLlgo_FEPMCARbrHWbiu-DPEvAYXvhve9YEFSjaBmhWXghhzC64v9Bl2Md77eZfc-PgVKvGjkgEHJRfCOdAk0EGorXVb5HAxA9czkfCA6T73SFcu40-KTQ_RQwrq_yBOMZs25lGos5SMMEOwop-yRAbsSZqptr86fjl0bT58AmCFgaiX5HkZw0YSXOl0SclJBbHUP9ovq-hVHelMgWqpw9FuvCxraSlKqEDdlVa3ad7U4jeBbziIBZ0FxxcqcpHlY5WO7d53ilgU3P4-j1zqnywHaQZTb3lNxZRHTPSMUOpiav613ws17mQaO7rlGzSDYI_sF2hRnElc6OPJnP49ENY62T2mg%3D%3D "So if every Conservative in America steps up, there is nothing we can’t do. I hope you'll join us. I really do.

Thank you,
Byron Donalds

clean_body: If Liberals can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we’re doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY! | | | | | | "Byron Donalds" Hey - my name is Byron Donalds. As Co-Chair of one of the most important initiatives of the Republican Party, I wanted you to what we're doing right now to lay the groundwork for the biggest GOP landslide in AMERICAN HISTORY! "A lot goes into building the most powerful election-winning machine our country has ever seen – so bear with me for a minute:" -> If the Democrat Legal Machine tries any shenanigans, we'll be there to stop them -> If Liberals can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better -> If they're sending poll watchers, we should send an army of our own -> We're not pandering to minority voters, we're building relationships with them -> We're expanding GOTV efforts to get young Conservatives to the ballot box -> We're fighting bad election laws to make it easier to vote but harder to cheat These are the nuts and bolts of winning campaigns up and down the ballot. And I'm proud to help lead these efforts. As Conservatives, we have the issues on our side. We are the only commonsense Party. If we get these campaign operations right, the Democrats are in serious trouble come election day. But I have to be honest with you: building this level of infrastructure is very expensive. We're running ads in costly swing-state markets, printing campaign literature, filling up gas tanks to knock doors, recruiting volunteers, and scaling up our voter contact programs. And unlike the Democrats, we don't rely on Liberal billionaires and rich celebrities for funding. I'm perfectly okay with that. But it means if we want to WIN BIG, the burden falls on all of us to step up. "That’s why I’m coming to you now – would you be willing to pitch in a few bucks to help kick start these efforts? Whether it’s 10 bucks or 100 bucks, I only ask that everyone pitches in SOMETHING." Look, I know it 's a lot to ask but I GUARANTEE it'll all be worth it when we expand our Conservative Majority, take back control of the Senate, and win the White House. I don't know about you but the thought of unified Republican control fires me up! If that doesn't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will!
